The purpose of this scheme is to provide assistance to the registered beneficiaries employed in building and other construction works for better employment opportunities.

schemeName: Scholarship For Cadets Of Rashtriya Indian Military College (RIMC), Dehradun
briefDescription: The objective of the Scheme is to provide financial assistance to Mizo students permanently residing in the States of studying at RIMC, Dehradun, to enable them to qualify and joint National Defence Academy and further to the Armed Forces. The scheme is 100% funding from the State Plan Fund

schemeName: Bidya Lakshmi Loan
briefDescription: "Bidya Lakshmi" aims to provide education loans for higher studies to children of Assam State Government employees. Benefits include loans up to ₹10,00,000/- at 4% interest, with subsidies for eligible candidates.

schemeName: Self Employment Scheme
briefDescription: Under this scheme, Subsidies will be provided to the religious minority communities with the help of Nationalized / Scheduled banks to start or improve a small-scale handicraft industry, service sector,  and agro-based activities.

schemeName: Financial Assistance To Poor & Needy Widow Women
briefDescription: "Financial Assistance to Poor & Needy Widow Women" is a scheme by the Department of Social Welfare, Govt. of Manipur. The objective of the scheme is to provide social security by way of financial assistance to widows in the age group of 18-40 years.

schemeName: Tailoring Training To Scheduled Caste & Backward Classes Widows/Destitute Women/Girls
briefDescription: The aim of the scheme is to enable Scheduled Caste Widows/girls/destitute women for self-employment. A stipend of Rs.600/- P.M. and raw material costing Rs.300/- per month per trainee is given to a trainee for getting training from the nearest Kalyan Kendar run by this department.

schemeName: Arunachal Pradesh State Stipend Scheme
briefDescription: Under this scheme, provide financial support to scheduled tribe (ST) students pursuing higher and technical education through stipends and book grants.

schemeName: Pension to Widows and Destitute Women
briefDescription: Under this scheme, widows and destitute women aged 18 years and above are eligible for a pension if they are domiciles of Haryana and have been residing in the state for at least one year at the time of application submission.

schemeName: Nirman Shramik Safety Kit Yojana
briefDescription: "Nirman Shramik Safety Kit Yojana" is a scheme by the Department of Labour, Employment, Training & Skill Development Govt of Jharkhand. The scheme provides a direct cash transfer of ₹ 1,000/- for purchasing a branded helmet and a pair of safety shoes.

schemeName: Sardar Patel Awas Yojana
briefDescription: Sardar Patel Awas Yojana (SPAY) is a housing scheme launched by the government of Gujarat in India to provide affordable housing to economically weaker sections (EWS) and low-income groups (LIG) of society.

schemeName: Chief Ministergi Shotharabasingi Tengbang (CMST): Scholarship Of Students With Disabilities
briefDescription: "CMST: Scholarship of Students with Disabilities" is a Scholarship Scheme by the Govt. of Manipur. In this scheme, the Students with Disability who are a domicile of the State of Manipur, and are studying in Class 1st and and above are awarded with scholarship of upto ₹ 8,000/-.

schemeName: Nirman Shramik Antrashtriya Khel Pratiyogiyo Hetu Protsahan Yojana
briefDescription: The purpose of the Nirman Shramik Antrashtriya Khel Pratiyogiyo Hetu Protsahan Yojana is to encourage people employed in Labour Department building, other construction works to participate in international sports by providing them incentives for participating and excelling in international sports.

schemeName: Incentive For The Simple Marriage
briefDescription: The Social Welfare Department of the Government of Karnataka has launched the Simple Marriage scheme, which offers incentives to couples belonging to the SC community. The scheme aims to promote the idea of simple marriages and provide financial assistance to eligible couples.

schemeName: Sikkim Unmarried Women Pension Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme “Sikkim Unmarried Women Pension Scheme (SUWPS)” was launched in 2013 by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim. Under this scheme, the unmarried women of Below Poverty Line (BPL) families in Sikkim would receive a pension of ₹ 2000/- per month.

schemeName: Financial Assistance To Disabled For Self Employment
briefDescription: The objective of this scheme is to facilitate the self-employment of unemployed disabled persons. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to persons with disabilities for self-employment, small-scale business, and agro-based project. This scheme is 100% funded by Govt. of Maharashtra.

schemeName: Nirman Shramik Pucca Ghar Yojana
briefDescription: Labour and ESI Department, Government of Odisha has introduced a scheme "Nirman Shramik Pucca Ghar Yojana (NSPGY)" to meet the housing needs of the building and other construction workers in rural areas, registered under the Odisha Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (OB&OCWWB).

schemeName: Krushi Mahotsav
briefDescription: The Krishi Mahotsav Yojana is an agricultural development scheme launched by the Government of Gujarat in the year 2010. The scheme aims to boost agricultural productivity and increase the income of farmers in the state.

schemeName: Atal Sneh Yojana
briefDescription: Gujarat Chief Minister Shri Vijay Rupani here today announced the Atal ‘Screening of Newborn for Enhancement of Health’ (SNEH) Yojna to be started in the state from the former Prime Minister Atal Behari Vajpayee’s birthday on December 25, 2016.

schemeName: Special Education And Vocational Training Through Government Institutions
briefDescription: In this scheme, Special Education is provided to children with disability between the age group of 6 to 18 years in the Government Special Schools and Vocational Training is provided to special children above the age of 18 years. Only citizens who are permanent residents of Maharashtra are eligible.

schemeName: Financial Assistance For Aids And Appliances For Disabled Persons
briefDescription: The "Financial Assistance for Aids and Appliances for Disabled Persons" is a scheme by the Govt. of Maharashtra. The objective of this scheme is to provide assistance to Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) for the purchase of aids and appliances as per their age group and the type of disability.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Kisan Sahay Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme was launched on September 6, 2019, to provide relief and support to farmers in case of crop damage due to natural calamities and was implemented by the Revenue Department of the Government of Gujarat in collaboration with the Agriculture and Co-operation Department.

schemeName: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme - Sikkim
briefDescription: The scheme “Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (IGNWPS)” by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim provides financial support is provided to the poor widows of the state of Sikkim. The beneficiary receives a monthly pension of ₹ 2000/- through DBT.

schemeName: Chief Ministergi Artistesinggi Tengbang (CMAT) – Artiste’s Pension
briefDescription: The scheme "Chief Ministergi Artistesinggi Tengbang (CMAT) – Artiste’s Pension" by the Dept. of Art and Culture, Govt. of Manipur provides a monthly pension of up to ₹ 4,000/- to the aged reputed artists who have contributed to making the tradition, culture, and art forms of Manipur more vibrant.

schemeName: Schemes Of HP Minorities Finance & Development Corporation
briefDescription: Social, educational and economic upliftment of the minority class people living below the poverty line of the state.

schemeName: ₹ 5 Lakh Insurance Cover To Farmers
briefDescription: Launched on 15 August 2018, the scheme "₹5 Lakh Insurance Cover for Farmers" is an Insurance Scheme by the Department of Agriculture, Government of Telangana. This scheme provides ₹5 lakh insurance coverage to all farmers aged between 18 and 60 years.

schemeName: Atma Nirbhar Krishi Yojana
briefDescription: Atma Nirbhar Krishi Yojana (ANKY) is a scheme launched by the Arunachal Pradesh government to boost the agriculture sector. It provides financial assistance to farmers for various agricultural activities

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Kisan Sahay Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme was launched on September 6, 2019, to provide relief and support to farmers in case of crop damage due to natural calamities and was implemented by the Revenue Department of the Government of Gujarat in collaboration with the Agriculture and Co-operation Department.

schemeName: Chief Minister’s Yuva Kaushal Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme “Chief Minister’s Yuva Kaushal Yojana (CM YKY)” was launched by the government of Arunachal Pradesh on 1st April 2018 to provide high-end training to the youth across the state to enable them to find jobs in the private sector.

schemeName: Cluster Nutritional Kitchen Garden Scheme
briefDescription: The Cluster Nutritional Kitchen Garden Scheme (CNKGS) is an initiative launched by the government of Arunachal Pradesh to promote self-sufficiency and improve nutritional needs by encouraging the establishment of kitchen gardens.

schemeName: Advance For Purchase Or Construction Of House (APB&OCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme “Advance for Purchase or Construction of House” was started by the Department of Labour and Employment, Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh for the registered workers of Arunachal Pradesh Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (APB&OCWWB).

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Vriksharopan Protsahan Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh Mukhyamantri Vriksharopan Protsahan Yojana has been started by the Government of Chhattisgarh with the aim of conserving the environment and doubling the income of the farmers by promoting tree plantation in the state.

schemeName: Arun Pig Development Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme “Arun Pig Development Scheme” was launched by the Department of Animal Husbandry, Veterinary & Dairy Development, Government of Arunachal Pradesh in the financial year 2019-20 with a focus on pig rearing.

schemeName: Schemes Of HP Minorities Finance & Development Corporation
briefDescription: Social, educational and economic upliftment of the minority class people living below the poverty line of the state.

schemeName: ₹ 5 Lakh Insurance Cover To Farmers
briefDescription: Launched on 15 August 2018, the scheme "₹5 Lakh Insurance Cover for Farmers" is an Insurance Scheme by the Department of Agriculture, Government of Telangana. This scheme provides ₹5 lakh insurance coverage to all farmers aged between 18 and 60 years.

schemeName: Financial Assistance To The Child Victims Of Violence Under TheNational Foundation For Communal Harmony
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance for the physical & psychological rehabilitation of child victims of communal, caste, ethnic & terrorist violence with special reference to their care, education & training, besides promoting communal harmony,

schemeName: Mamata Scheme
briefDescription: In order to improve the process in curbing the high rate of mortality and infant mortality rate, the Department of Women and Child Development, Government of Odisha introduced a scheme named "MAMATA" - a conditional cash transfer maternity benefit scheme.

schemeName: Endeavour To Empower-Skill Development
briefDescription: Endeavour to Empower is a customized skill development programme for the youth of J&K.

schemeName: Atma Nirbhar Krishi Yojana
briefDescription: Atma Nirbhar Krishi Yojana (ANKY) is a scheme launched by the Arunachal Pradesh government to boost the agriculture sector. It provides financial assistance to farmers for various agricultural activities

schemeName: Swanirbhar Naari
briefDescription: The Swanirbhar Naari scheme, initiated by the Directorate of Handloom & Textiles, Assam, aims to promote traditional hand-woven items by procuring them directly from indigenous weavers.

schemeName: Subsidy Scheme For Establishment Of Goat Unit (10+1) For Scheduled Tribe Women
briefDescription: The scheme “Subsidy Scheme for Establishment of Goat Unit (10+1) for Scheduled Tribe Women” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to uplift Economically poor livestock breeders of Gujarat State.

schemeName: Subsidy Scheme On Establishment Of 40 R.I.R. Birds Unit For Divyang People
briefDescription: The scheme “Subsidy Scheme on Establishment of 40 R.I.R. Birds Unit for Divyang People” was launched by the Dept. of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Govt. of Gujarat to provide employment, nutritious diet and to raise the income of Divyang People of the society of Gujarat State.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Medhavi Vidhyarti Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to cover the tuition fees for meritorious students from Madhya Pradesh admitted to graduate courses. Financial assistance for admission and course fees is provided to eligible students through this scheme.

schemeName: Stipend Scheme For Poultry Farming Training For Weaker Section
briefDescription: The scheme “Stipend Scheme for Poultry Farming Training for Weaker Section” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to raise the income of poultry farmers by scientific poultry farming training.

schemeName: Nationwide Artificial Insemination Programme
briefDescription: The Nationwide Artificial Insemination Programme (NAIP), is a flagship program of the Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying. The objective of the programme is to increase the productivity of livestock by improving the genetic potential through artificial insemination.

schemeName: Schedule Tribe Pre-Metric Scholarship Class 06 To 08
briefDescription: In the year 1984, Rajasthan Government started a scholarship to encourage the education of the Schedule Tribe.

schemeName: Scholarship To Scheduled Castes Students Studying In Government ITI’s
briefDescription: The scheme “Scholarship to Scheduled Castes Students Studying in Government ITI's” was launched by the Dept. of Welfare of Scheduled Castes & Backward Classes, Government of Haryana in the year 2017-18. This scheme is implemented through Skill Development and Industrial Training Department, Haryana.

schemeName: Ashirwad
briefDescription: The Punjabi government has established the Punjab Ashirwad Scheme to offer financial support for a girl's marriage.

schemeName: Young Interns Program
briefDescription: The Young Interns Program (YIP) is an internship program, envisaged by the Government of Rajasthan, for providing opportunities for talented and progressive youth to upgrade their skills by gaining practical experience working in programs, schemes and projects of the government departments.

schemeName: Innovation In Science Pursuit For Inspired Research (INSPIRE) - Scholarship For Higher Education (SHE)
briefDescription: The scheme "INSPIRE Scholarship for Higher Education (SHE)" aims to attract students to study basic and natural Science subjects at undergraduate and postgraduate levels and pursue research as a career by providing scholarships to interested and deserving students.

schemeName: Rajiv Gandhi Social Security Scheme For Poor Families - 2012
briefDescription: The scheme “Rajiv Gandhi Social Security Scheme for Poor Families - 2012” was started by the Department of Revenue and Disaster Management, Union Territory of Puducherry on 25.03.2011.

schemeName: Bihar Rajya Fasal Sahayata Yojna
briefDescription: The scheme strives to back the farmers with financial incentives in the event of a crop loss due to natural calamities.

schemeName: Scheme For Subsidy On Interest For Establishment Of 1 To 20 Milch Animal Farm For Scheduled Caste
briefDescription: The scheme “Scheme for Subsidy on Interest for Establishment of 1 to 20 Milch Animal Farm for Scheduled Caste” was started by the Dept. of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

schemeName: Schedule Caste Pre-Metric Scholarship Class 06 To 08
briefDescription: In the year 1998, Rajasthan Government started a scholarship to encourage the education of Schedule Cast.

schemeName: Incentive To Saharia Students For B.Ed
briefDescription: In Rajasthan, "Incentive To Saharia Students For B.Ed" scheme is run by the "Tribal Area Development Department" from 2004-05.

schemeName: Financial Assistance For Education Of Children Of Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme “Financial Assistance for Education of Children of Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

schemeName: Coaching Schemes For Sc/st/obc (non-creamy Layer) & Minority Students For Universities
briefDescription: Coaching schemes for students belonging to SC (Scheduled Caste), ST (Scheduled Tribe), OBC (Other Backward Classes) (non-creamy layer), and minority communities are implemented to provide them with equal opportunities and support in pursuing higher education.

schemeName: Sindhu Dharshan Yatra Scheme 2016
briefDescription: The scheme “Sindhu Dharshan Yatra Scheme 2016” was launched by Tourism Department, Government of Haryana on 12th July 2016. Under the scheme, the government of Haryana provides financial assistance to the pilgrims of the State of Haryana.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Aarthik Kalyan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme “Mukhyamantri Aarthik Kalyan Yojana” was launched by the Department of Industrial Policy and Investment Promotion, Government of Madhya Pradesh on 1st August 2014.

schemeName: Internship Policy Of The Madhya Pradesh Tourism Board
briefDescription: The Internship Policy of the Madhya Pradesh Tourism Board intends to provide practical training experience (in summer/ winter etc.) to the students studying in various hospitality / tourism-related schools in Madhya Pradesh or outside the state.

schemeName: Internship Policy Of Indian Council For Cultural Relations (ICCR)
briefDescription: ICCR provides an excellent opportunity for budding scholars to familiarise themselves with the role of soft power in foreign policy formulation in the Govt of India. These ‘Interns’ would be expected to supplement the process of analysis in various fields (creative writing, cultural mapping, etc).

schemeName: Assistance For Delivery / Miscarriage Of Pregnancy / Termination Of Pregnancy To Female Differently Abled Person
briefDescription: The Government of Tamil Nadu introduced "Assistance for Delivery/Miscarriage of Pregnancy/Termination of Pregnancy to Female Differently Abled Person.

schemeName: Scheme For Providing Assistive Devices To Differently Abled Persons
briefDescription: The scheme “Scheme for Providing Assistive Devices to Differently Abled Persons” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

schemeName: Griha Aadhar Scheme
briefDescription: The "Griha Aadhar Scheme" addresses the problem of spiralling prices and provides support to the housewives/homemakers from the middle, lower-middle and poor sections of society, to maintain a reasonable standard of living for their families.

schemeName: Internship Programme Of The Department Of Expenditure
briefDescription: The Internship Programme of the Department of Expenditure aims to familiarize willing and eligible undergraduates pursuing five-year integrated courses and Graduates pursuing post-Graduation/ post-Graduates pursuing Research with the overall process of formulation of economic policies of the Govt.

schemeName: Swasraya Scheme For Parents/Mothers Of Physically Handicapped/Mentally Retarded Persons
briefDescription: The scheme “Swasraya Scheme for Parents/Mothers of Physically Handicapped/Mentally Retarded Persons” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

schemeName: Scholarship For Transgender Students
briefDescription: The scheme “Scholarship for Transgender Students” was launched by the Social Justice Department, Government of Kerala for providing scholarships to Transgender students from 7th standard onwards studying in State Government/ Government aided/ Self Financing schools.

schemeName: Maintenance Allowance To VJNT And SBC Students Studying In Professional Courses And Living In Hostel Attached To Professional Colleges
briefDescription: Government of Maharashtra introduced the scheme to complete the education of V.J.N.T and S.B.C students who are the student of professional courses.

schemeName: Nihshaktajan Vivaah Protsaahan Yojana
briefDescription: In 2008, Madhya Pradesh State Government started the "Nihshaktajan Vivaah Protsaahan Yojana" for differently ables persons

schemeName: Marriage Assistance
briefDescription: The Government of Tamil Nadu introduced "Marriage Assistance"  for the employees or their Son/Daughter who legally attain the age of marriage.

schemeName: Shreshtam Scheme For Ensuring Participation Of PwDs In Arts & Sports
briefDescription: The scheme “Shreshtam Scheme for Ensuring Participation of PwDs in Arts & Sports” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

schemeName: Snehayanam Scheme For Mothers Of Persons With Special Needs
briefDescription: The scheme “Snehayanam Scheme for Mothers of Persons with Special Needs” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

schemeName: Merit Based Award and Recognition Of High Performance In The Board Exams Of SSC And HSSC In The State Of Goa
briefDescription: The objective of this scheme is to motivate students by giving Merit Based Award on the benchmark of performance and to provide financial incentives to high-performing students who are economically weak. The scheme aims to increase the representation of the ST Community in the High-Rank Holders.

schemeName: Goa Tribal's Employment Generation Programme Scheme
briefDescription: "Goa Tribal’s Employment Generation Programme Scheme" provides a subsidy of 40% on the total loan amount i.e. 95% of the project cost. The scheme is for educated unemployed individuals in the 18 to 45 years age group who are members of the tribal communities of Goa.

schemeName: Atal Asra Yojana
briefDescription: "Atal Asra Yojana" by the Department of Tribal Welfare, Government of Goa provides financial assistance of up to ₹ 3,00,000 to individuals from Scheduled Tribes communities for construction/ re-construction and repairs of the house.

schemeName: Antya Sanskar Sahay Yojana
briefDescription: "Antya Sanskar Sahay Yojana" by the Department of Tribal Welfare, Government of Goa provides grants of financial assistance for the performance of funeral and religious ceremonies of Scheduled Tribe (ST) families.

schemeName: “RAKSHAK PURASKARS’’ Award
briefDescription: The awards are conferred to the individuals who have shown exceptional courage, especially in adverse circumstances in coming to aid, protecting or helping beyond the call of duty and assisting in dealing with the victims of any type of violence, attack or harassment against women and girls.

schemeName: Fee Waiver Scheme For SC/ST Students Pursuing Higher Education
briefDescription: "Fee Waiver Scheme for SC/ST Students Pursuing Higher Education" provides free access to every SC/ST student, to the institutions of higher learning so that that no eligible SC/ST students are deprived of higher education for want of resources.

schemeName: Old Age And Destitute Pension
briefDescription: The Government of Puducherry introduced Old Age And Destitute Pension Scheme to extend a helping hand by way of monthly financial assistance to Old Age Persons/Widows/ Deserted Women/ Unmarried Women and Enuches so that they could defray some petty personal expenses without depending on others.

schemeName: Development of Industrie-Training Scheme
briefDescription: The Government of Puducherry introduced the Scheme Development Of Industries-Training Scheme for the candidates to develop their skills to enable them to start their own ventures or to get suitable employment opportunity by sponsoring to selected short term trades.

schemeName: Medhavi Chhatr/Chhatra Shiksha Protsahan Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh state Government started a scheme "Medhavi Chhatr/ Chhatra Shiksha Protsahan Yojana" for education.

schemeName: Durghatana Mein Chikitsa Sahaayata Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started this scheme "Durghatana Mein Chikitsa Sahaayata Yojana" for labor workers.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Nirmaan Majadur suraksha upakaran sahaayata yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started "Mukhyamantri Nirmaan Majadur Suraksha Upakaran Sahaayata Yojana" for Building and other construction workers.

schemeName: Kala Gaurav Puraskar
briefDescription: "Kala Gaurav Puraskar" is presented to artists working in the field of Art and Culture who have given outstanding contributions in their respective fields of art. Such artists need to be felicitated and their substantial contribution needs to be felicitated.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Free Coaching for SCs, OBCs and beneficiaries of PM CARES Children Scheme
briefDescription: To provide high-quality free coaching to economically disadvantaged Scheduled Castes (SCs), Other Backward Classes (OBCs), and eligible beneficiaries of the PM CARES Children Scheme for competitive exams in public and private sector employment and admission into professional courses.

schemeName: Kachara Binane Vaale Hetu Suraksha Upakaran Sahaayata Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Kachara Beenane Vaale Hetu Suraksha Upakaran Sahaayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 19 June 2017.

schemeName: Asangathit Karmakar Samachar-Patr Hawker Cycle Sahayata Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Asangathit Karmakar Samachar-Patr Hawker Cycle Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 10 September 2012.

schemeName: Asangathit Karmakar Gambhir Bimari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Asangathit Karmakar Gambhir Bimari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 28 April 2012.

schemeName: Viranarayan Singh Shram Ann Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh state Government started a scheme "Viranarayan Singh Shram Ann Yojana" for unorganized worker on 17 January 2018.

schemeName: Padho Pardesh
briefDescription: Padho Pardesh is a scheme of interest subsidy on educational loans for overseas studies for the students belonging to the minority communities. The scheme was launched by the Ministry of Minority Affairs in 2006 under the Prime Minister's New 15 Point Programme for the Welfare of Minorities.

schemeName: Safai Karmakar Prasuti Sahayata Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Safai Karmakar Prasuti Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

schemeName: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas: Water Augmentation
briefDescription: The scheme "Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas: Water Augmentation" by the Coffee Board, Department of Commerce, aims to improve the production and productivity of coffee plantations by encouraging water augmentation in traditional areas.

schemeName: Safai Karmakar Gambhir Bimari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Safai Karmakar Gambhir Bimari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 28 April 2012.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemeName: FutureSkills Prime Incentive Program
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote a novel skilling ecosystem in the country, the programme/scheme would incentivize the cost of the eligible course(s) concerned, providing authentic and accredited certifications that are acceptable in the industry.

schemeName: Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Cycle, Chhatari, Chappal/Joota Sahayta Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Cycle, Chhatari, Chappal/Joota Sahayta Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

schemeName: Theka Shramik, Hamaal Shramik Evan Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Gambhir Bimaari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Theka Shramik, Hamaal Shramik Evan Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Gambhir Bimaari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 05 June 2018.

schemeName: Theka Shramik, Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Evan Hamal Shramik Prasuti Sahayta Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Theka Shramik, Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Evan Hamal Shramik Prasuti Sahayta Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Construction/ Purchase of Wooden/ FRP Fishing Vessel (Canoe) for Fishermen
briefDescription: Through this scheme, 50% of the actual cost of the Wooden/ Fiber-Reinforced Plastic (FRP) Fishing Vessel (Canoe) purchased by the fishermen is covered by the Government of Goa. The applicant will be entitled to a subsidy grant once every four years on one craft per family household.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Brackish Water Aquaculture Farms
briefDescription: Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided to eligible fishermen for the construction and renovation of the Farm, for the purchase of farming equipment, and for the purchase of feed. Only the farmers having a water spread area of 2 hectares or less can apply to this scheme.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Setting up Crab Culture Unit
briefDescription: Through this scheme, financial assistance of 25% of the actual cost, limited to ₹1,50,000 per hectare is provided to eligible fishermen for setting up crab culture unit. Only Fish Farmer/ Individual/ Registered Self Help Group/ Societies, interested in the setting up of the Crab Farming Unit.

schemeName: National Scholarship For Post Graduate Studies
briefDescription: A scheme started by Ministry of Education for the student Higher education.

schemeName: Disability Pension - West Bengal
briefDescription: In 2010, the Women and Child Development and Social Welfare Department of the West Bengal State Government introduced the "Disability Pension" scheme.

schemeName: E-YUVA Scheme: BIRAC’s E-YUVA Fellows (for under graduate students)
briefDescription: BIRAC’s E-YUVA Fellows shall apply as a team and pursue their research work at their College/University labs and will also be allowed access to facilities at EYC and EYC Knowledge Partners as and when required.

schemeName: Delhi Arogya Nidhi
briefDescription: Delhi Arogya Nidhi (DAN) is a scheme to provide financial assistance upto ₹1.5 lacs to needy patients who have National Food Security Cards for the treatment of diseases in Government hospitals only.

schemeName: Swarnajayanti Fellowships Scheme
briefDescription: Under this scheme, a selected number of young scientists, with proven track record, are provided special assistance and support to enable them to pursue basic research in frontier areas of science and technology.

schemeName: West Bengal Student Credit Card Scheme
briefDescription: The Higher Education Department, Government of West Bengal has introduced the Student Credit Card Scheme for the students of West Bengal to enable them to pursue higher education without having any financial constraints.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Aadharbhut Shiksha Prashikshan Sahayata Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Mukhyamantri Aadharbhut Shiksha Prashikshan Sahayata Yojana" for Building and other construction worker on 29 March 2023.

schemeName: Grant of 50% Subsidy for the Purchase of Aquarium and Its Accessories under "Development of Freshwater Aquaculture and Setting up of Aquarium, Ornamental Fish Breeding Centre"
briefDescription: "Grant of 50% Subsidy for the Purchase of Aquarium and Its Accessories" is introduced with the objective to propagate the importance of aquarium keeping and to inculcate the art of aquarium keeping among the general public. The scheme is extended to all the regions of Puducherry.

schemeName: Zero Ticket Bus Travel Scheme for Women
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide to eligible women/ transgender beneficiaries of Tamil Nadu under the Zero Ticket Bus Travel Scheme for Women, Free of Cost Travel in Government of Tamil Nadu Buses. No Need to Pay any Fare up to 30 Kilometers.

schemeName: Scheme of Pension for Eminent Sports Persons
briefDescription: The scheme “Scheme of Pension for Eminent Sports Persons” was launched by the Department of Sports, Government of Punjab to provide pension to eminent veteran sportsmen who have excelled at International level during their youth and made the nation proud.

schemeName: Chief Minister Breakfast Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Breakfast Scheme is that Breakfast will be provided to primary school children from 1st to 5th standard studying in Government schools on all school working days.

schemeName: Manabik Scheme
briefDescription: The Manabik Pension Scheme is a financial assistance program launched in 2018 to provide monthly pensions to individuals with disabilities in West Bengal.

schemeName: Old Age Pension
briefDescription: In 2010, the Women and Child Development and Social Welfare Department of the West Bengal State Government introduced the "Old Age Pension" scheme.

schemeName: "Annual Insurance Premium for Boat Owners" under "Financial Assistance for Availing Subsidy Components for the Development of Marine Fisheries"
briefDescription: "Annual Insurance Premium for Boat Owners" under "Financial Assistance for Availing Subsidy Components for the Development of Marine Fisheries" is introduced to increase marine fish production through subsidies for the annual premiums for insurance coverage paid by the mechanized boat operators.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Uchchatar Shiksha Protsahan Yojana: Central Sector Interest Subsidy Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme provides full interest subsidy during the moratorium period on loan availed under Model Education Loan Scheme of Indian Banks’ Association (IBA) to students belonging to economically weaker sections whose annual parental income is up to ₹4.5 Lakhs from all sources.

schemeName: Grant of Marriage Allowance to the Widow's Daughter
briefDescription: This scheme aims to provide financial support to widows for the marriage of their daughters. Eligible widows can receive ₹25,000/- to cover marriage expenses. The scheme is implemented through the Department of Women and Child Development, Government of Puducherry.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: Coconut Palm Insurance Scheme
briefDescription: The “Coconut Palm Insurance Scheme (CPIS)” is being implemented by the Coconut Development Board, Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare, Government of India with the objective of insuring coconut palms against natural calamities, climatic risks, pests, diseases, and other perils.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Old Age Pensioner Suffering From TB/ Cancer
briefDescription: “Financial Assistance to Old Age Pensioner Suffering From TB/ Cancer” by the Dept of Women & Child Development, Govt of Puducherry, was introduced to extend a helping hand by way of financial assistance to Old Age/Destitute Pensioners who are suffering from TB/Cancer to meet the medical expenses.

schemeName: Reimbursement of Tuition Fees for Typewriting and Shorthand Courses for Children of Widows
briefDescription: “Reimbursement of Tuition Fees for Typewriting and Shorthand Courses for Children of Widows” by the Dept of Women & Child Development, Govt of Pondicherry, was introduced to encourage the children of widows to pursue Typewriting and Shorthand courses and facilitate the reimbursement of course fees.

schemeName: Biju Patnaik Sports Award for Excellence in Sports Journalism
briefDescription: The award is given to the journalists who have done significant work in the sphere of journalism for the promotion and popularization of sports and games as well as fighting for the causes of sports and sportspersons in the State of Odisha.

schemeName: "Conversion/Modernisation of Mechanised Fishing Boats for Deep Sea Fishing" under "Financial Assistance for Availing Subsidy Components for the Development of Marine Fisheries"
briefDescription: The scheme "Conversion/Modernisation of Mechanised Fishing Boats for Deep Sea Fishing" is introduced by the Dept of Fisheries and Fishermen Welfare, Govt of Puducherry to increase marine fish production by extending grants for the conversion/modernization of mechanized boats for deep-sea fishing.

schemeName: Grant of House Construction Subsidy to Scheduled Caste People
briefDescription: The scheme “Grant of House Construction Subsidy to Scheduled Caste People” was introduced by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Dept, Govt of Puducherry. The poor Scheduled Caste people, and other Economically backward class people, who meet the eligibility criteria, are provided house construction subsidy.

schemeName: Supply of Dhotis and Sarees to Scheduled Caste (SC) People
briefDescription: The scheme “Supply of Dhotis and Sarees to Scheduled Caste (SC) People” by the Adi Dravidar Welfare and Scheduled Tribes Welfare Department, Union Territory of Puducherry is introduced to provide clothing items (lungi, shirt, saree, blouse, etc) to the Scheduled Caste (SC) people of Puducherry.

schemeName: Cash Award (A.B.O.C.W.W.B)
briefDescription: Cash awards shall be given to the three male & three female children of the registered construction workers in each district to those students who score 75% or above, 65% or less than 75%, and 55% or less than 65% mark in HSLC, AHM and H.S. examinations.

schemeName: Supply of Sarees and Dhoties to Differently Abled Persons
briefDescription: In this scheme, free dhothies and sarees or equivalent Direct Benefit Transfer are provided to the differently abled persons who are benefited under the monthly financial assistance schemes in lieu of Diwali / Pongal / local regional festivals.

schemeName: National Youth Award
briefDescription: This award is to motivate young persons to achieve excellence in the field of national development or social service and to develop in them a sense of responsibility to the community and thus to improve their potential as good citizens.

schemeName: Maternity Benefit (A.B.O.C.W.W.B)
briefDescription: The scheme “Maternity Benefit” was started by the Assam Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (A.B.O.C.W.W.B), Labour Welfare Department, Government of Assam for providing financial assistance to the registered women beneficiaries as maternity benefits during the period of maternity.

schemeName: Gambhir Bimari Sahayata Yojana
briefDescription: The "Gambhir Bimari Sahayata Yojana" is a scheme by the government of Uttar Pradesh, India, to provide financial assistance to registered construction workers for the  treatment from the serious Illness

schemeName: Group Insurance for Differently Abled Person Government Employees
briefDescription: The scheme “Group Insurance for Differently Abled Person Government Employees" was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry. In this scheme, in the case of death due to accident while in service the sum insured will be given to the family of the deceased employee.

schemeName: Supply of Radio to the Blind Persons
briefDescription: “Supply of Radio to the Blind Persons" was launched by the Dept of Social Welfare, Govt of Puducherry. In this scheme, a radio is provided to the blind person for recreation. The applicant should have disability of 40% or above, and should be a Native/Resident of Puducherry.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Rajya Bridhhabasta Pension Yojana
briefDescription: “Mukhyamantri Rajya Bridhhabasta Pension Yojana” is a Social Security Scheme by the Department of Women, Child Development & Social Security, Government of Jharkhand. The scheme provides financial asistance to the age group of 60 years and above.

schemeName: Award of Post-Matric Scholarship to Scheduled Caste Students
briefDescription: The scheme “Award of Post-Matric Scholarship to Scheduled Caste Students” was introduced by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Dept, Government of Puducherry. The objective of the scheme is to benefit the students who are studying at the Post-matric level or Post-Secondary stage to complete their education.

schemeName: Grant of Financial Assistance to Poor Scheduled Caste Pregnant & Lactating Women
briefDescription: The scheme “Grant of Financial Assistance to Poor Scheduled Caste Pregnant & Lactating Women” was introduced by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Department, Government of Puducherry. The objective of the scheme is to provide assistance for the well-being of Pregnant and Lactating mothers and their children.

schemeName: Matritva, Shishu Evam Baalika Madad Yojana
briefDescription: "Maatrtv, Shishu Evan Baalika Madad Yojana" is a initiative of Uttar Pradesh state Government to provide the financial assistance to the mother and her girl child.

schemeName: Masala Shetra Vistar Yojana
briefDescription: Masala Shetra Vistar Yojana was launched by the Government of Madhya Pradesh the whose objective is to expand the area and increase the production of selected spice crops through quality high yielding varieties.

schemeName: "Integrated Farming for Productivity Improvement Scheme" by the Coconut Development Board
briefDescription: Through the “Integrated Farming for Productivity Improvement Scheme" by the Coconut Development Board, the coconut farmers are provided financial assistance through DBT (Direct Benefit Transfer) mode for the Laying of the Demonstration Plot, and for the Construction of the Organic Manure Unit.

schemeName: Replanting & Rejuvenation of Coconut Garden" by the Coconut Development Board
briefDescription: Through the scheme “Replanting & Rejuvenation of Coconut Garden (R&R)" by the Coconut Development Board, the coconut farmers are provided financial assistance through DBT (Direct Benefit Transfer) mode for the cutting & removal, replanting, and for integrated management practices.

schemeName: Fruit Development Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to make available to the farmers good quality planting materials in convergence mode and sale at subsidized rates.

schemeName: Plantation Crop Development Scheme
briefDescription: The objectives of the scheme are to boost up the area and production of all plantation crops like Arecanut, Cashewnut, Coconut, Pineapple etc., and to provide a 50 % subsidy for planting materials and construction of a soakage tank.

schemeName: Assistance to General Farmers for Installation of Submersible / Centrifugal Motor Pumpsets With Accessories
briefDescription: Through this scheme, the farmers from the General Category are provided with a grant of 65% subsidy towards the installation of suitable Submersible / Centrifugal motor pump sets with accessories, subject to a maximum of ₹50,000/‐ per tubewell per individual.

schemeName: Floriculture Development Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to motivate the farmers to take up floriculture (traditional and non-traditional flowers) as a commercial venture through the distribution of planting materials and other inputs.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Covid-19 Bal Seva Yojana
briefDescription: The Mukhyamantri Covid-19 Bal Seva Yojana scheme for children who have lost their parent(s) to the COVID pandemic, the government will provide these children funding for good education and health.

schemeName: Home for the Aged and Infirm
briefDescription: The scheme “Home for the Aged and Infirm" was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry. The objective of this scheme is to cater to the needs of persons who are aged/infirm, i.e. senior citizens, both male and female above the age of 60 years from BPL Family.

schemeName: "Back Ended Investment Subsidy to Paddy Growers" component of the "Crop Production Technology" scheme
briefDescription: "Back Ended Investment Subsidy to Paddy Growers" component of the "Crop Production Technology" scheme was introduced by the Dept of Agriculture and Farmer's Welfare, UT of Puducherry. The paddy farmers residing in the Yanam region are provided a back-ended investment subsidy at ₹4,000/- per hectare.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: PM-YASASVI: Top Class School Education for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide premium education to the meritorious students belonging to OBC, EBC, and DNT categories by funding their education from Class 9 onwards till they complete Class 12.

schemeName: Integrated Technology Enabled Agriculture Management System Or iTEAMS
briefDescription: The scheme was launched by the Department of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare, Govt. of Meghalaya to address critical issues of enabling & facilitating access to remunerative & sustainable markets for farmers produce in most transparent & effective manner through facilitation service iTEAM Dial 1917.

schemeName: Indira Gandhi National Vridhavastha Pension Yojana
briefDescription: Under this scheme, the Madhya Pradesh government provides financial support to the citizens whose families live below the poverty line.

schemeName: "Advance / High Skill Training" Component of the "Development of Industries" Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the skill of those who have completed the basic training and are interested in advanced training in their trade or the candidates having technical qualifications willing to undergo some special high skilled training to start their ventures or to get suitable employment.

schemeName: "Vocational Training" Component of the "Development of Industries" Scheme
briefDescription: "Vocational Training" by the Department of Industries and Commerce, Union Territory of Puducherry aims to create more employment opportunities broadly for the unemployed youth particularly women to pursue wide career openings besides self-ventures by giving training in trades.

schemeName: Bio Control Laboratory and Pesticides Testing Laboratory Scheme
briefDescription: The objective is the production of Bio Control Agents such as Trichoderma, Trichogramma, etc., and further distribution to farmers as awareness and demonstration for organic Plant Health Management in order to promote organic crop production.

schemeName: Nirman Shramik Siksha Kaushal Vikas Yojana
briefDescription: The NIRMAN SHRAMIK SIKSHA KAUSHAL VIKAS YOJANA (NSKKVY) is a scheme launched by the Government of Rajasthan to provide financial assistance for education and skill development to the children of registered construction workers in the state.

schemeName: Pension Scheme for Grade II Deformed Leprosy Patients
briefDescription: The scheme "Pension Scheme for Grade II Deformed Leprosy Patients" is a Pension Scheme by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura. The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹2,000/- per month to Leprosy Patients who are residents of Tripura.

schemeName: Integrated Agriculture Training Centre Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide training for enhancing the skills of farmers besides imparting updated agricultural technologies to departmental functionaries.

schemeName: Mukh‍yamantri Janakal‍yaan (Sambal 2.0) Yojana (Asangathit Karmakaar Man‍da)
briefDescription: The Mukhyamantri Jan Kalyan (Sambal 2.0) Yojana is a initiative of Madhya Pradesh government. The scheme will provide much-needed social security to unorganized workers in the state and help them live a dignified life.

schemeName: Award of Pre-Matric Scholarship to Other Economically Backward Class (OEBC) Students
briefDescription: The "Award of Pre-Matric Scholarship to Other Economically Backward Class (OEBC) Students" initiated by the Department of Information & Publicity, Union Territory of Puducherry, is designed to extend financial assistance to OEBC students, mitigating the risk of dropouts due to financial constraints.

schemeName: Award of Puducherry State Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme make sure that no brilliant student is prevented on the grounds of poverty alone from pursuing the academic career. Scholarship is awarded to students in 11th & 12th standards who have secured promotion to the next higher class with 60% & 50% marks in 10th & 11th standard respectively.

schemeName: Plant Protection including Integrated Pest Management Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to mobilize and support farmers to use bio-pesticides and bio- agents for plant health management through distribution of bio-pesticides and other IPM tools and through sale of Sprayers and Plant Protection Equipment to encourage organic crop production.

schemeName: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Allowance to Destitute Women Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme “The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Allowance to Destitute Women Scheme” is implemented by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands to provide financial assistance to the poorest and destitute women in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

schemeName: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Widow Pension Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme “The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Widow Pension Scheme” is implemented by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands to provide financial assistance to poor and destitute widows in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

schemeName: Laxman Award / Rani Laxmi Bai Award Scheme- Differently-abled and Posthumously
briefDescription: The scheme “Laxman Award/Rani Laxmi Bai Award” was launched by the Department of Sports, Government of Uttar Pradesh to honor special sports personalities of the state, differently-abled players and the Laxman Award, the highest sports award of the state will be given posthumously to Shahid.

schemeName: "Advance/High Skill Training in Coir" Component of the "Development of Coir" Scheme
briefDescription: "Advance/High Skill Training in Coir" aims to enhance the skills of Coir artisans and interested individuals. The objective is to acquire the latest skills and modern technologies through advanced/high-skilled training available across various locations in India, offering valuable benefits.

schemeName: Pension Scheme for Cancer Patients
briefDescription: The scheme “Pension Scheme for Cancer Patients" was launched by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura. The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension of ₹2,000/- to the person suffering from cancer.

schemeName: Vidhva Vivah Uphar Yojana
briefDescription: The Rajasthan government's Social Justice and Empowerment Department launched the "Vidhva Vivah Uphar Yojana" program, a social welfare initiative that aims to improve the lives of widow women.

schemeName: Disability Assistance (ANBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to registered construction workers who become disabled due to an accident during the course of their employment on the production of a certificate from competent medical authorities in respect of the percentage of disability.

schemeName: Award of Scholarship to the Cadets Belonging to UT of Puducherry and Studying in Rashtriya Indian Military College, Dehradun
briefDescription: The objective of this scheme is to extend scholarships worth of ₹20,000/- per annum to the cadets belonging to the Union Territory of Puducherry who come from economically weak backgrounds and have been selected for admission into the Rashtriya Indian Military College, Dehradun.

schemeName: Grant of Annual Scholarship to the Students Belonging to UT of Puducherry Selected and Studying in the Sainik School, Amaravathi Nagar, Tamil Nadu
briefDescription: "Grant of Annual Scholarship to the Students Belonging to UT of Puducherry Selected and Studying in the Sainik School, Amaravathi Nagar, Tamil Nadu" is a Scholarship Scheme by the Directorate of School Education, Puducherry. A scholarship of ₹10,000/- per annum per student is provided.

schemeName: Total Health Check-up Scheme (GBOCWWB)
briefDescription: This scheme facilitates a complete physical examination of the construction workers, which can diagnose potential illnesses and early treatment can prevent major illnesses. Hence, major illness can be avoided and the construction worker can lead a healthy life.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Work Form Home-Job Work Yojana
briefDescription: The main objective of the "Mukhyamantri Work from Home" Scheme is to provide an opportunity for the women of the state to get employment sitting at home and to empower women by providing them with financial help by giving them work.

schemeName: "SUPER 30" Scheme
briefDescription: "Super 30" was launched by the Directorate of Secondary Education, Tripura. The scheme aims to provide free coaching for JEE/ NEET to the students who are appearing in the class 10th Board Final Exam and want to pursue Science Stream in Class 11th & 12th with the aspiration to crack JEE/NEET.

schemeName: Dr. Muthulakshmi Reddy Ninaivu Inter-caste Marriage Assistance Scheme-I
briefDescription: The 'Dr. Muthulakshmi Reddy Ninaivu Inter-caste Marriage Assistance Scheme' was launched by the Social Welfare & Women Empowerment Dept. Tamil Nadu. The aim is to abolish caste & community discrimination by encouraging inter-caste marriage by giving financial assistance to newly married couples.

schemeName: Farm Pond (Khet Talai) Nirman Karyakram
briefDescription: Under the Farm Pond (Khet Talaee) Nirmaan Kaaryakram scheme provied to help the farmers of Rajasthan to collect rain water and use it for irrigation purposes so that the farmers can get sufficient water for irrigation in their fields.

schemeName: Funeral Assistance Scheme (PBAOCWWB)
briefDescription: The "Funeral Assistance" is a Welfare Scheme by the Puducherry Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Union Territory of Puducherry. Through this scheme, the Board may sanction an amount of ₹7,000/- to the nominees/dependents of the deceased Construction Worker.

schemeName: Award of Scholarship to the Children who are Recipients of National Child Award for Exceptional Achievements and Other National / International Merit Awards
briefDescription: The objectives of this scheme are to recognize the talents of children who are recipients of the National Child Award for Exceptional Achievements and other National/International Merit Awards and to recognize the talents of children who are pursuing outstanding achievements in different fields.

schemeName: Annai Teresa Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme for Orphan Girls-II
briefDescription: "Annai Teresa Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme for Orphan Girls-I" was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Dept, Govt of Tamil Nadu. The scheme provides financial assistance to the orphan girls for their marriage. The bride should be 18 years or older during her marriage.

schemeName: Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Koshal Sanvardhan Yojana (RS-CSEP)
briefDescription: The Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Koshal Sanvardhan Yojana, offered by the Rajasthan Knowledge Corporation Limited (RKCL), provides free training in spoken English and personality development for women and girls.

schemeName: Winter Cropping & Development of Cultivable Land Scheme
briefDescription: The objectives of the scheme are to bring more areas under cultivation during the normally lean winter season under different crops other than paddy and increase production and productivity of various crops like cereals, pulses, oilseeds, and vegetables during the Rabi season.

schemeName: Hostel Assistance Scheme for Children of Migrant Construction Workers (GBOCWWB)
briefDescription: Under the scheme, hostel facilities for free accommodation and meals shall be provided to the children of migrant construction workers in primary school. The aim of the scheme is to provide primary, secondary, and higher education to the children of migrant construction workers.

schemeName: Shramik Basera Yojana (GBOCWWB)
briefDescription: Under the scheme, the accommodation facilities will be provided @ ₹5/- per day to registered construction workers in temporary prefabricated housing with basic amenities that can be dismantled.

schemeName: Diggy
briefDescription: Rajasthan Government has started the Diggy Scheme for the welfare of farmers, under which farmers will be provided grants for making dig for irrigation of crops. This scheme is to help farmers improve their farming by using more water resources and encourage them to grow good crops.

schemeName: Housing Subsidy Scheme (GBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The main objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to construction workers registered with the Gujarat Building and Other Construction Worker’s Welfare Board to build their own houses.

schemeName: Scheme of Giving Awards to Eminent Artists - Kalai Valarmani Award
briefDescription: "Scheme of Giving Awards to Eminent Artists - Kalai Valarmani Award" by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu aims to promote and preserve the culture of Tamil Nadu. The selected artists are awarded financial assistance ₹6,000/- and certificates of appreciation.

schemeName: Mini Sprinkler Sanyantr
briefDescription: The Mini Sprinkler Sanyantr scheme provided a subsidy to the farmers can irrigate more land by getting sprinkler subsidy. The subsidy given by the state government to the farmers will be sent directly to their bank account through DBT.

schemeName: Green House
briefDescription: Under the Green House Scheme Farmers can get the benefit of subsidy on green house and earn more income by cultivating horticultural crops like vegetables, flowers, fruits etc. by controlling the ago-climatic factors, temperature, humidity and sunlight.

schemeName: Chhatraon Ke Liye Protsahan Rashi
briefDescription: In the "Chhatraon Ke Liye Protsahan Rashi" scheme to encourages girl students to study agriculture subject and provides financial assistance to economically disadvantaged students who may face challenges in accessing education due to financial constraints.

schemeName: Kisan Kaleva Yojana
briefDescription: Under the Kisan Kaleva Scheme run by the Rajasthan Government, food is provided at concessional rates through coupons to the farmers and their assistants who come to sell crops in the vegetable market premises.

schemeName: One Time Cash Incentive towards acquiring BEd, BPEd, DTEd, PGDCA (Sainik Welfare)
briefDescription: "One Time Cash Incentive towards acquiring BEd, BPEd, DTEd, PGDCA" is a Welfare Scheme by the Armed Forces Flag Day Fund of the Department of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. Through this scheme, up to ₹20,000/- is provided to the unemployed Ex-servicemen to pursue the mentioned programs/courses.

schemeName: "Outstanding Artisan of the Year" under “Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - State Awards to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises”
briefDescription: The "Outstanding Artisan of the Year" award is conferred upon the artisan who has been a participant for 3 years in National / International handicraft exhibitions/fairs. The awardee is given a cash award of ₹2,00,000/- and a citation. The applications are accepted offline in the prescribed form.

schemeName: Scheme of Extending Financial Assistance to Folk Artists, Troupes for the Purchase of Musical Instruments, Costumes
briefDescription: "Scheme of Extending Financial Assistance to Folk Artists, Troupes for the Purchase of Musical Instruments, Costumes" was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme provides a sum of ₹2,000/- to individual folk artists & ₹6,000/- for cultural troupes.

schemeName: Kam Lagat Pyaaj Bhandaran Sanrachna
briefDescription: Under the Kam Lagat Pyaaj Bhandaran Sanrachna yojana Construction of warehouses should be done at a high level to prevent moisture and dampness which occur due to direct contact of onions with soil.

schemeName: Award to Scheduled Castes Students Who Secured Top Ranks at State and District Level in Standard X & XII (Sahuji Maharaj Assistance)
briefDescription: Under the scheme, Scheduled Castes Category students who have Secured Top Ranks at State and District Levels in Gujarat in Standard X & XII are given cash prizes. Cash prizes are awarded to the first three students who secure the highest ranks in both Standard X and Standard XII across all streams.

schemeName: Coaching Assistance to Scheduled Castes Students for Preparation of Examination Like IIM, NIFT, NLU, CEPT
briefDescription: Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to Students of the Scheduled Castes category who are preparing for examinations like IIM, NIFT, NLU, and CEPT.

schemeName: Dr. P. G. Solanki Scheme for Loan/Assistance to Law Graduates of Scheduled Caste
briefDescription: The scheme was launched in year 1973. Under this scheme, law graduates belonging to the Scheduled Caste who intend to start independent legal practice will receive financial assistance for the purchase of business premises/shops.

schemeName: Grant of Financial Assistance for Purchase of Textbooks/Notebooks to School-Going Children of Industrial Workers/Employees (GLWB)
briefDescription: Through this scheme, the children of industrial workers/employees, studying in classes 1st to 4th in recognized/approved schools are provided financial assistance for the purchase of textbooks/notebooks. The scheme aims to provide financial support for the educational needs of the children.

schemeName: Coaching Assistance Scheme for Preparation of Recruitment Exams for Scheduled Caste Students
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to Students of SC category who are preparing for all State Government and Central Government Recruitment Examinations of Class– 1, 2 & 3 conducted by UPSC/GPSC/State Commission/Bank/LIC/Subordinate Services Selection Board/District Panchayat Selection Board.

schemeName: Poompuhar State Award
briefDescription: "Poompuhar State Award" was launched by the Dept of Handlooms, Handicrafts, Textiles & Khadi, Tamil Nadu. The awardees are given ₹50,000, a 4-gram gold medal, tamirapathiram and a certificate. The economically backward awardees are also eligible for monthly pension of ₹3,500/- after 60 years of age.

schemeName: Book Allowance to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows (Sainik Welfare)
briefDescription: "Book Allowance to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows" is a Welfare Scheme by the Dept of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. Through this scheme, the wards of the ESM / Widows of ESM studying in Government-recognized Institutions are provided allowances towards the purchase of books.

schemeName: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Shramik Pravidhik Shiksha Sahaayata Yojana
briefDescription: The Government of Uttar Pradesh initiated a scheme "Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Shramik Pravidhik Shiksha Sahaayata Yojana" to encourage the children towards the education.

schemeName: Ganesh Shankar Vidyaarthi Shramik Puraskar Rashi Yojana
briefDescription: The Government of Uttar Pradesh initiated a scheme "Ganesh Shankar Vidyarthi Shramik Puraskar Raschi Yojana" to encourage the children towards the education.

schemeName: Naye Fal Bagicho Ki Sthapana
briefDescription: Under the "Naye Fal Bagecho Ki Sthapana" subsidies to Increase farmers' income by facilitating the cultivation of high-value fruit crops that have a potentially higher market demand and profitability compared to traditional crops.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Meet the Funeral Expenses of Differently Abled Person
briefDescription: The scheme 'Financial Assistance to Meet the Funeral Expenses of Differently Abled Person' was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons. In this scheme, financial assistance of ₹2,000/- is provided to meet the expenses in connection with funeral, in the event of the...

schemeName: Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter Scheme under Scheduled Castes Sub Plan (SC Category)
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to dairy farmers belonging to Scheduled Caste category on purchase of electric powered chaff cutters. By using power driven chaff cutter, dairy farmers can reduce wastage of green &dry fodder which is economically important for their profitable dairy farming.

schemeName: SC/ST Pre Matric Scholarship - Uttar Pradesh
briefDescription: The Uttar Pradesh Social Welfare Department offers a Pre Matric Scholarship for Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) students. This scholarship aims to financially assist students from these categories to pursue secondary education and complete their matriculation.

schemeName: OBC Pre Matric Scholarship-Uttar Pradesh
briefDescription: The Uttar Pradesh Social Welfare Department offers a Pre Matric Scholarship for Other Backward Class (OBC) students. This scholarship aims to financially assist students from these categories to pursue secondary education and complete their matriculation.

schemeName: Medical Assistance for the Construction Workers
briefDescription: "Medical Assistance for the Construction Workers" was launched by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Dept, Delhi. The registered workers are given medical assistance upto ₹ 10,000/- in case of being hospitalized for 5 or more days due to an accident or disease.

schemeName: Maintenance Allowance for Persons Affected with Muscular Dystrophy
briefDescription: The 'Maintenance Allowance for Persons Affected with Muscular Dystrophy' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a maintenance allowance to the person affected with muscular dystrophy.

schemeName: Maintenance Allowance to Severely Affected Persons
briefDescription: The 'Maintenance Allowance to Severely Affected Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons. The scheme aims to provide a maintenance allowance to the severely affected persons who cannot be rehabilitated by any other assistance.

schemeName: Funeral Assistance for the Construction Workers
briefDescription: The "Funeral Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides funeral assistance of ₹10,000/- in case of death of a member to their nominees/dependents.

schemeName: Alpasankhyak Post-Maitrik Chhaatravrtti Yojana
briefDescription: The Alpasankhyak Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme under the Madhya Pradesh Government is to provide financial assistance to students from minority communities in Madhya Pradesh pursuing post-secondary education.

schemeName: Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Mandi shramik kalyaan yojana
briefDescription: The Agriculture Department of Rajasthan runs the Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Mandi Shramik Kalyan Yojana, a program that offers a range of assistance programs to improve the well-being of mandi laborers.

schemeName: Readers Allowance to Visually Impaired Persons
briefDescription: 'Readers Allowance to Visually Impaired Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide readers allowance to visually impaired students, specific allowance rates based on the education level.

schemeName: AlCTE - Distinguished Professional Scheme
briefDescription: AICTE-Distinguished Professionals Scheme has been launched by the All India Council for Technical Education, Ministry of Education to improve the quality of Technical Education in India by utilizing the expertise of Professionals, Emeritus professors & Eminent Personalities to share their knowledge.

schemeName: Early Intervention Centre for the Visually Impaired
briefDescription: The "Early Intervention Centre for the Visually Impaired" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, visually impaired children are identified, assessed and prepared to join main stream education in 6 districts.

schemeName: West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Death Assistance
briefDescription: "West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Death Assistance" is a social welfare scheme by the West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Government of West Bengal, that provides an one time assistance to the nominee in case of natural death/accidental death of the migrant worker.

schemeName: West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Repatriation of Dead Body
briefDescription: "West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Repatriation of Dead Body" is a social welfare scheme implemented by the West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Board, that provides an one time assistance to the nominee for bringing the dead body of the registered migrant worker in case of death.

schemeName: West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Cremation
briefDescription: "West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Cremation" is a social welfare scheme by the West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Government of West Bengal, that provides an one time assistance to the nominee of the worker for cremation when the worker dies.

schemeName: Scholarship (Above VIII Standard) - Tamil Nadu
briefDescription: The 'Scholarship (Above VIII Standard) by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide scholarships to differently-abled students studying in government school/colleges/training centre

schemeName: Fitter Training to Hearing Impaired Persons
briefDescription: The scheme "Fitter Training to Hearing Impaired Persons" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to give fitter training to the hearing-impaired candidates at the ITI, Guindy for two years and a stipend of ₹300 per month.

schemeName: Chief Minister’s Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme - Tamil Nadu
briefDescription: Chief Minister Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme launched on 23.07.2009 as kalaingar Kaappittu Thittam. Now the scheme from January 2022 to 2027 is implemented through United India Insurance Company.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Treatment of Chronic Diseases (HBOCWWB)
briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹1,00,000/- is provided to registered workers for indoor treatment of chronic diseases like Cancer, TB, AIDS, etc. as per government rules.

schemeName: Battery Operated Wheelchair by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Department
briefDescription: The 'Battery Operated Wheelchair by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Department' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, battery-operated wheel chairs are given to muscular dystrophy & tetraplegia persons.

schemeName: Loan for the Purchase of Work Tool for the Construction Workers
briefDescription: "Loan for the Purchase of Work Tool for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides an amount not exceeding ₹20,000/- as loan to the members of the fund, for the purchase of work related tools.

schemeName: Bicycle Scheme- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹5,000/- is provided to the workers employed in the industrial and commercial establishments of the state of Haryana for the purchase of a new bicycle for commuting on duty from their residence to the establishments.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Widow/Dependent in case of Death of a Worker- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹2,00,000/- is given to the widow or dependent of the worker working in the industrial and commercial establishments of Haryana state in case of his death due to any reason.

schemeName: Assistance for Delivery of a Child or the Miscarriage of Pregnancy or the Termination of Pregnancy
briefDescription: The scheme "Assistance for Delivery of a Child or the Miscarriage of Pregnancy or the Termination of Pregnancy" was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to give financial assistance for the delivery of a child, miscarriage, or termination of pregnancy

schemeName: West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme 2024: Grant to Industrial Cooperative Society
briefDescription: “Grant to Industrial Cooperative Society” is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme 2024”, by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal. It aims to create, support and sustain an enabling ecosystem for strengthening creativity and capacity of the artisans.

schemeName: Scheme of Financial Assistance for Publication of Manuscripts/Research Journals
briefDescription: The "Scheme of Financial Assistance for Publication of Manuscripts/Research Journals" was launched by the Arts and Culture Department of Puducherry. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for publishing manuscripts/research journals.

schemeName: Scheme for Conservation and Development of Indigenous Cattle and Murrah Development
briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Department of Animal Husbandry & Dairying, Government of Haryana with the objective of encouraging the farmers for conservation and development of the indigenous breeds of cows and buffaloes.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Indigent Tamil Scholars
briefDescription: The scheme "Financial Assistance to Indigent Tamil Scholars" was launched by the Arts & Culture Department, Puducherry. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹1,500 per month to indigent artists aged 58 years & above & contribution to Tamil language & literature must be of significance.

schemeName: Nehru Child Literature Prize
briefDescription: The Arts and Culture Department of Puducherry launched the "Nehru Child Literature Prize" scheme for authors/writers. Financial assistance with a certificate will be provided for their contribution to children's literature books published in Tamil.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Stage III & IV Cancer Patients
briefDescription: The scheme “Financial Assistance for Stage III & IV Cancer Patients” was launched by the Social Justice & Empowerment Department, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, a monthly financial assistance of ₹3,000/- will be provided to Stage III & IV cancer patients of Haryana from 01.01.2024.

schemeName: West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme: Facilitation Supports
briefDescription: “Facilitation Supports” is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme 2024”, implemented by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal. It aims to provide various types of facilitation support to the artisans and Industrial Cooperative Societies.

schemeName: Scheme for Establishment of Hi-Tech and Mini Dairy Units
briefDescription: Under this scheme, unemployed persons will be assisted by way of providing financial assistance in form of subsidy for establishing dairy units of 4, 10, 20 & 50 milch animals like buffaloes, indigenous cows (Hariana, Sahiwal, Belahi, Red Sindhi, Tharparkar and Gir breeds only) and crossbred cows.

schemeName: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities to Scheduled Castes by Establishing Livestock Units
briefDescription: This is a credit-linked scheme with a primary objective of providing self-employment opportunities to Schedule castes, the unemployed persons will be assisted by way of establishing Dairy units, Piggery units, and Sheep/Goat units.

schemeName: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities to Scheduled Castes by Establishing Livestock Units under Mukhya Mantri Antyodaya Parivaar Utthan Yojana
briefDescription: Under the scheme, an unemployed resident of Haryana belonging to the Scheduled Caste category can avail a subsidy for purchasing livestock. This subsidy will be provided after the establishment of the livestock units and can be availed as a loan by the beneficiary.

schemeName: Scheme for Establishment of Backyard Poultry Units
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to improve the socio-economic and nutritional status of the poor families, small farmers and landless agricultural labourers and other economically weaker section of the society.

schemeName: Saksham Scheme for Backward Classes
briefDescription: Under the scheme, loans of up to ₹10,00,000/- are provided to young professionals for setting up Doctors' Clinics, Nursing Homes, Physiotherapy Clinics, Bio-Medical Labs, Lawyers' Offices, Engineering Units, Chemist Shops, Architect Offices, and similar establishments.

schemeName: Financial Assistive Devices for Persons with Disabilities
briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under the scheme, loans of up to ₹5 lakhs are provided to persons with disabilities who are either employed in reputable organizations or have received confirmed appointment letters.

schemeName: Subsidy for Developing Business Premises for Persons with Disabilities
briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under this scheme, loans up to ₹3 lakh are provided to persons with disabilities to develop business premises on their own land & start self-employment activities.

schemeName: Education Loan Scheme- Credit Line 2 for Minority Community
briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam, aims to provide education loans to sections of minority population on the basis of "Creamy Layer". These loans support pursuing general/professional/technical courses at graduate levels or higher.

schemeName: State Award for Teachers
briefDescription: The scheme "State Awards to Teachers" aims to celebrate the unique contribution of the finest teachers in the state and honor those who have improved the quality of school education and enriched students' lives. Ten state awards consisting of ₹100,000 and a citation each are provided to teachers.

schemeName: Comprehensive Educational Loan Scheme - Sikkim
briefDescription: The "Comprehensive Educational Loan Scheme" was launched by the Department of Personnel, and Reforms, Training, Public Grievances, Government of Sikkim. The scheme aims to provide loans free of interest for the duration of one particular course of study with one one-year moratorium period offered...

schemeName: Education Loan for Persons with Disabilities- Haryana
briefDescription: Under this scheme, education loans of up to ₹50 lakhs are provided to persons with disabilities (OH/VH/HH/MR) for pursuing professional and technical education both in India and abroad.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS): Scheme For Reimbursement Of Stamp Duty
