briefDescription: The scheme aims to preserve the traditional concept of singing of duets/duos/trios/quartets/quintets/choral songs which has been on the decline. It provides cash prizes and certificates to singers participating in various traditional singing categories.

schemeName: Production of Tiatr in Villages/Urban Areas/Educational Institutions
briefDescription: The scheme aims to explore and develop hidden singing and acting talents among youths in villages by promoting tiatr activities. It provides financial and technical support to produce tiatr in original format for local communities.

schemeName: Visit to Old/Sick Artistes
briefDescription: The scheme aims to make our younger generation aware of the contribution and sacrifices of Tiatr artistes of yesteryears. TAG has formulated this scheme so that occasional visits to these veteran artistes will make them feel that TAG cares for them during their old age.

schemeName: Lifetime Contribution to Tiatr Awards (Commercial)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize and honor tiatr artistes who have contributed immensely for the development of tiatr, its song and music in the past, addressing the need to acknowledge their lifetime dedication to this traditional art form. The scheme provides a comprehensive recognition package.

schemeName: Right to Education Act 2009 - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free education, textbooks, uniforms, and the benefits of the PM Poshan Yojana to children up to Class 8 in private schools, targeting rural and urban children from weaker and deprived sections of Uttarakhand.

schemeName: State Level Sports Awards - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize players and coaches from Uttarakhand who have achieved remarkable success at the national and international levels in sports by awarding them the Khel Ratna, Himalaya Ratna, and Dronacharya Awards.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Support for Marginalized Individuals for Livelihood and Enterprise (SMILE): Composite Medical Health for Transgender Persons
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide health Insurance coverage to all Transgender persons living in India to improve their health condition through proper treatment including sex re-assignment surgeries as well as medical support. The scheme provides health insurance in the form of Ayushman Bharat Plus.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Information, Monitoring, Evaluation and Social Audit (I-MESA): Project Monitoring Unit (PMU)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to intensely examine the implementation of schemes at the ground level and monitor scheme outputs and outcomes to ensure the quality of services being provided under these schemes. The scheme component provides for physical inspection of every scheme of the Ministry.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: AVYAY - National Action Plan for Senior Citizens: Health and Shelter for Senior Citizens
briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve the quality of life of Senior Citizens, particularly those who are indigent, by providing basic amenities like shelter, food, medical care and entertainment opportunities. The scheme provides financial assistance for projects such as maintenance of Senior Citizen Homes.

schemeName: Samriddhi – Scheme for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe Students for Setting Start-Ups
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide opportunities for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe students to design, launch, and run their own business or startup after formal education is completed or during their final year of education. The scheme provides a limited one-time financial assistance of ₹20,00,000/-.

schemeName: Assistance for Completely Damaged/Destroyed Houses
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to individuals whose residential houses have been completely or partially damaged due to natural disasters in Uttarakhand. Under this scheme, compensation is provided to disaster-affected families to support them in rebuilding or repairing their homes.

schemeName: Akhil Bhartiya Veda Sammelan and Akhil Bhartiya Jyotish Vastu Sammelan
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a platform for scholars engaged in the study, teaching, propagation, and research of Vedas, Astrology, and Vastu Shastra to participate in the conference.

schemeName: CM-Vashistha Guru Puraskar
briefDescription: The scheme aims to celebrate the unique contribution of some of the finest teachers in the state and to honour those teachers who through their commitment and industry have not only improved the quality of school education but also enriched the lives of their students.

schemeName: Young Achievers Awards
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize young talented artistes who have contributed and continue to work for the development of tiatr, its song and music, and have enriched Konkani Tiatr and Song through All India Radio, Doordarshan and other platforms at national and international levels.

schemeName: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Medical Treatment
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to aged and needy Goan artists and their dependent family members for medical treatment expenses. It covers major or minor surgical treatment costs in local or outstation hospitals, including travelling and accommodation expenses.

schemeName: Vidhyadeep Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide accidental insurance cover to students studying in all Primary, Secondary, and Higher Secondary schools across Gujarat State. It offers financial assistance up to ₹50,000/- in case of accidental death or permanent disability to the student's parent or successor.

schemeName: Kisan-Vaigyanik Sangoshthi
briefDescription: The scheme aims to guide farmers and youth in biotechnology-based farming and animal husbandry by providing technical training and solutions to enhance self-employment and income generation.

schemeName: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Incentive for Self Employment
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance not exceeding ₹50,000/- or the actual cost, whichever is less, to needy Goan artists or their families for setting up self-employment ventures, helping them establish sustainable income sources. The applications for this scheme are accepted Offline.

schemeName: Organization of Various Conclaves and Felicitations to Encourage Women, Women Scientists, Teachers and Young Students
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote and enhance scientific attitude and skill development of women, women scientists, teachers, and young students of the state by organizing conclaves and felicitating them.

schemeName: USERC Establishment and Operation of Entrepreneurship Development Centers
briefDescription: The scheme aims to establish and operate Entrepreneurship Development Centers to provide structured training in entrepreneurship to students, women, and the general public of Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Compensation for Livestock Loss Caused by Wild Animals
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial relief to livestock owners for losses due to wild animal attacks.

schemeName: S.T. Bus Pass Fee Concession Scheme For Government/ Non Government Primary, Secondary & Higher Secondary and Higher Technical Education Students
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide concession in bus fare fees to the students studying in Primary, Secondary, Higher Secondary, and Higher Secondary Technical Education in Government and Non-Government schools. The scheme is implemented by the Gujarat State Road Transport Corporation (GSRTC).

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Dairy Plus Programme (Provision of 02 Murrah Buffaloes on Subsidy)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase milk production and promote improved livestock breeding by providing two Murrah buffaloes to eligible farmers on a subsidy basis.

schemeName: Bal Shakti Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to reduce severe malnutrition and child mortality by providing free institutional care, diet, and medical treatment to severely malnourished children below 5 years of age.

schemeName: Goa State Logistics and Warehousing Incentives Scheme: Subsidy towards Investment of Fixed Capital
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for developing the logistics and warehousing industry in Goa. It offers a capital subsidy of 10% or 15% (up to ₹50,00,000/- yearly) towards fixed asset investment for eligible logistics and warehousing entities.

schemeName: Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar Kamdhenu Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide business opportunities in the dairy sector especially to unemployed youths, increase milk production, strengthen economic condition and farmers will get economic benefits even in adverse circumstances.

schemeName: Solar Based Hydroponic System
briefDescription: The system aims to develop and promote an innovative solar-based hydroponic system that integrates solar energy with modern greenhouse technology and mobile application support.

schemeName: Grant of Subsidy for Purchase of 'Electric Vehicles' to Consumers in State of Goa
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance in the form of a subsidy for the purchase or conversion of Electric two-wheelers, three-wheelers, and four-wheelers, along with scrapping incentives for old vehicles, incentives for local manufacturing in Goa, and low-cost loans provided by CESL.

schemeName: Goa State Logistics and Warehousing Incentives Scheme: Subsidy towards Upgradation in Logistics Management Software
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance operational efficiency in logistics and warehousing by subsidizing the cost of purchasing and installing Logistics Management Software. Eligible entities can receive a one-time reimbursement of 50% of the expenditure, capped at ₹2,00,000/- per installation.

schemeName: Flower Development (Demonstration)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote flower cultivation through demonstrations of major flowers like rose, tuberose, and marigold by providing financial assistance to farmers.

schemeName: Skill Development Programme- Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the employability and entrepreneurial skills of students, researchers, and farmers in the field of biotechnology, thereby promoting self-employment and entrepreneurship in emerging areas of the biotechnology sector.

schemeName: Weather Based Crop Insurance Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide crop insurance protection to farmers against weather-related risks under the Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana. It ensures financial support to farmers affected by adverse weather conditions.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Majadoor Suraksha Yojana
briefDescription: Mukhyamantri Majdur Suraksha Yojana provides registered rural and agriculture-based labourers in Madhya Pradesh with maternity assistance, scholarships for children, insurance cover and wage-loss compensation. Ensures social security for unorganised workers’ families.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Shaurya Medal Recipients by the Government of Madhya Pradesh
briefDescription: The scheme aims to honor and support Shaurya Medal recipients by providing financial aid and recognition for their bravery and distinguished service.

schemeName: Monthly Pension for the Maintenance of the Parents of the Martyred Soldier of the Army
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹10,000 per month to the dependent parents of martyred soldiers for their maintenance and livelihood.

schemeName: Kishor Swasthya Paramarsh Clinic - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: This initiative aims to promote the physical, mental, and emotional well-being of adolescents aged 10 to 19 years by providing free health counselling and guidance.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Information-Monitoring, Evaluation, and Social Audit (I-MESA): Social Audit
briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure transparency and accountability in the implementation of schemes. It provides a process for accumulating and analyzing beneficiary feedback for scheme improvement, ensuring people's participation, and offering a platform for timely grievance redressal for right holders.

schemeName: Hemoglobinopathy - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide comprehensive care, support, and treatment to patients suffering from Thalassemia and Hemophilia in Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Annapurna Scheme: Seed Multiplication Programme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the economic status and productivity of SC/ST farmers by providing high-quality Breeder or Certified I grade seeds for seed production. Beneficiaries receive a 75% subsidy on the cost of the seed for up to 1 hectare of land.

schemeName: Scheme for Promotion of Protected Cultivation of Commercial Horticultural Crops
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the protected cultivation of commercial horticultural crops by providing financial assistance to farmers. The scheme supports greenhouse, shade net, low tunnel, plastic mulching, bird/hail net, and cultivation of vegetables and flowers under polyhouse/shade net house.

schemeName: Own Transformer Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide permanent irrigation pump connections to farmers quickly by allowing them to install their own transformers.

schemeName: Police Internship Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to familiarize meritorious students with police functioning and promote research in law enforcement by providing selected students a six-week internship in district police stations under official supervision.

schemeName: Integrated Vegetable Development Program
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase vegetable production in all district headquarters and within a 20 km radius of industrial establishments in Madhya Pradesh through integrated vegetable development.

schemeName: Awas Sahayta Yojana for 100% Hearing and Visually Impaired Disabled Students in Special Trades of Industrial Training Institutes
briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure qualitative admission and enable 100% hearing and visually impaired students to obtain high-quality technical education free from economic constraints. It provides housing assistance and expenses for food and accommodation, up to ₹4,000/- to PwD Students.

schemeName: Gomantak Govsamvardhan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the conservation and rearing of Local Breeds of Cattle in the State of Goa. It provides financial assistance of ₹80/- per animal per day to Dairy Farmers or Individuals who are bonafide residents of Goa to encourage responsible stall feeding and conservation practices.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Gramin Street Vendor Rin Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide working capital or low-cost equipment as a loan through banks to support businesses. It benefits poor-class migrant workers and small traders (Street Vendors) in rural areas of Madhya Pradesh, also offering necessary Entrepreneurship Development Programme (EDP) training.

schemeName: State Award To Two Anganwadi Workers Under Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS) Schemes
briefDescription: The scheme recognizes Anganwadi Workers under the Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS) Schemes for their exemplary performance in improving the quality and coverage of services provided to children and mothers. Each awardee receives a cash award of ₹5,000/- and a citation.

schemeName: Simplification of Sale Process of Herbal Products - Herbal Research and Development Institute, Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to simplify the sale process of medicinal and aromatic products produced by cultivators, enabling them to legally and easily sell their produce through authorized markets or buyers.

schemeName: Interest Free Loan Scheme To Teachers For The Purchase Of Laptops
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the quality of teaching in schools in the State of Goa by equipping teachers with necessary Information Technology knowledge and skills. It offers an Interest Free Loan up to a maximum of ₹1,00,000/- for purchasing a Laptop to regular/permanent, full-time teachers.

schemeName: National Bio Energy Programme - Uttarakhand Renewable Energy Development Agency
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the use of biogas as a clean and renewable energy source, help livestock farmers set up biogas plants, reduce the use of conventional fuels, and support eco-friendly rural development in the state.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Saur Swarojgar Yojana - Uttarakhand Renewable Energy Development Agency
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among the residents of Uttarakhand by enabling them to establish and operate solar power projects, thereby generating clean energy, providing a sustainable source of income, and encouraging entrepreneurship.

schemeName: Chief Minister’s Award for Excellence in Public Administration
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize and reward innovative and extraordinary work done by a team of officials to encourage good governance, high standards of services, and replication of best practices. It recognizes outstanding and exemplary performance by a team of officials with a scroll and cash award.

schemeName: Cultivation of Aromatic Plants under MGNREGA - Centre for Aromatic Plants
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage farmers in rural areas to grow aromatic plants by providing them free planting material, technical help, and wage support through MGNREGA.

schemeName: Grid Connected Rooftop Scheme (Phase-II) - Uttarakhand Renewable Energy Development Agency
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the installation of rooftop solar systems among domestic households, group housing societies, and residential welfare associations in Uttarakhand, enabling consumers to reduce their electricity bills, earn income by feeding surplus power into the grid.

schemeName: Pre-Matric & Post-Matric Scholarship
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide stipend and financial assistance to students belonging to the Tea Tribes and Adivasi community. The benefits include financial assistance and stipends for poor students from Class 9th up to normal Three Years Degree Courses (e.g. Bachelor of Arts, Bachelor of Science, etc.

schemeName: Interest Subsidy Scheme, 2017
briefDescription: The scheme aims to incentivize units for making their enterprises financially viable. It provides interest subsidy on term loan and/or working capital loan (up to ₹25,00,000/- per year, or ₹27,50,000/- for women/Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe applicants) to eligible industries.

schemeName: Incentives to Green Investment Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to incentivize investments by existing and new units in environmentally friendly initiatives. It provides financial support through reimbursement for Water and Energy Audits and Capital Reimbursement for Energy Conservation Equipment to eligible manufacturing units.

schemeName: Shooting Permission Certificate
briefDescription: The scheme aims to simplify the process of granting official permission for film shooting in Uttarakhand through a single-window online system, ensuring timely approvals and promoting the state as a film-friendly destination.

schemeName: Bee Keeping
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote beekeeping as a sustainable livelihood by providing subsidized bee boxes, bee colonies, and training support to farmers, thereby increasing honey production, enhancing farm income, and strengthening the beekeeping sector in Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Scheme for Giving Stipend to the Trainees Belonging to the Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe Community Enrolled under Various Labour Welfare Centres in the State of Goa
briefDescription: The scheme aims to give benefits under the Scheduled Caste Sub-Plan and Tribal Sub-Plan to Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe trainees enrolled under various Labour Welfare Centres in the State of Goa. Eligible trainees receive a monthly stipend of ₹1,000/- to support their training in crafts.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Higher Studies
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for students belonging to the Tea Tribes and Adivasi community. This assistance supports students pursuing higher education like MBBS, MBA, and Engineering, including studies within and outside the State or Country.

schemeName: Coaching For Higher Studies
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide coaching to students of Tea Tribes and Adivasi community for preparing them for various competitive examinations like Civil Services, Medical, Engineering, Staff Selection Committee (Graduate level), Banking (Probationary Officers), etc.

schemeName: Scheme for Purchase of Mobile Sales Van
briefDescription: The scheme aims to financially assist the Khadi & Village Industries (KVI) Institutions for the purchase of new mobile sales vans for stocking display sales of KVI products and also to, transport of raw materials for producing KVI Products. The applications for this scheme are accepted online.

schemeName: Scheme For Women Entrepreneurs Mahila Udyam Nidhi (MUN)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to meet the equity gap for new Small Scale Industrial units and service activities promoted by women entrepreneurs. It offers Term Loans and Seed Capital for projects costing up to ₹10,00,000/-.

schemeName: Single Window Scheme (PIPDIC)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide term loan for fixed assets and loan for working capital through the same agency the total working capital requirement of such units inclusive of all fund based facilities may be taken into account for determining the working capital facility eligible for finance.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Launderers and Barbers
briefDescription: The scheme aims to extend financial assistance to the Launderers and barbers for the purchase of worktables & furniture, etc. The applications for this scheme are accepted online through the PIPDIC portal.

schemeName: The Goa Archaeological Research Fellowship Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage scholars to undertake research activities in the field of Archaeology of Goa and West Coast based on primary archaeological sources. It offers financial fellowship assistance of up to ₹40,000/- per month to eligible Post-Graduate or PhD scholars for 24 months.

schemeName: Atithi Uttarakhand Home-Stay Registration
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote rural tourism and generate local employment by enabling residents to register their homes as certified home-stays that offer safe, affordable accommodation and meal facilities to tourists in Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Awaas Yojana - Gramin, Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide pucca houses with basic amenities to eligible rural households in Uttarakhand, ensuring dignified living conditions for economically and socially disadvantaged families.

schemeName: License for Repairers of Weights-Measures and Weighing Instruments
briefDescription: Under this scheme, a government-approved license is issued to repairers of weights and measuring instruments, enabling them to repair such instruments used by traders as a means of self-employment and to ensure their livelihood.

schemeName: Free Pre-Recruitment Training
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide 8 weeks of free pre-recruitment training for recruitment into the Military, Paramilitary, and Police Forces to sons of ex-servicemen aged between 16 and 21 years who have passed high school with at least 45% marks.

schemeName: Scheduled Tribe/Scheduled Caste Subplan
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote fish farming as a sustainable livelihood opportunity among individuals and groups belonging to the Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes.

schemeName: Free Shoe and Bag Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from Classes 1 to 8 studying in all government & government-aided schools for purchasing shoes & bags. An amount of ₹318/- per student for Classes 1 to 5 & ₹462/- per student for Classes 6 to 8 is provided through Direct Benefit Transfer.

schemeName: RIMC Scholarship (Military Scholarship)
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹1,000/- per month to students from Uttarakhand who are pursuing their education at the Rashtriya Indian Military College (RIMC).

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Youth Groups
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-employment & entrepreneurship among rural youth by providing financial support. Financial assistance is provided to Mangal Dals affiliated with the department to help them start employment-oriented projects in 18 identified business sectors.

schemeName: Farmer Pension Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support to elderly farmers residing in the state of Uttarakhand. Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹1200/- is provided to farmers who are above 60 years of age, own up to 2 hectares of land, and cultivate their own land.

schemeName: Dr. Y.V. Singh Award for Best Thesis in Vegetable Science
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize and encourage students for their outstanding research work in the field of Vegetable Science. Under this, a cash award of ₹20,000/- is provided annually to the selected students.

schemeName: Asian Agri-History Foundation Research Fellowship (M.Sc. Agriculture - All Disciplines)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support to meritorious students pursuing an M.Sc. in Agriculture across all disciplines by awarding a monthly fellowship of ₹1,200/- for one year.

schemeName: Sugarcane Seed Replacement Programme / Production Enhancement Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase sugarcane productivity & improve sugar recovery by promoting cultivation of high-quality, high-yielding, & newly developed sugarcane varieties, while providing farmers with financial support, modern cultivation techniques, & access to advanced agricultural technology.

schemeName: Scheme for Providing Soft Skill Training Courses to Students Studying in State Colleges
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the soft skills of students studying in state colleges of Uttarakhand by providing training through Mahindra Pride Classroom and the Nandi Foundation.

schemeName: Operation of River Rafting / Kayaking Activities
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote safe & regulated adventure tourism in the state by allowing licensed rafting companies to operate & issuing certifications to qualified river guides. Under this scheme, rafting companies are granted permission to operate, and licenses are issued to qualified river guides.

schemeName: Sthaniya Fasal Protsahan Karyakram
briefDescription: The program aims to promote the cultivation of local crops, enhance productivity, ensure the use of quality seeds, and provide fair prices to farmers in the mountain districts of Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Gargi Sanskrit Balika Chhaatravrtti Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage and motivate girl students studying in Classes 6 to 12 at Sanskrit schools in the state by providing financial scholarships to support their education.

schemeName: State Level Awards for Divyang Persons
briefDescription: Under this scheme, a cash prize of ₹8,000/-, along with a medal and a certificate of appreciation, is awarded to outstanding individuals in categories such as disabled employees, outstanding sportspersons, and best self-employed service providers.

schemeName: Animal Husbandry: Assistance to Small and Marginal Farmers
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to small and marginal farmers for the replacement of productive livestock lost due to notified natural disasters such as floods, landslides, or other calamities.

schemeName: Medical Check-Up facility (UKBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide medical check-up facilities to registered construction workers through door-to-door visits, health camps, and collection centers.

schemeName: Ex-Gratia Payment for Life-Threatening Injury Requiring Hospital Stay for Treatment
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to individuals who sustain life-threatening injuries due to disasters and require hospitalization for treatment.

schemeName: Financial Assistance/Pension to Former Renowned Sportspersons
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide lifelong monthly financial assistance ranging from ₹4,000/- to ₹10,000/- in the form of a pension to former renowned sportspersons of Uttarakhand who are above 50 years of age and are financially weak.

schemeName: State Government Health Scheme (Golden Card)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide quality healthcare facilities to all government employees, pensioners, and their dependents in Uttarakhand. Under this scheme, prescribed medical treatment is provided free of cost.

schemeName: Discount Scheme on Sale of Khadi Garments
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the use and sale of Khadi garments by providing a 10% discount to consumers on purchases made at Khadi production and sales centres registered with the Khadi and Village Industries Commission (KVIC).

schemeName: Bhed Palan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote sheep rearing as a source of self-employment and livelihood generation for eligible beneficiaries, particularly from SECC categories, by providing financial support for rearing a sheep unit.

schemeName: Mushroom Production
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote and support mushroom cultivation in the state by providing financial assistance and subsidies for establishing mushroom, compost, and spawn production units, thereby enhancing both farmer income and overall mushroom production in Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Sanitary Napkin Scheme (UKBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free sanitary napkins to the daughters of registered construction workers and to women construction workers, in order to promote health and hygiene.

schemeName: Dr. K.C. Sharma Fellowship (M.Sc. Agriculture, Agronomy (Second Year) Students)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to meritorious students pursuing an M.Sc. in Agriculture (Agronomy) who are in their second year of study, by awarding them a monthly fellowship of ₹1000/- for one year.

schemeName: Animal Husbandry: Assistance to Small and Marginal Farmers
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to small and marginal farmers for the replacement of productive livestock lost due to notified natural disasters such as floods, landslides, or other calamities.

schemeName: Toolkit Assistance (UKBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide registered construction workers with a toolkit, including hand gloves and other construction-related tools, worth up to ₹10,000/-.

schemeName: Stamp Duty Exemption for Property Registration
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial relief during property registration by offering exemptions or rebates in stamp duty to specific sections of society.

schemeName: Mushroom Production
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote and support mushroom cultivation in the state by providing financial assistance and subsidies for establishing mushroom, compost, and spawn production units, thereby enhancing both farmer income and overall mushroom production in Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Scheme for Fencing in Gardens
briefDescription: The scheme aims to protect fruit plants, horticultural crops, and orchards from wild animals by providing financial assistance for fencing.

schemeName: Scheme for Development Maintenance and Construction of Roads
briefDescription: The "Development Maintenance and Construction of Roads" was launched by the Pondicherry Industrial Promotion Development and Investment Corporation Limited (PIPDIC), Department of Industries & Commerce. The scheme aims to assist SSI units for the Development & Maintenance and Construction of Roads.

schemeName: Technology Upgradation Fund Scheme
briefDescription: The "Technology Upgradation Fund Scheme" aims to assist the Existing/New Proprietary/Partnership Concerns and Private/Public Limited Companies with or without expansion, for modernization engaged in textile, as prescribed by SIDBI. The applications for this scheme are accepted online only.

schemeName: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Resources in Tribal Areas: Fish Cage Culture - Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase fish production and provide employment through reservoir-based inland fisheries. It offers financial assistance to Scheduled Tribe fishermen.

schemeName: Merit Loan Scheme for Good Borrowers
briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist the units of PIPDIC whose loan accounts are classified as Standard Assets continuously for 3 years. The assistance is provided for construction of additional building, purchase of additional machineries & equipments essential for expansion /modernisation / diversification.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Sampoorna Pushti Yojana: Nutrition for Severely Underweight and Moderately Acute Malnourished Children (3 years - 6 years)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve child nutrition outcomes, with a specific focus on providing nutritional support to Severely Underweight (SUW) and Moderately Acute Malnourished (MAM) children aged between 3 years and 6 years.

schemeName: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Resources in Tribal Areas: Fish Seed Rearing by Women - Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase fish production through inland fisheries and provide employment opportunities, particularly to Scheduled Tribe women engaged in fish seed rearing.

schemeName: Capital Investment Subsidy to Establish a New Deluxe/Three Star or Higher Category New Hotel and Resort
briefDescription: The scheme provides a capital investment subsidy of 15% on fixed capital investment, subject to a maximum ceiling of ₹5,00,00,000/-. The applicant must invest a minimum of ₹10,00,00,000/- in capital expenditure and ensure the establishment of at least 50 lettable air-conditioned rooms.

schemeName: Capital Investment Subsidy for Establishment of New Resort and Wellness Centre
briefDescription: The scheme provides a capital investment subsidy of 15% against fixed capital investment, subject to a maximum ceiling of ₹50,00,000/-. The applicant must invest a minimum capital expenditure of ₹2,00,00,000/- and ensure the availability of a minimum of air-conditioned lettable rooms.

schemeName: Capital Subsidy for Heritage Hotel under Proprietorship
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage the establishment of heritage hotels through private investment by providing financial assistance to proprietors. The scheme provides a capital subsidy of 15% on fixed capital investment, subject to a maximum ceiling of ₹2,00,00,000/-. The applicants must be proprietors.

schemeName: Assistance to OBM Boat Owner Fishermen on Purchase of Kerosene/Petrol
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to fishermen owning small boats with Outboard Motors (OBM) by subsidizing the cost of kerosene or petrol.

schemeName: Maharishi Balmiki Chatravriti Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme “Maharishi Balmiki Chatravriti Yojana” by the Dept. of Education, Govt. of Himachal Pradesh is a Scholarship Scheme for female students belonging to the Balmiki family. The beneficiary receives ₹ 18,000 per annum for college-level studies and professional courses.

schemeName: Mukhiya Mantri Protsahan Yojna
briefDescription: The scheme “Mukhiya Mantri Protsahan Yojna” was launched by Dept. of Higher Education, H.P. during the year 2013-14. Under the scheme, an Incentive/Award will be given to students of the State who are selected and take admission for a degree course in any IIT/AIIMS/IIM/ISM Dhanbad/IISc Bangalore.

schemeName: Sainik School Sujanpur Tihra Scholarship Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme “Sainik School Sujanpur Tihra Scholarship Scheme” was started by the Department of Education, Himachal Pradesh. Under the scheme, scholarship is given to the students of Himachal Pradesh who are studying in Sainik School Sujanpur Tihra.

schemeName: Capital Subsidy for Establishment of Sea Plane, Amphibian Tourist Vehicle and Aero Sports and Aero Sports Training Centre/Academy
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage private investment in niche adventure tourism sectors such as sea planes, amphibian vehicles, and aero sports academies in Madhya Pradesh. It provides eligible investors with a 25% capital subsidy on fixed capital investment, up to ₹10,00,00,000/-.

schemeName: Capital Investment Subsidy For Expansion Of Established Star/Deluxe/Standard Hotel/Resort/Heritage Hotel
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage the expansion of existing tourism accommodation units by incentivizing private investment in the state. The scheme provides a capital investment subsidy of 15% against the fixed capital investment, subject to a maximum ceiling of ₹5,00,00,000/-.

schemeName: Installation of Ropeway Infrastructure for Transport in Inaccessible Tourist Places or Forest Areas
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance connectivity in inaccessible tourist and forest areas by installing ropeways. It provides a Capital Investment Subsidy of 40% up to ₹5,00,00,000/- to private investors establishing ropeway infrastructure with a minimum investment of ₹1,00,00,000/-.

schemeName: Special Incentives for Wildlife Resorts
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage the establishment of wildlife resorts within the boundaries of notified National Parks, Tiger Reserves, and Sanctuaries in the state to promote balanced and sustainable tourism. The scheme provides a capital subsidy of 20% on the fixed capital investment.

schemeName: Modular Employable Skills
briefDescription: The SDIS is a government initiative for improving employability through vocational training. It's a partnership between government and industry to provide skills development programs for early school dropouts and workers in unorganized sector.

schemeName: Indira Gandhi Utkrisht Chattervriti Yojana
briefDescription: A merit-based scholarship scheme of ₹18,000 per annum by the Department of Higher Education, Government of Himachal Pradesh will be awarded to 10 toppers each from Class 12 (Arts, Science, and Commerce) and from the merit list of B.A., B.Sc. and B.Com

schemeName: State Technical Scholarship for ST Student
briefDescription: The financial assistance is provided to students of Scheduled Tribe Communities who are pursuing Diploma/ Degree/Post Graduated/course in Engineering Institutes recognized by All India Council for Technical Education and, also provided to students who are pursuing UG or PG in Forestry courses.

schemeName: Free Studentship
briefDescription: The "Free Studentship" initiative, administered by the Directorate of Higher & Technical Education, Meghalaya, is a state-sponsored program aimed at providing financial assistance to students belonging to the SC/ST/OBC categories for their tuition fees and other fee according to prescribed rates.

schemeName: Odisha Sahaya Scheme - Pre & Post Matric Scholarship
briefDescription: The Social Security and Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities (SSEPD) Department, Government of Odisha, recognises that beggars are valuable human resources for society and seeks to create an environment that provides them equal opportunities.

schemeName: Scholarship For Differently Abled Students
briefDescription: The scheme “Scholarship for Differently Abled Students” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

schemeName: Pathani Samanta Mathematics Talent (Class - 11 To 12)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to the meritorious Higher Secondary School Students of Odisha having proficiency in Mathematics.

schemeName: Vidyakiranam Scheme-Educational Assistance To Children Of Disabled Parents
briefDescription: The scheme “Vidyakiranam Scheme-Educational Assistance to Children of Disabled Parents” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

schemeName: Junior Merit (Class - 11 To 12)
briefDescription: The Department of School & Mass Education, Government of Odisha is awarding "Junior Merit Scholarship" under the Scheme 'e-medhabruti’ to provide financial assistance to the meritorious Higher Secondary School students of Odisha from families whose parental income does not exceed 6.00 lakhs.

schemeName: Vikramaditya Yojna
briefDescription: The Department of Higher Education, Government of Madhya Pradesh has created this new scholarship scheme available for candidates belonging to the General categories.

schemeName: Varnam Scheme For Transgender Students Pursuing Distance Education Courses
briefDescription: The scheme “Varnam Scheme for Transgender Students Pursuing Distance Education Courses” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala to provide financial assistance to Transgender students pursuing Degree/Diploma/ PG courses through distance education.

schemeName: Shikshashree Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme "Shikshashree Scheme” was implemented by the Government of West Bengal during the year 2014-15  by merging the existing schemes of Book Grants & Maintenance Grants to provide financial assistance to Schedule Caste students studying in classes V to VIII.

schemeName: Aamar Dukan On Wheels
briefDescription: The Assam Government proposes to introduce a new module of “Aamar Dukan” namely “AAMAR DUKAN ON WHEELS” in the same line as the existing ‘Aamar Dukan’ on 22.02.2017.

schemeName: Post Matric Merit Scholarship
briefDescription: The objective of the Scheme is to provide financial assistance to permanent residents of Mizoram States securing 60% marks in Board/University Examination. The scheme is 100% funded by the State Plan Fund.

schemeName: Scheme for Grant of Additional Scholarship to the Students Belonging to Scheduled Tribes of Andaman and Nicobar Islands for Pursuing Higher Studies Anywhere in India Post-Senior Secondary Courses (Post 10+2 Courses)
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide additional financial assistance (scholarship) to the ST students pursuing higher education after Senior Secondary i.e. 12th Standard in the Colleges/Universities anywhere in India, as an incentive to supplement the cost of their education.

schemeName: Haryana Post Matric Scholarship For Minority
briefDescription: Launched in June 2006 under the Prime Minister's New 15 Point Programme for the Welfare of Minorities, the "Post-Matric Scholarship for Students Belonging to the Minority Communities" by the Ministry of Minority Affairs, Government of India, aims to provide better opportunities for higher education.

schemeName: Education Loan Scheme - Delhi
briefDescription: "Education Loan Scheme" provides financial assistance to the SC/ST/OBC/PwD students for pursuing professional and technical education in India and abroad, with loan limits of ₹7,50,000/- and ₹15,00,000/- respectively. Delhi residents with an annual family income below ₹5,00,000/- are eligible.

schemeName: Higher Education And Skill Development Guarantee Scheme
briefDescription: The Higher Education and Skill Development Guarantee Scheme Government of NCT of Delhi , has envisaged a Higher Education and Skill Development Guarantee Scheme for students who wish to pursue diploma or degree level courses or specified skill development courses in Delhi.

schemeName: Scholarship/Merit scholarship to OBC/MIN/SC/ST students from Class I to XII
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from SC/ST/OBC/Minority communities studying in classes I to XII in government or recognised schools in Delhi. The scheme offers varying scholarship amounts based on class and academic performance, ensuring support for education.

schemeName: UGC-BSR Faculty Fellowship Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to strengthen basic science research by allowing talented professors nearing superannuation to continue research and mentor Ph.D. students. It provides a monthly fellowship and an annual research grant for 3 years.

schemeName: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to award scholarships to meritorious students of economically weaker sections to arrest their drop out at class VIII and encourage them to continue their education at secondary stage.

schemeName: National Handloom Development Programme (NHDP): Scholarship Component
briefDescription: The scheme targets the children of these weavers, offering financial assistance of up to ₹2,00,000/- annually. This support covers tuition, admission, and examination fees at recognised textile institutions. Additionally, beneficiaries receive a monthly stipend of ₹5,000/-.

schemeName: Madhya Pradesh Kalakar Evam Sahityakar Kalyan Kosh Niyam- Disability Assistance
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide one-time financial assistance to physically disabled artists and litterateurs for disability-related medical treatment and rehabilitation.

schemeName: Gallantry Medal – PMG/GM
briefDescription: The scheme aims to honour exceptional and conspicuous acts of gallantry. Through this scheme, medals, a Presidential scroll, and monthly monetary allowances are provided to eligible service personnel.

schemeName: Rules Related to Madhya Pradesh State Disease Assistance Fund
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance ranging from ₹25,000 to ₹2,00,000 to Below Poverty Line (BPL) patients for major surgeries and treatments related to specified serious diseases.

schemeName: Skill Development and Training of Candidates in Technical Textiles
briefDescription: The scheme aims to train skilled professionals for the technical textiles industry, develop transferable skills, create a strong knowledge ecosystem, integrate trained individuals into various roles, and promote continuous learning and innovation.

schemeName: The CM IT Fellowship Program
briefDescription: The scheme aims to empower young professionals with technical expertise to address state-level governance challenges through technology. It offers a 2-year M.Tech program in DSAI, hands-on government project experience, and a monthly stipend of ₹50,000/- to eligible youth of Chhattisgarh.

schemeName: Meghalaya Agriculture Warehouse Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme reduces post-harvest losses and supports farmers by providing loans and subsidies to build small, weatherproof warehouses for safe storage and better marketing of crops.

schemeName: Chief Minister's Meghalaya Homestay Mission Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote and upgrade homestays across the state. It seeks to strengthen tourism infrastructure and create sustainable livelihood opportunities while enhancing Meghalaya’s eco-tourism potential.

schemeName: Swachh Bharat Mission – Grameen PHASE I
briefDescription: The scheme aims to eliminate open defecation and improve rural sanitation by supporting toilet construction and promoting usage among poor and marginalized rural households.

schemeName: Social Security Pension Scheme
briefDescription: Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹500/- is provided to Below Poverty Line (BPL) Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) and dwarf individuals to support them in living a respectful life.

schemeName: Providing Latest Technology to Group of Pottery Artisans (Energy Efficient Kiln)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide latest technology and equipment to pottery artisans for better productivity, improved quality and reduce health risks. It provides 100% financial assistance for energy-efficient kilns to groups of registered clay artisans and potters in Gujarat state.

schemeName: Handloom Rebate Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme provides 10% special rebate for 120 festival days; Additional 5-15% permanent rebates for regular sales; Enhanced 20% rebates for women-led cooperatives. The scheme aims to enhance market competitiveness for Gujarat's handloom cooperatives and apex societies.

schemeName: FOCUS Scheme (Farmers Collectivization For Upscaling Production and Marketing System)
briefDescription: The objective of the FOCUS Scheme is to strengthen farmer groups, increase production, and improve market access to enhance farmers’ income.

schemeName: Chief Minister's Scholarship Scheme
briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial support is provided to students from Class XI to Ph.D. level. It offers a fixed annual scholarship of ₹6,000 for post-matric studies, which is paid directly into the students’ bank accounts. This scholarship is often provided in addition to other scholarships.

schemeName: Meghalaya Any Business Venture Scheme
briefDescription: The Meghalaya Any Business Ventures Scheme, part of the Chief Minister’s CM-ELEVATE Program, provides financial support to 50 entrepreneurs across the state to start their own businesses.

schemeName: Micro Credit Finance under NSKFDC- Haryana
briefDescription: Under this scheme, loan is provided to Safai Karamchari and their dependents for projects with a maximum cost up to ₹1,00,000/- per beneficiaries for small and petty trade/business and various income generating activities.

schemeName: Construction of Water Storage Tanks for Drip Irrigation
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers across Gujarat for constructing water storage tanks to support drip irrigation, with cost-sharing benefits based on farmer category.

schemeName: Assistance to Farmers in Purchasing Nano Fertilizers Under the Agricultural Assistance Program for Farmers Other than Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes
briefDescription: This scheme offers financial assistance to farmers from non-SC/ST categories to support the purchase of Nano Fertilizers, aiming to enhance agricultural productivity and uplift the standard of living of farmers in Gujarat.

schemeName: Gargi Puruskar Yojana
briefDescription: The benefit of Gargi Puraskar Yojana is given every year to the beneficiary girl child of Rajasthan on the day of Basant Panchami. This time also the beneficiary girl students were taken on a tour of the girl students on the occasion of Basant Panchami very year.

schemeName: Scholarship for Ph.D. Students of Socially and Educationally Backward Classes
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Socially and Educationally Backward Classes (SEBC) students pursuing M.Phil. or Ph.D. to encourage higher education and research.

schemeName: Swayam Saksham Yojana (GTKVN)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote economic self-reliance among professionally educated unemployed youth from Thakor & Koli communities, aged between 18 & 35 years, who hold degrees in fields such as Pharmacy, Software/Hardware, Automobile Engineering, Law, Chartered Accountancy, & others.

schemeName: Uniform Assistance for Economically Backward Class Students Studying in Class 1st to 8th
briefDescription: The scheme "Uniform Assistance for Economically Backward Class Students Studying in Class 1st to 8th" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, provides ₹900/- for three pairs of uniforms to students from economically weaker sections in government and aided primary schools.

schemeName: Saraswati Sadhana Yojana to Socially and Educationally Backward Girls studying in Class 9th
briefDescription: Under this scheme, free bicycle assistance is provided to Socially and Educationally Backward class girls studying in Class 9 in government and grant-in-aid schools across Gujarat.

schemeName: Microcredit Finance Scheme- Self Help Groups (DAADC)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-employment for SC individuals. It offers microloans to start small businesses and become economically self-sufficient.

schemeName: Scheduled Caste Sub Plan (SCSP): Electrification of Wells of Scheduled Caste Farmers
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide agricultural electricity connections on a priority basis to Scheduled Caste farmers. Benefits include electrification of wells and free domestic electricity connections for Scheduled Caste farmers and beneficiaries across Gujarat.

schemeName: Loan For Foreign Study (E.B.C.)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support higher education abroad for eligible students from the Educationally Backward Class (EBC). It provides a maximum Foreign Study Loan of ₹15,00,000/- at an annual interest rate of 4% to EBC students.

schemeName: Scholarship Scheme for Students Studying in Government Colleges
briefDescription: Under this scheme, scholarships of ₹3,000, ₹2,000, and ₹1,000 are provided annually to Science, Commerce, and Arts students to promote higher education.

schemeName: Best Book Award
briefDescription: The scheme "Best Book Award" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to promote literary excellence by providing cash awards, certificates, and shields to authors of outstanding books published in Gujarat.

schemeName: Bankable Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to scheduled caste persons for self-employment opportunities. Under this scheme, loans are provided for business, industry, or service activities, along with a subsidy of 50% of the loan amount or a maximum of ₹50,000/-.

schemeName: Scheme for Providing Incentives to Coaches of Athletes who have Won Competitions at the National and International Levels
briefDescription: The scheme aims to honour coaches who have significantly contributed to the success of athletes in the field of sports. Under this scheme, financial incentives are provided to coaches of athletes who have won competitions at national and international levels.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemeName: Technical Internship Programme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide practical technical experience through live projects. Under this programme, a 6-month internship with a stipend of ₹20,000/- per month is offered to eligible engineering students.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Vikaas-Day Care Scheme For Person with Disability Children
briefDescription: Vikaas is a Day care scheme, primarily to expand the range of opportunities available to a person with disability attaining the age of 10 years for enhancing interpersonal and vocational skills as they are on a transition to higher age groups.

schemeName: Pandit Omkarnath Music Competition
briefDescription: The scheme aims to honour the memory of Pandit Omkarnath and promote classical music among young artists by organizing competitive platforms for singing, vocal, and percussion performances. Classical music artists in two age categories can participate.

schemeName: SITARE-Appreciation Grant
briefDescription: SITARE-Appreciation Grant: Residential workshops called as Biotech Innovation Ignition School (BIIS) for undergraduate students are organized to provide hands-on technical training and mentorship for problem identification in 3-4 weeks duration.

schemeName: National Science Chair- Scientific Excellence
briefDescription: The main aim of the scheme is to recognize active eminent senior resident Indian superannuated scientists for their outstanding contributions both nationally and internationally, in the areas of Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics (STEM) & Medicine, to promote excellence and growth in R&D.

schemeName: National Science Chair- Science Leadership
briefDescription: The main aim of the scheme is to recognise active eminent senior resident Indian superannuated scientists for their outstanding contributions both nationally and internationally, in the areas of Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics (STEM) & Medicine, to promote excellence and growth in R&D.

schemeName: Rashtriya Vigyan Puraskar
briefDescription: The objective of the Rashtriya Vigyan Puraskar (RVP) is to recognise the notable and inspiring contribution made by the scientists, technologists and innovators individually or in teams in various fields of science, technology and technology- led innovation.

schemeName: National Awards To Teachers (Higher Education)
briefDescription: The purpose of National Awards to Teachers is to celebrate the unique contribution of some of the finest teachers in the country and to honor those teachers who through their commitment and industry have not only improved the quality of school education but also enriched the lives of their students.

schemeName: Rashtriya Khel Protsahan Puraskar
briefDescription:
This scheme was launched by the Dept. of Sports. There are four categories of awards:
(a)	Identification and nurturing of budding/young talent
(b)	Encouragement to sports through Corporate Social Responsibility
(c)	Employment of sports persons and sports welfare measures
(d)	Sports for Development

schemeName: Jeevan Raksha Padak Series of Awards
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize bravery in saving lives and provide medals, certificates, and financial allowances to deserving individuals.

schemeName: 100% Penalty Mafi Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial relief to beneficiaries of the Gujarat Housing Board and Slum Clearance Cell who have pending installment dues by offering a complete waiver of penalty amounts. It benefits tenants and property allottees by waiving 100% penalties on arrears if paid by 31st March.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Top Class Education For Students With Disabilities
briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by DoEPwDs for Students with Disabilities (SwDs) pursuing studies beyond class 12th admitted in a full-time course in one of the 'notified institutions'.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemeName: National Gopal Ratna Award
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote scientific dairy practices and AI coverage. It provides awards, recognition, and monetary incentives to farmers, dairy organizations, and AI technicians.

schemeName: President’s Medal for Distinguished Service
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize exceptional service, distinguished records, and meritorious contributions in police, security, fire, prison, and civil defence services.

schemeName: National Metallurgist Award
briefDescription: Under this scheme, outstanding metallurgical contributions are recognized, and excellence in operations, R&D, waste management, and energy conservation is promoted.

schemeName: National CSR Awards
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to promote excellence in CSR activities, encourage effective use of CSR funds, and ensure that benefits reach marginalized and remote communities.

schemeName: Sagar Samman Award- Sagar Samman Award for Gallantry
briefDescription: Under this scheme, recognition is provided to Indian seafarers who risk their lives to save others or protect the marine environment.

schemeName: Devnarayan Gurukul Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free residential education to students from Special Backward Classes. Under this scheme, selected students receive free education, accommodation, meals, uniforms, books, and study materials in government-approved schools.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: Coir Udyami Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme "Coir Udyami Yojana" by the Coir Board, Ministry of MSME, Government of India, aims to modernize the coir industry and generate rural employment. It offers credit-linked financial assistance to establish coir units by eligible applicants.

schemeName: A Scheme to Provide Free Tablets to Std.12th Pass Students
briefDescription: Under the scheme, students in the 12th standard belonging to the Scheduled Caste category will receive a tablet by paying a token fee of ₹1,000/-.

schemeName: IELTS & TOEFL Training Assistance
briefDescription: The scheme aims to help tribal students pursue higher studies abroad by offering professional IELTS/TOEFL training. It provides ₹3,10,000/- in training assistance and comprehensive guidance.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide fixed-day assured, comprehensive and quality antenatal care universally to all pregnant women in 2nd and 3rd trimester on the 9th of every month. It offers free comprehensive antenatal care services at government health facilities.

schemeName: Nagaland State Merit Scholarship
briefDescription: The Directorate of Higher Education has launched the Nagaland State Merit Scholarship for the students of classes from 11th to 12th and UG Degree to PG degree so that they will be able to secure their scholarship rights or seats after getting online registration under this scholarship.

schemeName: Indo-French Visiting/Mobility Programme for Women in Science
briefDescription: This programme will encourage women candidates to work with the Indian/French scientific communities with an aim to accelerate their talented instincts towards carrying out advanced studies and research in the frontier areas of Science & Technology.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemeName: Nari Shakti Puraskar - National Award for Women
briefDescription: The award aims to acknowledge the achievements of women & recognize their contributions to society and the nation. The award is conferred annually on individuals in recognition of their exceptional service towards the cause of women’s empowerment, particularly for vulnerable and marginalized women.

schemeName: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Water Augmentation
briefDescription: The scheme "Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Water Augmentation" aims to improve the productivity and quality of coffee by facilitating the creation of infrastructure for water augmentation for irrigation and wet processing of coffee.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: ICAR - Post Matric Scholarship for Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribes Candidates
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide Post-Matric Scholarship to Scheduled Castes/ Scheduled Tribes candidates for study at Bachelor Degree programme in various branches of Agriculture, viz. B.Sc. (Agri.), B.V.Sc., B.Sc. (Agril. Engg.), B.Sc. (Home Science), B.F.Sc., B.Sc. (Forestry) etc.

schemeName: RMEWF-Financial Assistance For Vocational Training Of Widows Of ESM
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to widows of ex-servicemen to help them become self-reliant through vocational training.

schemeName: The Inland Waterways Authority of India Internship Scheme
briefDescription: The purpose of this scheme is to provide with Selected Candidates” short term exposure to different verticals/ divisions/ units of IWAI as “Interns”. An intern may be required to work at Head Office or Project Office depending upon the requirement of the Authority.

schemeName: Travel Grant Scheme for College Teachers/Vice Chancellors/Commission Members
briefDescription: This scheme is for providing financial assistance to permanent teachers of colleges & vice-chancellors of state universities, deemed to be universities & central universities, recognised under section 2(f) and 12 (B) of the UGC Act, to present research papers at international conferences abroad.

schemeName: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme (PLI 1.2) for Specialty Steel
briefDescription: under this scheme to promote domestic manufacturing of specialty steel by encouraging incremental investment, increasing production of value-added steel, enhancing technological capabilities, and reducing import dependence while generating employment.

schemeName: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: For Poultry Development
briefDescription: The scheme offers loans to farmers for poultry development and cattle development, with funding of up to ₹14,800/- for 200 birds or ₹17,000/- for 2 cows, with an interest rate of 14.5% to 16.5%.

schemeName: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: For Plantation (Tea)
briefDescription: The scheme offers financial assistance of up to ₹33,000/- per acre to farmers for tea plantations, with an interest rate of 11%-12.5%.

schemeName: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: Export Oriented Production:Large Cardamom Replanting/New planting (Ha)
briefDescription: Under this scheme, growers are encouraged to adopt systematic replanting of large cardamom using high-yielding, disease-free planting materials. It aims to increase productivity, improve quality, and enhance export competitiveness under the Spices Board of India.

schemeName: National Savings Recurring Deposit Account(RD)
briefDescription: The objective of the National Savings Recurring Deposit (RD) scheme is to encourage people to save small amounts regularly every month and build savings with safe returns at 6.7% per annum.

schemeName: Post Office Savings Account(SB)
briefDescription: The objective of the Post Office Savings Account (SB) scheme is to encourage people to save money safely with the government. It offers easy access, a low minimum balance of ₹500, and steady interest, helping individuals build regular saving habits.

schemeName: Meghalaya Agriculture Response Vehicle Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme “Meghalaya Agriculture Response Vehicle Scheme” was launched by the Department of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare, Government of Meghalaya to provide Small Commercial Vehicles and pickups at each CD Block across Meghalaya with 50% financial aid from the Government of Meghalaya.

schemeName: Widow Re-marriage Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the rehabilitation of widows by encouraging marriage through a monetary incentive. It provides a grant to bona fide Himachali men (above 21 years) and women (above 18 years) at the time of marriage.

schemeName: Pre-Matric Scholarship For Scheduled Tribe Students Studying In Classes 9th & 10th
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support Scheduled Tribe children in classes 9th and 10th to minimize drop-out rates and aid progression to higher education. The scheme provides a recurring monthly scholarship, an annual book grant, and disability allowances directly to the Scheduled Tribe student beneficiaries.

schemeName: Nikshay Poshan Yojana
briefDescription: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India has announced the scheme for incentives for nutritional support to TB patients. This scheme will be called “Nikshay Poshan Yojana”.

schemeName: Mizoram Sports Incentive Cash Award Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide lump sum cash awards and recognition to outstanding sports persons winning medals in national and international competitions.

schemeName: Award Of Scholarships To Young Artists In Different Cultural Fields
briefDescription: This Scheme seeks to give assistance to young artistes of outstanding promise for advanced training within India in the field of Indian Classical Music, Indian Classical Dance, Theatre, Mime, Visual art, Folk, Traditional and Indigenous Arts and Light Classical Music.

schemeName: AICTE – Saksham Scholarship Scheme For Specially-Abled Student (Degree)
briefDescription: Saksham is a Scholarship Scheme by the Ministry of Education, implemented by AICTE, aimed at providing encouragement and support to specially-abled children to pursue technical education. This is an attempt to give every young specially-abled student the opportunity to study further.

schemeName: ICRO Amrit Internship Programme
briefDescription: The IPL Centre for Rural Outreach (ICRO) has launched ICRO Amrit Internship Programme focused on youth productivity for prosperity. The interns will be placed at the headquarters and Regional Offices of NPC/ IPL. The duration of the internship will be 3 months initially, renewable up to four times.

schemeName: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom:Large cardamom Irrigation Land Development : Irrigation / water storage structures(nos)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to motivate the growers to bring more area under irrigation by constructing water storage structures, rain water harvesting structures and installation of irrigation equipments for increasing the productivity and improving quality of large cardamom.

schemeName: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship Program
briefDescription: Begum Hazrat Mahal National scholarship is a scholarship scheme also known as Maulana Azad National scholarship scheme was first announced on 3rd May 2003. It is a national level scholarship started for the benefit of the girl’s student belonging to the minority communities.

schemeName: Financial Incentive For Inter-Caste Marriages Under Protection Of Civil Rights Act 1955 And Scheduled Castes And Scheduled Tribes (Prevention Of Atrocities) Act 1989 In Assam
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage inter-caste marriages in Assam. It provides a one-time financial assistance of ₹2,50,000/- in a joint fixed deposit for eligible couples where one spouse belongs to a Scheduled Caste and the other to a General Caste Hindu.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: National Overseas Scholarship For Scheduled Caste Etc. Candidates
briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by MoSJE for regular, full-time students from Scheduled Castes, Denotified Nomadic and Semi Nomadic Tribes, Landless Agricultural Labourers and Traditional Artisans; to obtain higher education viz., Master degree or Ph.D courses by studying abroad

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Personnel, Public Grievances And Pensions
schemeName: Domestic Funding Of Foreign Training
briefDescription: The scheme "Domestic Funding of Foreign Training (DFFT)" is a scheme introduced by the Department of Personnel and Training, Government of India in the year 2001-02 with an objective to upgrade the knowledge & skills of Government officers.

schemeName: Women Involvement in Science and Engineering Research
briefDescription: The scheme “Women Involvement in Science and Engineering Research (WISER)” aims to build scientific capacity, retain and promote women researchers in India & Germany by utilizing complementary expertise in science, technology, innovation and research partnerships.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemeName: Craftsmen Training Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure steady flow of skilled workers in different trades for domestic industry and reduce unemployment among educated youth. It provides systematic vocational training through Industrial Training Institutes and National Skill Training Institutes across India.

schemeName: Internship Scheme Of The Department Of Economic Affairs
briefDescription: The Internship Scheme aims to familiarise students with macro-economic policy formulation and economic research. Through this scheme, internship opportunities with token remuneration are provided to eligible Post Graduate and PhD students.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Establishment Of Small Scale Dairy Unit (SSDU)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the establishment of dairy units with 10 Gir cows. Through this scheme, capital subsidy and back-ended subsidy are provided to beneficiaries via bank finance and NABARD.

schemeName: Mass Communication Internship Programme
briefDescription: The Mass Communication Internship Programme by the Department of Water Resources, River Development, and Ganga Rejuvenation. The intern program will offer work culture and environment knowledge about the functioning of the Government and its departments in information, education, and communication.

schemeName: Promotion of Exportable surplus of identified spices in NE: Cultivation of Lakadong turmeric (Ha)
briefDescription: To promote the cultivation of Lakadong turmeric for exports by providing 50% of the cost of planting material, subject to a maximum of ₹ 30,000 per Ha, to turmeric growers of the North East having land holding size of 0.10 Ha to 8 Ha.

schemeName: Nyaya Mitra Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to facilitate the expeditious disposal of ten to fifteen years old pending court cases. It provides legal advice, case assistance, and Lok Adalat referrals to marginalized litigants by engaging retired officers.

schemeName: Prime Minister’s Scholarship Scheme for the Wards of Central Armed Police Forces & Assam Rifles
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage higher technical and professional education for dependent wards and widows of CAPFs/Assam Rifles personnel martyred during Terror/Naxal attacks. Through this scheme, Financial support per year for girls and boys is provided.

schemeName: Vice Chancellor Internship Scheme
briefDescription: The Vice Chancellor Internship Scheme (VCIS) by the University of Delhi aims to provide students with experiential learning opportunities, integrating academic knowledge with practical work experience. This initiative aligns with the objectives of "Samagra Shiksha" (holistic education) as outlined..

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: Agri-Clinics And Agri-Business Centres Scheme
briefDescription: A welfare scheme by the Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare was launched in 2002. AC&ABC aims at agricultural development, supplementing the efforts of public extension by providing extension and other services to farmers either on a payment basis or free of cost as per the business model.

schemeName: Virasat Loan Scheme of NMDFC
briefDescription: Concessional credit of up to ₹10,00,000/- can be availed under Credit Line-1 & 2.  to meet Working Capital  and Fixed Capital for purchase of equipment/tools/machineries/raw material by the Minority Artisan.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Scheme for Promotion of Affordable Rental Smart Housing (SPARSH 2.0): Construction and Redevelopment Incentives
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage affordable rental housing development. Through this scheme, Floor Space Index benefits and regulatory relaxations are provided to eligible housing projects.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Scheme for Promotion of Affordable Rental Smart Housing (SPARSH 2.0): Rent Subsidy
briefDescription: The scheme aims to reduce the rental burden on workers and economically weaker section families residing in affordable rental housing complexes.

schemeName: Swami Vivekananda Merit-cum-Means Scholarship
briefDescription: "Swami Vivekananda Merit-cum-Means Scholarship" started by the Higher Education Department of West Bengal State for the financial assistance to the student.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Supply of School Uniform , Shoes Socks to all Students for Std IX to XII
briefDescription: Supply of School Uniform, Shoes Socks to all Students for IX to XII studying in Govt Schools

schemeName: Summer Internship Programme (PRL)
briefDescription: The Physical Research Laboratory (PRL) Summer Internship Programme aims to provide a platform for highly motivated students & teachers to interact with PRL’s scientists, gaining exposure to the lab’s research areas and facilities. Participants will work on projects in fundamental science, technology

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Scholarships for Top Class Education for students with Disabilities, DNH & DD
briefDescription: Scholarship for Students with Disabilities, DNH & DD offers tuition fee reimbursement up to ₹1.9 lakh, maintenance allowance, book grant, laptop support, assistive devices, and special disability allowances for eligible UG/PG students in notified institutes. Income limit: ₹8 lakh p.a.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Marriage for the Construction Workers
briefDescription: The "Financial Assistance for Marriage for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme  that provides financial assistance for marriage of self and for upto 2 children.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeShortTitle: SS-DADRA AND NAGAR HAVELI AND DAMAN & DIU
schemeName: Mission Saksham Anganwadi & Poshan 2.0, DNH & DD
briefDescription: The Union Territory of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu has successfully launched the "Mission Saksham Anganwadi & Poshan 2.0" scheme to provide nutritional support for children below 6 years of age, Pregnant Women and Lactating Mothers (PW&LM), and Adolescent Girls (14-18 years).

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Scheme for Loan and Subsidy for Manure and Fertilizer-DNH&DD
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote fertiliser use for higher productivity. Subsidy-cum-loan assistance is provided in kind to small and marginal farmers.

schemeName: INAE Travel Grant Scheme for Engineering Students from IITs/NITs/Govt. Approved Engineering Colleges/Institutions other than AICTE
briefDescription: A Travel Grant Scheme by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and by the Indian National Academy of Engineering (INAE), for the students from AICTE approved Engineering College/institutions. The scheme aims at enhancing the quality of engineering education in the country.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: National Overseas Scholarship For Students With Disabilities
briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment for regular, full-time students with disabilities to obtain higher education viz., Master's degree, or Ph.D. courses from foreign universities, in one of the specified fields of study.

schemeName: Emeritus Fellowship
briefDescription: The University Grants Commission floated the Scheme of “Emeritus Fellowship” to provide an opportunity to the superannuated teachers who have been actively engaged in research and teaching programmes in the preceding years to undertake research, without any restriction of position or pay scales.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: National Mission on Natural Farming
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote natural farming practices through capacity building, training, certification, and financial assistance for on-farm input production infrastructure, thereby reducing cultivation costs and increasing farmers' income.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Post Matric Scholarships to the Students Belonging to Scheduled Castes, DNH & DD
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase higher education enrolment among Scheduled Caste students, especially those from poor households. Through this scheme, financial assistance towards fees and academic expenses is provided to eligible Scheduled Caste students.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC and DNT Students - DNH & DD
