schemeName: Tiatr Competition for Educational Institutions at Higher Secondary/College/University Level
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage and develop Tiatr activities among students of educational institutions. It provides financial support and awards to participating institutions for staging traditional Tiatr performances in competition format.

schemeName: Compensation for Loss of Life and Property Caused by Wild Animals in and around Forest Areas: Assistance for Loss of Cattle Due to Wild Animal Attacks
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to owners of domestic animals who suffer losses due to attacks by wild animals in forest areas and their surroundings. Under this scheme, a grant ranging from ₹3,000 to ₹40,000 per animal is provided, depending on the species and extent of loss.

schemeName: Scholarship Scheme of Sainik School Chhingchhip, Mizoram
briefDescription: The scheme aims to award financial scholarships to eligible boys of Mizoram domicile who are admitted to Sainik School Chhingchhip, specifically to foster their development and prepare them for future entry into the officer’s cadre of the Armed Forces. Benefits include coverage for School Fee, etc.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Commercial Tiatr Troupes/Directors/Producers for Stage Setting
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage all round development of the Tiatr in all aspects by providing encouragement to commercial tiatr directors and producers to bring in development in stage setting, addressing the need for improved theatrical infrastructure and production quality.

schemeName: Freeship Less than ₹1,00,000/- (UG Students Only)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide tuition fee concessions to students enrolled in 3-year undergraduate programs and 4-year veterinary programs. Through this scheme, tuition fee concessions are provided to students in higher years of study whose tuition fees are less than ₹1,00,000/-.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Ayushman Aarogya Yojana
briefDescription: The Mukhyamantri Ayushman Arogya Yojana, launched on 1 May 2021, aims to reduce medical expenses by offering free treatment for 1,798 procedures in government and empanelled private hospitals. Eligible NFSA, SECC 2011 families, contract workers, small farmers, and others can avail benefits.

schemeName: Doodh Sanjeevani Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide fortified, flavored, double toned pasteurized milk to students, pregnant women and lactating women. The scheme is implemented by the Anganwadi Centers and also by the Child Development Project Officers.

schemeName: Award of Merit Scholarship for Agricultural Engineering Students (B.Tech 3rd/4th Year)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support meritorious students pursuing B.Tech in Agricultural Engineering in their 3rd and 4th years by providing scholarship of ₹2000/- per month for one year.

schemeName: Kisan Credit Card (Pashupalan)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide short-term working capital loans for livestock activities by offering eligible livestock farmers interest-subsidized loans for operational purposes through banks.

schemeName: Compensation for Human Death or Injury Caused by Wild Animals
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial relief to victims or families affected by wild animal attacks in both urban and rural areas through timely monetary compensation.

schemeName: Research and Development Grant
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage scientific research to address the state’s problems by providing grants and technical support to scientists, researchers, and academic institutions across the state.

schemeName: Grant In Aid Hostels
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide boarding and lodging facilities to tribal students who wish to pursue primary, secondary and higher secondary education. Free lodging and boarding facilities are provided to intended beneficiaries who are students studying in standards 5th to 12th.

schemeName: Special Scheme for Increasing the Storage Capacity of Perishable Products
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase the storage capacity of perishable products by providing grant assistance for cold storage facilities.

schemeName: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization (SMAM) for Custom Hiring Centres / Big Farmers - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: Under this scheme, individual large farmers, farmer groups, cooperatives, self-help groups, and custom hiring centres in the state can purchase agricultural equipment at a subsidized rate, with the Government of India providing a maximum subsidy of 40%.

schemeName: Goa State Logistics and Warehousing Incentives Scheme: Subsidy towards Upgradation in Transportation through Tracking Devices
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a one-time financial allowance for upgrading transportation infrastructure by installing tracking devices on goods carriers. It offers a reimbursement of 50% of the installation expenditure, capped at ₹5,000/- (Indian Rupees 5,000/-) per device, to eligible entities.

schemeName: STEM Lab
briefDescription: It aims to promote hands-on learning in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics by establishing labs across all blocks, giving students and teachers practical exposure to STEM experiments.

schemeName: Bari (Kitchen Garden) Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote kitchen gardening among poor and small/marginal farmers and agricultural laborers living below the poverty line by providing free vegetable seed packets.

schemeName: Exhibition Fair and Publicity
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote departmental schemes and disseminate information about the technology of fruit, flower, vegetable, and spice crops to farmers through exhibitions and seminars organized at the district and block levels.

schemeName: Scheme to Grant Monthly Financial Assistance to the Persons Engaged in Traditional Occupations/Businesses including Motorcycle Pilots
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide Social Security and Financial Support for healthy living to those engaged in traditional occupations/businesses and motorcycle pilots. It offers monthly financial assistance of ₹1,000/- to eligible persons of Goan Origin who meet specified age and income criteria.

schemeName: Madhya Pradesh Lok Vaniki Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide for the management of tree covered areas located on private land and revenue land under the MP Public Forestry Act, 2001. The scheme benefits landowners, Gram Panchayats, or Gram Sabhas by allowing them to undertake the scientific management of their tree covered areas.

schemeName: Sparsh Abhiyan: Surgery to Prevent Disability of Poor and Destitute Disabled People of Madhya Pradesh
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide surgical treatment to prevent disability among poor and destitute disabled persons. Benefits include financial assistance/reimbursement for various surgeries related to visual, hearing, bone impairment, and leprosy, available to eligible residents of Madhya Pradesh.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Non-Pensioner World War-II Veterans and Their Widows
briefDescription: The scheme provides a monthly financial aid of ₹8,000 to ensure a respectful livelihood for World War-II veterans and their widows who are non-pensioners.

schemeName: Free Electricity Supply Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free electricity supply to Scheduled Caste (SC) and Scheduled Tribe (ST) farmers of Madhya Pradesh who have agricultural pumps up to 5 horsepower and landholding up to 1 hectare.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to the Recipients of the Service Medal by the Government of Madhya Pradesh
briefDescription: The scheme aims to honor medal-winning defense personnel who are permanent residents of the state by providing them with financial support and benefits for their distinguished service.

schemeName: SC Girl Child Literacy Incentive Amount - Class 11th
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to Scheduled Caste girl students of Madhya Pradesh enrolled in Class 11 to encourage them to continue their education and prevent dropouts.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Bijli Bill Bakaya Maaf Samadhan Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide relief in payment of outstanding electricity bills to the registered workers, construction workers, and BPL consumers under the "Mukhyamantri Mazdoor Kalyan (Sambal) Yojana".

schemeName: Annapurna Scheme: Seed Production Programme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the production and economic status of Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe small and marginal farmers. It provides Foundation or Certified Grade I seeds for high-yielding food grain crops with a 75% subsidy to registered farmers operating near Government agricultural farms.

schemeName: Special Scheme for Increasing the Storage Capacity of Perishable Products
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase the storage capacity of perishable products by providing grant assistance for cold storage facilities.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Yuva Annadoot Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide employment opportunities to unemployed youth/women for 7 years by involving them in the transport of food grains from Madhya Pradesh State Civil Supplies Corporation centers to fair price shops. Benefits include an interest subsidy/grant.

schemeName: Cancer Day Care Centre - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure early detection & timely treatment of cancer by providing accessible & affordable healthcare services within the state. Under this initiative, free screening for common cancers such as oral, breast, & cervical cancer is being conducted across all districts of Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Allotment of Commercial Godown
briefDescription: The scheme aims to facilitate ease of doing business for traders by providing licensed traders with access to commercial godowns for storage and management of their goods.

schemeName: Scheme to Grant Monthly Financial Assistance to the Persons Engaged in Traditional Occupations/Businesses including Motorcycle Pilots
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide Social Security and Financial Support for healthy living to those engaged in traditional occupations/businesses and motorcycle pilots. It offers monthly financial assistance of ₹1,000/- to eligible persons of Goan Origin who meet specified age and income criteria.

schemeName: Madhya Pradesh Lok Vaniki Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide for the management of tree covered areas located on private land and revenue land under the MP Public Forestry Act, 2001. The scheme benefits landowners, Gram Panchayats, or Gram Sabhas by allowing them to undertake the scientific management of their tree covered areas.

schemeName: Livestock Mission Scheme - Interest Payment on Loan
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-employment opportunities at the local level by encouraging livestock-based entrepreneurship and reducing the financial burden on beneficiaries through payment of 90% of the bank loan interest by the State Government.

schemeName: The Grant of Honorarium to Legal Researcher Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to engage Legal Research Assistants to handle legal issues and court matters for major Departments of the Administration, thereby ensuring timely submission of defense documents and reducing departmental embarrassment in Courts. It gives fixed honorarium of ₹25,000/- per month.

schemeName: District Plan - Sugarcane Development Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance sugarcane productivity & quality in Uttarakhand by providing financial & technical support to farmers for improved seed production, seed & soil treatment, pest & disease management, thereby promoting sustainable farming & strengthening the livelihoods of sugarcane growers.

schemeName: Uttarakhand Rajya Shilp Ratna Puraskar
briefDescription: The scheme aims to honor exceptionally skilled artisans of the state for their outstanding contributions to the traditional craft sector. This annual award celebrates heritage, promotes excellence, and supports artisans whose expertise has preserved and enriched cultural craftsmanship.

schemeName: Ude Desh ka Aam Nagrik (UDAN) Yojana - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to make air travel affordable and accessible for all citizens, enhance regional connectivity within Uttarakhand and promote tourism.

schemeName: Pension Scheme for Craftsmen
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support and social security to traditional artisans of Uttarakhand who are aged 60 years or above and belong to families living below the poverty line.

schemeName: Drip Irrigation Sprinkler
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote efficient and sustainable irrigation for horticultural crops by providing farmers with modern irrigation systems and financial subsidies to enhance productivity and water conservation.

schemeName: Tubewell Installation /Pond Construction
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance irrigation facilities for farmers in Uttarakhand by providing financial assistance for the construction of tubewells and ponds, thereby improving water availability, supporting horticultural development, and increasing agricultural productivity.

schemeName: Scheme for Providing Counseling to the Trainees of Government Industrial Training Institutes at Directorate of Skill Development & Entrepreneurship
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide youth-friendly counseling services in Government Industrial Training Institutes, delivered by appointed Counselors, to assist trainees suffering from mental, physical, or psychological stress. The benefit is the provision of a safe, confidential space.

schemeName: Incentives to Industries For Training Prospective Employees Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to address the skill gap in Goa by supporting industrial units to provide demand-driven Short Term Training Courses through recognized institutions, thereby creating manpower suitable for the industry. It offers reimbursement for 60% of training costs up to ₹60,000/- per trainee.

schemeName: Registration of Aromatic Plant Farmers - Centre for Aromatic Plants
briefDescription: The registration ensures that farmers are eligible to access the benefits of all schemes offered by CAP, including state and central government subsidies, technical guidance, training programs, and product clearance support.

schemeName: Minimum Support Price for Aromatic Oils/Products - Centre for Aromatic Plants
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide registered farmers engaged in aromatic cultivation with a fair price and a guaranteed market for their produce.

schemeName: Community Food Processing Centre
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote skill development and entrepreneurship in food processing by enabling individuals and farmers to process fruits and vegetables, add value to their produce, and enhance income opportunities through community-based facilities.

schemeName: NIPUN Bharat Mission - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure that all children aged 3 to 9 achieve foundational literacy and numeracy by creating an enabling learning environment across all schools in Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote growth of fisheries sector by providing financial assistance & technical support for modern fisheries activities, thereby increasing fish production,improving livelihood opportunities,& encouraging adoption of advanced fisheries infrastructure among eligible beneficiaries.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Ambedkar Social Innovation and Incubation Mission (ASIIM)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to boost entrepreneurship and innovation among SC students and SC differently-abled youth by providing focused support to translate innovative, technology-oriented business ideas into successful commercial enterprises. It offers equity funding and hand-holding support.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Students who Cleared Civil Services Prelims Conducted by UPSC/APSC
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students belonging to the Tea Tribes and Adivasi Community who have cleared the Civil Services Preliminary Examination. The benefits support their preparation for the Mains Examination to ensure their success.

schemeName: Scheme for Small Road Transport Operators (SRTOs)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to extend financial assistance for acquiring new transport vehicles, including goods and passenger vehicles. It provides term loans covering up to 70% of the vehicle cost, excluding road tax and insurance, repayable over a max. of 58 monthly instalments.

schemeName: Scheme for Hotel and Restaurant Projects
briefDescription: The scheme was launched by PIPDIC, Department of Industries & Commerce, Puducherry. The scheme aims to financially assist entrepreneurs for setting up entrepreneurs setting up of hotel/restaurant projects in urban areas. The applications for this scheme are accepted online through the PIPDIC portal.

schemeName: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM): Support for Urban Homeless – Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide safe and accessible night shelter facilities to homeless people living under the open sky in urban areas, ensuring they have protection and support at any time.

schemeName: Destitute Widow Pension Scheme - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹1,500/- is provided to widows whose family income does not exceed ₹4,000/- per month or who belong to the BPL category, and who are not receiving any other pension benefits.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Mahalakshmi Kit Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve the health and well-being of both mothers and their newborn girl children by providing essential item kits after the institutional delivery of pregnant women registered at an Anganwadi Centre.

schemeName: Provision of Sports Kits to Players Participating at the National Level
briefDescription: This scheme provides a sports kit worth ₹5000/- (including tracksuit, jersey, shorts, socks, etc.) to approximately 1000 players annually who participate in various sports at the national level, selected through their respective sports federations.

schemeName: One-time and Annual Financial Grant to Soldiers Awarded with Gallantry Medals
briefDescription: Under this scheme, a one-time financial assistance/annuity is provided to serving or ex-servicemen who have been conferred with the “Gallantry Medal Award.” In the event of martyrdom or death of the soldier, the grant is extended to the eligible family members or dependents.

schemeName: One-Time Grant Money to Soldiers Conferred with Vishisht Seva Medal Award
briefDescription: Under this scheme, a one-time financial assistance/grant ranging from a minimum of ₹75,000/- to a maximum of ₹2,00,000/- is provided to serving soldiers and ex-servicemen of the state who have been conferred with the ‘Vishisht Seva Medal Award’.

schemeName: Housing Assistance Grant
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial support to widows/dependents of soldiers martyred in wars and border clashes, as well as to war-disabled retired soldiers. Under this scheme, eligible beneficiaries receive a one-time grant of ₹2 lakhs for the construction or repair of a house during their lifetime.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Mahila Poshan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve the health of pregnant and lactating women by providing nutritional food such as eggs twice a week and dates twice a week at Anganwadi Centres.

schemeName: Livelihood Opportunity Promotion Scheme (Scheduled Caste)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among Scheduled Castes. It provides financial aid, including loans, margin money, and grants, for livelihood projects.

schemeName: Smt. Bimla Rani Memorial Award (B.Sc. Ag., B.V.Sc. & A.H., B.H.Sc. & B.F.Sc.)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance and encourage meritorious students pursuing Bachelor of Science in Agriculture (B.Sc. Ag.), Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H.), Bachelor of Home Science (B.H.Sc.), and Bachelor of Fisheries Science (B.F.Sc.) courses.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Medhavi Chhatra Protsahan Scholarship Scheme (Junior Level)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote academic excellence among students entering Classes 6, 7, and 8 by providing financial assistance to meritorious students, based on their performance in a competitive examination conducted by the SCERT, Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Smt. Uma Gupta Fellowship for M.Sc. Agriculture (Genetics & Plant Breeding) Students
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance and encourage meritorious students pursuing the M.Sc. Agriculture (Genetics & Plant Breeding) course by offering a fellowship of ₹1000/- for three semesters, thereby reducing their economic burden.

schemeName: Dr. A.N. Mukhopadhyay Gold Medal Award (B.Sc. Agriculture - Final Year Student)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage meritorious students pursuing a B.Sc. Agriculture course in their final year of study, thereby recognizing their academic excellence and providing financial support to reduce their burden.

schemeName: Free Legal Aid under the Legal Services Authority Act 1987
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free legal aid to all eligible persons in Uttarakhand who intend to file a case, have already filed a case, or need to defend a case under the provisions of the Legal Services Authority Act, 1987.

schemeName: State Millet Mission
briefDescription: The mission aims to promote millet cultivation, ensure fair prices for farmers, and strengthen food security in the state. It seeks to support farmers, particularly in mountain districts, by procuring millet crops such as Mandua and Jhangora at the minimum support price through cooperative groups.

schemeName: Samudayik Sahbhagita
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote public participation in education by forming SMC/SMDC in all government schools to actively engage the community in educational activities.

schemeName: Deserted Women Pension Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension to Abandoned married women, mentally ill husband/wife & destitute unmarried women in the state. Under this scheme, beneficiaries receive a pension of ₹1,200/- per month, & in case of mental disability (spouse), the amount is ₹1,400/- per month.

schemeName: Allotment of Shops in Kisan Bazaar
briefDescription: The scheme aims to facilitate trade in products other than agricultural produce by providing commercial shops in Kisan Bazaars. The shops are allotted to eligible residents of Uttarakhand through public notices published in newspapers and displayed at public places.

schemeName: Anganwadi Workers Welfare Fund
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Anganwadi workers, mini workers, and assistants of the state upon attaining the superannuation age of 60 years. A minimum amount of ₹30,000/- is granted, while those completing 20 years of service receive ₹1,30,000/-.

schemeName: Free Blood to Patients - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure the availability of blood free of cost to all patients admitted in government hospitals across the state. Under this scheme, blood is provided free of cost by government blood banks to all in-patients who require transfusion during treatment.

schemeName: Umbrella Assistance Scheme (UKBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free umbrellas to construction workers registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, to protect them from rain and sunlight.

schemeName: Disability Pension (UKBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension of ₹1,000 to construction workers registered with Uttarakhand Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board who have become permanently disabled due to paralysis, leprosy, accidents, etc. In addition, an ex-gratia amount of ₹40,000 is also provided.

schemeName: Free Blood to Patients - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure the availability of blood free of cost to all patients admitted in government hospitals across the state. Under this scheme, blood is provided free of cost by government blood banks to all in-patients who require transfusion during treatment.

schemeName: Umbrella Assistance Scheme (UKBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free umbrellas to construction workers registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, to protect them from rain and sunlight.

schemeName: Disability Pension (UKBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension of ₹1,000 to construction workers registered with Uttarakhand Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board who have become permanently disabled due to paralysis, leprosy, accidents, etc. In addition, an ex-gratia amount of ₹40,000 is also provided.

schemeName: Grant for the Marriage of Daughter of Destitute Widow
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹50,000/- per daughter for the marriage of up to two daughters of destitute widows who are receiving widow pension and whose total monthly income from all sources does not exceed ₹4,000/-, or who belong to BPL families.

schemeName: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage farm mechanization purchasing and providing 50% subsidy/financial assistance to SC/ST, small and marginal, and women farmers (of all categories), while 40% subsidy/financial assistance is provided to other (large) farmers.

schemeName: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Extension (SMAE)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the adoption of modern and scientific farming practices among farmers across the state through continuous training, practical demonstrations, and exposure visits.

schemeName: Merit Scholarship (Top 3 UG Students)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize and support academically outstanding undergraduate students by providing monthly financial assistance of ₹800/- in the form of scholarships to students in their 3rd year of Medical and 4th year of Veterinary undergraduate (UG) programs.

schemeName: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote & support organic farming among farmers in Uttarakhand. The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹9,000/- per hectare to farmers for the purchase of organic inputs, including seeds, compost, green manure, biofertilizers, biopesticides, neem oil, etc.

schemeName: Flower Area Expansion
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote and expand flower cultivation by providing cultivators in Uttarakhand access to quality flower planting material at a subsidized cost, thereby increasing flower production and enhancing farmers’ income.

schemeName: Fruit Area Expansion
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase fruit production by encouraging farmers to establish new orchards, providing fruit plants at a 50% subsidy to support the expansion of fruit cultivation across Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Grant for Marriage of Daughters of Scheduled Caste Individuals
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a grant of ₹50,000/- per daughter to Scheduled Caste families, for a maximum of two daughters, whose total monthly family income from all sources does not exceed ₹4,000/- or who belong to a BPL family, to help cover marriage expenses.

schemeName: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Resources in Tribal Areas: Training of Tribal Trainees - Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to boost fish production and provide employment through inland fisheries. Under this scheme, Financial assistance is provided as a scholarship to tribal trainees undergoing fisheries training.

schemeName: Car Loan Scheme
briefDescription: The "Car Loan Scheme" aims to assist the employees of the Government of Puducherry & Employees of the Government of Puducherry undertaking for the purchase of a new car for personal use. The applications for this scheme are accepted online only.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Sampoorna Pushti Yojana: Adolescent Girls Nutrition
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance nutritional support for all adolescent girls aged 15 -19 years across the state. However, in the 10 Aspirational Districts, the coverage is limited to girls aged 18 -19 years.

schemeName: Pada Pushti Karyakram
briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure access to supplementary nutrition by all children, residing in hard-to-reach villages where there is no Anganwadi centers. This programme is functioning as an extension of respective Anganwadi Centers in the hard-to-reach villages.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Sampoorna Pushti Yojana: Kishori Mela
briefDescription: This initiative aims to make Kishori Diwas more engaging and eventful. Any Saturday in the month of January may be celebrated as “Kishori Mela”, with increased participation and a range of activities for all adolescent girls aged 15 - 19 years.

schemeName: Manav Garima Yojana DCW (Minority)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enable minority persons to become self-employed through business toolkits and support. Under this scheme, business tool-kits are provided to eligible persons from such groups, so they can set up small businesses.

schemeName: H.P. Swaran Jayanti Middle Merit Scholarship Scheme
briefDescription: The “H.P. Swaran Jayanti Middle Merit Scholarship Scheme” scheme was launched by the Department of Elementary Education, Government of Himachal Pradesh for students studying in Class V is meant to identify the talent and nurture it at an early stage.

schemeName: Technical Education Scholarship Scheme For Degree Level
briefDescription: The Scholarships will be awarded to the P.G. Courses/Degree Courses level Courses in Engineering/Technology including Architecture or any other equivalent course approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).

schemeName: Rehabilitation of Cured Leprosy Persons: Marriage Incentives & Support
briefDescription: The scheme is designed to assist Cured Leprosy Persons who face social and economic challenges in arranging marriages for their daughters.

schemeName: Technical Education Scholarship Scheme for ITI Level
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to improve the quality of training by attracting promising trainees belonging to Scheduled Caste, Scheduled Tribe & Other Backward Classes & popularize technical training among these categories, so as to make them able to earn their livelihood respectably & honorably.

schemeName: Additional Subsidy to Establish Tourism Projects in Distant and New Ulterior Areas
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage private investment in tourism projects located in remote and ulterior areas of Madhya Pradesh. It offers an additional 5% capital subsidy, uncapped subsidy amounts, and reduces investment and capacity requirements by 50% for investors.

schemeName: Berojgari Bhatta Yojna
briefDescription: The UP government has implemented the UP Unemployment Allowance 2022 scheme in Uttar Pradesh. The government has implemented this scheme only for those candidates who belong to the state and is unemployed despite being educated.

schemeName: Dr. Ambedkar Medhavi Chhatravriti Yojna to Scheduled Caste Students
briefDescription: The scheme “Dr. Ambedkar Medhavi Chhatravriti Yojna to Scheduled Caste Students” was started by the Dept. of Education, H.P. Under the scheme, scholarship is given to top 1250 meritorious students of SC category as such in the result of Matric Examination conducted by H.P. Board of School Education.

schemeName: State Disability Scholarship (Scholarship for Persons with Disabilities)
briefDescription: The scheme “State Disability Scholarship” was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Nagaland to provide financial assistance to students from Class I to Class VIII who have a disability of 40% and above.

schemeName: Educational Assistance To Children Of Prisoners
briefDescription: The scheme “Educational Assistance to Children of Prisoners” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

schemeName: State Medical Scholarship (Scholarship Scheme for MBBS & Allied Courses, Nursing and Paramedical Students)
briefDescription: The “State Medical Scholarship” is a scholarship scheme, launched by the Department of Health & Family Welfare, Government of Nagaland. Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to students who are pursuing MBBS & Allied Courses, Nursing and Paramedical courses.

schemeName: Scheme for Promoting Young Talents in Science-I
briefDescription: The scheme “Scheme for Promoting Young Talents in Science-I (SPYTiS-I)” is constituted for the purpose of providing financial and technical assistance to talented young students who have innovative ideas in scientific/technological pursuits.

schemeName: Biotechnology Young Entrepreneur Award
briefDescription: The “Biotechnology Young Entrepreneur Award (BYE)” is a programme to promote commercialisation of bioscience ideas among graduate/post graduate students in Biotechnology and to encourage them to develop biotechnology entrepreneurship.

schemeName: Biju Patnaik Sports Award for Outstanding Performance in Sports and Games for the Year
briefDescription: The award is given to the sportspersons of Odisha who have achieved outstanding performance in any of the recognized sports during the year making the State of Odisha and India proud.

schemeName: Scheme for Grant of Additional Scholarship to the Students of Other Backward Classes of Andaman and Nicobar Islands, for Pursuing Higher Studies Anywhere in India after Secondary Level (Except Class XI & XII)
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide additional scholarship to the OBC students belonging to the non-creamy layer of Andaman & Nicobar Islands for pursuing higher education after Secondary (X)/Senior Secondary (XII), in government-recognized Polytechnic/ITI/College/University anywhere in India.

schemeName: Scholarships to Students with Disabilities Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to assist students with disabilities to secure education, academic, technical, or professional training to enable them to earn a living and to become useful members of society.

schemeName: Mizoram Research Fellowship
briefDescription: The "Mizoram Research Fellowship" aims to provide financial assistance to research workers and teachers, preferably below the age of 45 years, who have established their reputation for research OR have obtained a doctorate degree OR have published research work to their credit.

schemeName: Post Graduate Scholarship for Ph.D./LLM Students
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students of Assam pursuing PhD and LLM degree courses in recognized institutions. It benefits academically meritorious students who have obtained at least 55% marks in their last qualifying examination and are domiciled in Assam.

schemeName: West Bengal Freeship Scheme
briefDescription: The West Bengal Freeship Scheme (WBFS)has been launched by the Department of Higher Education,  Government of West Bengal. This freeship would be provided as a tuition fee waiver for the under Graduate students level in Engineering & Technology/ Pharmacy/ Architecture.

schemeName: Mai Bhago Vidya Scheme
briefDescription: Under this scheme, the goal is to support girls from economically weaker families by providing assistance for transportation, enabling regular school attendance.

schemeName: Mid Day Meals Scheme
briefDescription: The Mid Day Meals Scheme is a government initiative that provides free meals to school children to improve their nutritional status and encourage school attendance.

schemeName: Bebe Nanki Laadli Beti Kalyan Scheme
briefDescription: Bebe Nanki Laadli Beti Kalyan Scheme was launched under the 13th Finance Commission component for "measures to improve gender ratio" in the Punjab State from 2011-12.

schemeName: Education Assistance for the Construction Workers
briefDescription: The "Education Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides scholarship to the childrens of the construction worker of the board.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Matrupushti Uphar
briefDescription: The scheme “Mukhyamantri Matrupushti Uphar” was launched by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura, to provide financial assistance of ₹500/- to pregnant women through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) for antenatal checkups at any health facility.

schemeName: Scholarship/Merit Scholarship Schools SC/ST/OBC/Min (Studying in College/Technical/ Professional Institutions)
briefDescription: The scheme provides monthly financial aid to SC/ST/OBC/Minority students pursuing higher education. Benefits include scholarships for hostellers and day scholars, with eligibility based on academic performance and income criteria.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Vidyarthi Pratibha Yojna
briefDescription: This scheme is to provide scholarships to the students studying in classes 9th to 12th for enabling them to bear the expenses required for their studies.

schemeName: Pre Matric Scholarship for Students belonging to Scheduled Caste Community
briefDescription: The scheme is to provide financial assistance to students belonging to the Scheduled caste community pursuing Post-Matriculation recognized courses in recognized institutions.

schemeName: AICTE – Mitacs Globalink Research Internship (GRI) Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote collaborative research between India and Canada. Through this scheme, fully funded international research internships are provided to eligible Indian undergraduate students.

schemeName: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme for the Wards/Widows of Central Police Force Personnel
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage higher technical and professional education for the wards of widows and ex-CPF personnel. Service conditions of Central Police Forces (CPFs) Personnel are extremely exacting, tough, rigorous, and peculiar to the Services.

schemeName: Madhya Pradesh Janani Suraksha Yojana
briefDescription: Under this scheme, cash incentives are provided to pregnant women and their motivators for delivery in government or accredited private hospitals.

schemeName: Inter-Caste Marriage Award
briefDescription: The objective of this scheme is to eliminate the practice of untouchability by encouraging marriages between the Scheduled Castes and other castes, under which an incentive of ₹50,000/- or an amount as decided by the Government from time to time is awarded.

schemeName: Madhya Pradesh Kalakar Evam Sahityakar Kalyan Kosh Niyam- Serious Illness / Accident / Calamity Assistance
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide one-time financial assistance for serious illness, accident, or calamity-related medical treatment to artists and litterateurs.

schemeName: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for Pharmaceuticals
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial incentives on the incremental sales (over Base Year) of pharmaceutical goods and in-vitro diagnostic medical devices to selected applicants based on pre-defined selection criteria. The applicant must be a manufacturer of pharmaceutical goods.

schemeName: Motor Vehicle Driver-Conductor Welfare Scheme- Pradhanmantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
briefDescription: This scheme provides accident insurance coverage to registered drivers and conductors, offering financial protection in the event of accidental death or permanent disability.

schemeName: Youth Art Training Fellowship Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage youth in arts by providing a monthly fellowship and professional training through government institutions.

schemeName: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: Export Oriented Production: Large Cardamom Certified Nursery (Unit)
briefDescription: The scheme "Export Oriented Production: Large Cardamom Certified Nursery (Unit)" is a Sub-Scheme of the Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom by the Spice Board, Department of Commerce and Industry, Ministry of Commerce.

schemeName: Meghalaya Dairy Development Scheme
briefDescription: The Chief Minister’s CM-ELEVATE Program includes Meghalaya Dairy Development Scheme under the Planning Dept, Govt of Meghalaya. The scheme aims to employ, engage, and empower the youth and rural communities by promoting Dairy related entrepreneurship through easy access to credit and subsidies.

schemeName: Meghalaya Adventure Tourism Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the Meghalaya Adventure Tourism Scheme is to promote Meghalaya as a premier eco-adventure destination while generating local livelihoods through sustainable and community-based tourism. It also ensures safety, environmental protection, and sectoral growth.

schemeName: Professional and Self Employment Scheme (HSFDC)
briefDescription: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans/benefits to individuals from BPL families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in rural & urban areas. These loans support self-employment activities in fields such as legal profession, Chartered Accountancy, medical practice etc.

schemeName: Dairy Farming Scheme (HSFDC)
briefDescription: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans/benefits to individuals from Below Poverty Line (BPL) families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in both rural and urban areas for self-employment income generating activities such as dairy farming.

schemeName: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme- Chhattisgarh
briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to elderly people aged 60 years and above living Below the Poverty Line (BPL) to support them in living a respectful life.

schemeName: Fellowship for the Post-Graduate Students in Various Faculties Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University
briefDescription: The scheme "Fellowship for the Post-Graduate Students in Various Faculties Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University" provides a monthly fellowship to meritorious Post-Graduate students across various faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University.

schemeName: Assistance in Packing Materials under Post Harvest Management of Horticultural Produce
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers to procure packing materials like corrugated and wooden boxes for post-harvest management of horticultural produce.

schemeName: Assistance Program for the Cultivation of Lotus Fruit (Dragon Fruit)
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers to support the cultivation of dragon fruit (lotus fruit), with higher benefits for SC/ST and priority for small-scale and women farmers.

schemeName: Assistance Program for Planting in Floriculture
briefDescription: The scheme offers financial assistance to farmers in Gujarat for the cultivation of floriculture crops, including loose, cut, and tuberous flowers, based on crop type and farmer category.

schemeName: Industrial Sector Scheme (HSFDC)
briefDescription: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans/benefits to individuals from BPL families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in both rural & urban areas for various self-employment income-generating activities such as carpentry, leather and leather goods manufacturing, etc.

schemeName: Vehicle Loan Scheme (GTKVN)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among youth from the Thakor and Koli communities by providing loans of up to ₹4,00,000/- for the purchase of commercial vehicles such as auto-rickshaws, loading rickshaws, or a Maruti Eeco van to start an income-generating transport business.

schemeName: Pre-Matric Scholarship for the Students of Minority Castes
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support education among minority students by providing financial assistance from class 1st to 10th in government and aided schools.

schemeName: Assistance for Purchasing Study Materials for Medical and Engineering Students from Socially and Educationally Backward Classes
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from socially and educationally backward classes pursuing medical and engineering diploma or degree courses to support their education. Under this scheme, eligible students are provided a one-time grant for purchasing study materials.

schemeName: Post SSC Scholarship for Boys/Girls from Socially and Educationally Backward Classes
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from Socially & Educationally Backward Classes and Nomadic & De-notified Tribes pursuing education after SSC. Under this scheme, eligible students receive yearly scholarships ranging from ₹1,500 to ₹5,000, depending on their academic group.

schemeName: Term Loan Scheme (GTKVN)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among individuals from the Thakor and Koli communities by providing financial assistance up to ₹10,00,000/- for agriculture and allied activities, small-scale businesses, craftsmanship, traditional occupations, and service-based businesses/trades.

schemeName: Scheme to Provide Monthly Financial Assistance to Elderly and Eligible Writers
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support senior writers facing financial hardship by offering monthly assistance to those who have made notable contributions to Gujarati or associated language literature.

schemeName: Meghalaya Sports & Wellness Centre Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to improve the health and well-being of the local population. It promotes physical fitness and encourages participation in sports and wellness activities.

schemeName: Various Awards to Individuals/Organizations who have made Outstanding Contributions in the Field of Social Welfare
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize and honor the exceptional work carried out by individuals and organizations in the field of social welfare, particularly benefiting the Scheduled Caste (SC) community. Under this scheme, awards along with financial assistance are provided as a mark of appreciation.

schemeName: Ramanujan Fellowship
briefDescription: "Ramanujan Fellowship" was started by the Science and Engineering Research Board, Govt. of India for brilliant Indian scientists and engineers from outside India to take up scientific research positions in India, those Indian scientists/engineers who want to return to India from abroad.

schemeName: Post Graduate Scholarship for GATE/GPAT Qualified Students for Pursuing M.Tech/M.E./M.Pharm-UGC
briefDescription: University Grants Commission is implementing the scheme of Post Graduate Scholarship for GATE/GPAT Qualified Students for Pursuing M.Tech/M.E./M.Pharm courses (including integrated dual degree courses).

schemeName: High Risk - High Reward Research
briefDescription: The Scheme for Funding "High Risk - High Reward Research" aims at supporting proposals that are conceptually new & risky, & if successful, expected to have a paradigm-shifting influence on the S&T.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Disha - Early Intervention and School Readiness Scheme
briefDescription: This scheme aims at setting up Disha Centres for early intervention for Person with Disability (PwD) in 0-10 years of age covered under the National Trust Act, through therapies, trainings and providing support to family members.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Free Coaching Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide good coaching quality for DNT candidates to enable them to appear in competitive examinations and succeed in obtaining an appropriate job in the Public/Private Sector.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: National Agriculture Insurance Scheme
briefDescription: The National Agriculture Insurance Scheme (NAIS) was introduced by the Government of India to provide comprehensive insurance coverage and financial support to farmers against crop losses due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases.

schemeName: Youth Hostel Scheme
briefDescription: The Youth Hostel Scheme is a joint venture of the Central and State Governments of India. It was launched in the early 1960s to promote youth travel within the country by providing low-cost budget accommodation and facilities to students and youth groups traveling on excursions or study tours.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maandhan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide old-age social security through a minimum assured monthly pension of ₹ 3,000/- to Small and Marginal Farmers after attaining the age of 60 years.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: ICAR Senior Research Fellowship For Post-Graduate Studies In Agricultural Sciences
briefDescription: ICAR awards a certain number of Senior Research Fellowships for Ph.D. in an Agricultural University (AU), in different disciplines of agriculture and allied sciences. This is done to encourage talented students to undertake higher agricultural education.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Dakshta Aur Kushalta Sampann Hitgrahi (PM-DAKSH)
briefDescription: The scheme "PM-DAKSH", launched by the Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment (MoSJ&E), aims to empower socially, educationally, and economically marginalized groups like SCs, OBCs, EWS, DNTs, Safai Mitras, and Waste Pickers by enhancing their skills through high-quality training.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemeName: Nari Adalat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide an alternative grievance redressal mechanism for women at the grassroots level through mediation, counselling, and awareness of rights and entitlements.

schemeName: Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide completely free and cashless delivery, including caesarean section, for pregnant women at government health facilities along with free treatment for sick newborns and infants.

schemeName: Logistics Excellence, Advancement, and Performance Shield
briefDescription: The scheme aims to acknowledge and celebrate best practices and innovations in the logistics industry across sectors. It also aims to promote sustainability, efficiency, and technological advancement in alignment with national logistics initiatives.

schemeName: Prime Minister's Award for Yoga
briefDescription: The purpose of the Award is to recognize and felicitate individual(s)/ organization(s) who have made a significant impact on society for a sustained period by way of promotion and development of Yoga

schemeName: Tagore National Fellowship for Cultural Research
briefDescription: The Scheme has been introduced to invigorate and revitalize the various institutions under the Ministry of Culture and other identified cultural institutions in the country, by encouraging Fellows/academicians to affiliate themselves with these institutions to work on projects of mutual interest.

schemeName: Rotavator/Thresher Machine Equipment Assistance Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support BPL Scheduled Tribe farmers in tribal areas by providing financial assistance to purchase rotavators and thresher machines.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: Entrepreneurship and Skill Development Programme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship and skill development among youth by providing training and support for setting up MSMEs and self-employment ventures.

schemeName: NPC Students Internship Program
briefDescription: National Productivity Council (NPC) provides internship training to students pursuing graduation and post-graduation. The interns shall be given exposure to related interventions being activities undertaken by NPC which will provide opportunities to learn and implement new concepts.

schemeName: ICMR- Post Doctoral Fellowship
briefDescription: ICMR- Post Doctoral Fellowship (ICMR-PDF) Scheme is being instituted to foster high-quality research opportunities for promising fresh Ph.D./MD/MS holders in the areas of basic science, communicable and non-communicable diseases, & reproductive health including nutrition at ICMR Institutes/Centers.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of New and Renewable Energy
schemeName: National Renewable Energy Fellowship Scheme
briefDescription: Through this scheme, fellowships will be provided for pursuing higher studies/ advanced research in renewable energy. The fellowship scheme is directly aligned with the overall requirement of renewable energy, research thrust areas identified by MNRE.

schemeName: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Quality Upgradation / Certification: Drying Yards
briefDescription: The scheme "Quality Upgradation / Certification: Drying Yards" aims to facilitate the improvement of the quality of coffee produced by growers by encouraging them to establish infrastructure for quality enhancement and obtain certification for their coffees, enabling them to earn better returns.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Petroleum and Natural Gas
schemeName: Pratyaksh Hanstantrit Labh / Direct Benefits Transfer For LPG
briefDescription: PAHAL (DBTL) has been introduced to curb the diversion of subsidized LPG. Under the scheme, Consumers will pay the market price for the domestic cylinder and the subsidy will be transferred directly to their bank account

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - Education Loan
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide education loans to the students from the community of safai karamcharis\manual scavengers & their dependents for pursuing higher education.

schemeName: WISE Fellowship for Ph.D.
briefDescription: The "WISE Fellowship for Ph.D. (WISE-PhD)" of the Department of Science and Technology aims to provide an opportunity to carry out Doctoral research in basic and applied sciences to women scientists and technologists between the age group of 27-45 years who want to pursue research in STEM fields.

schemeName: Internship Programme At Serious Fraud Investigation Office
briefDescription: The Internship Programme at SFIO was started in 2017 to provide a platform for the interaction of talented and young scholars and researchers from reputed academic institutions who are pursuing Post-Graduation/Research Programs in Economics/ Commerce/Law/ Management and Computer Forensics, etc.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemeName: Women Helpline
briefDescription: "Women Helpline" provides 24X7 emergency and non-emergency response through the telephonic short-code 181 to women

schemeName: CBSE Merit Scholarship Scheme For Single Girl Child
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote girls’ education and provide ₹1,000 per month to meritorious single girl students studying in classes 11th and 12th.

schemeName: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: For Tractor Purchase
briefDescription: The scheme offers a specialized loan for farmers to purchase tractors, covering up to 90% of the tractor's cost.

schemeName: Distribution of Sewing Machines at Free of Cost
briefDescription: The scheme provides sewing machines to support individuals from Backward Classes (BC), Most Backward Classes (MBC), and Denotified Communities (DNCs) engaged in tailoring work, aiming to improve their livelihood opportunities.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Financial Assistance to Boat owner / Fishermen Captured by Pakistan Marine Security Agency (PMSA)-DNH&DD
briefDescription: The scheme aims to help the families of the fishermen affected due to captured by Pakistani Marine Security Agency. Under this scheme, daily assistance, repatriation allowances, and vessel reconstruction subsidies are provided.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemeName: The Operation of Production Linked Incentive Scheme (PLI) for Large Scale Electronics Manufacturing
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial incentives to boost domestic manufacturing and attract large investments in the electronics value chain, including electronic components and semiconductor packaging.

schemeName: Public Provident Fund Account(PPF)
briefDescription: The objective of the Public Provident Fund (PPF) scheme is to promote regular savings by offering a safe, long-term investment with good interest rates, encouraging financial security and disciplined saving habits.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Sukh Ashray Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide comprehensive care, education, and support to orphans, abandoned children, specially-abled individuals, destitute women, and senior citizens, recognizing them as “children of the state” and ensuring their holistic development.

schemeName: Museum Grant Scheme
briefDescription: Under this scheme provide financial support for establishing new museums, upgrading and modernizing existing ones, promoting digitization of collections, and enhancing the skills of museum professionals across regional, state, and district levels.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: MANAGE Internship Programme
briefDescription: MANAGE Internship Programme is open to students from the disciplines of Extension Education, Economics, Sociology, Psychology, MSW, Journalism, Communication, and Environmental Science. The internships are open year-round, and the duration ranges from 3 months upto 6 months.

schemeName: TEC Internship Scheme
briefDescription: The ‘TEC Internship Scheme’ intends to engage 25 Interns in order to study/formulate/operationalize/assess various works/projects/policies etc. The internship will provide an opportunity for young scholars to contribute to the TEC work and have insight into the related technical work.

schemeName: Welfare Services for Other Socially Disabled Persons (Senior Citizens & Destitute)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide care, protection, and financial assistance to elderly persons and socially disadvantaged individuals lacking family or financial support.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: ICAR Junior Research Fellowship For Post-Graduate Studies In Agricultural Sciences
briefDescription: ICAR awards a certain number of Junior Research Fellowships for Postgraduate Studies (course and research work) leading to a Master’s degree, in different disciplines of agriculture and allied sciences. This is done to encourage talented students to undertake higher agricultural education.

schemeName: Welfare Services for Women
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide welfare support and financial assistance for women in distress, including widows, victims of violence, trafficked women, and economically disadvantaged women.

schemeName: Overseas Visiting Doctoral Fellowship
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to build national capacity in frontier areas of Science and Engineering, which are of interest to India by providing research training to PhD students admitted in the Indian institutions in overseas universities / institutions of repute.

schemeName: Long Term Fellowship under the Human Resource Development Programme for Health Research
briefDescription: Long Term Fellowship under the Human Resource Development Programme for Health Research aims to provide advanced training in India and abroad to medical and health research personnel in cutting-edge research areas related to medicine and health.

schemeName: Food Safety & Standards Authority Of India (FSSAI) Internship Scheme
briefDescription: The Internship Program by the FSSAI provides interns with unique learning opportunities in various areas of food regulation of food safety administration. FSSAI is a statutory body established under the Food Safety & Standards Act, 2006 under the aegis of the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare.

schemeName: Large cardamom Irrigation Land Development : Irrigation equipment (nos)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to motivate the growers to bring more area under irrigation by constructing water storage structures, rain water harvesting structures and installation of irrigation equipments for increasing the productivity and improving quality of large cardamom.

schemeName: Large cardamom Irrigation Land Development : Rainwater harvesting structure(nos)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to motivate the growers to bring more area under irrigation by constructing water storage structures, rain water harvesting structures and installation of irrigation equipments for increasing the productivity and improving quality of large cardamom

schemeName: Dr. D.S. Kothari Research Grant For Newly Recruited Faculty Members
briefDescription: The scheme "Dr. D.S. Kothari Research Grant for Newly Recruited Faculty Members" is a research grant scheme by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Department of Higher Education (DoHE). The purpose of the research grant is to provide opportunities to regularly appointed faculty members.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Environment,forests and climate change
schemeName: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change Internship Scheme
briefDescription: The Scheme seeks to engage students, with Graduation/Postgraduation Degrees, as well as Research Scholars, enrolled in recognized Universities / Institutions within India, or abroad, as “Interns”. These "Interns" shall be inducted all over the country in various Divisions/Units of the Ministry.

schemeName: Petrochemicals Research & Innovation Commendation
briefDescription: The scheme aims to felicitate meritorious innovations in petrochemicals. It provides a citation, a memento, and Travel Allowance and Dearness Allowance for attending the ceremony to eligible Indian citizens, institutions, industries, and start-ups.

schemeName: Scheme For Arjuna Awards For Outstanding Performance In Sports And Games
briefDescription: The objective of Arjuna Awards is to recognize outstanding achievements of sportspersons in the field of sports at the international level. To be eligible for the award, a sportsperson should have good performance consistently for the previous four years at the international level.

schemeName: Chemical Promotion Development Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to facilitate the growth and development of the chemicals and petrochemicals industry through knowledge creation, dissemination, and excellence awards. It provides Grants-in-Aid to organisations and industry associations for conducting studies, seminars, and workshops.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC Students for studying in India
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to OBC students studying at the post-matriculation or post-secondary stage to enable them to complete their education. These scholarships shall be available for studies in India only and will be disbursed via Direct Benefit Transfer.

schemeName: Paired Early Career Fellowship in Applied Research
briefDescription: PECFAR is a fellowship to facilitate a two-way exchange of young early-career Indian and German researchers through short visits for networking and exploring avenues for collaboration and innovation in applied research.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Central Sector Scheme of National Fellowship for Providing Fellowship to Scheduled Caste Students to Pursue M.Phil. & PhD
briefDescription: The scheme provides opportunities to Scheduled Castes students to pursue higher education leading to M.Phil/Ph.D degrees in Sciences, Humanities and Social Science streams. The objective of the scheme is to provide fellowships in the form of financial assistance to SC students.

schemeName: E-YUVA Scheme: BIRAC’s Innovation Fellows (for post graduates and above)
briefDescription: BIRAC’s Innovation fellows shall apply as an individual and are required to work full time at EYC. BIRAC’s Innovation Fellows are expected to initiate biotech startups. Hence, only proposals with potential to commercialize innovative products and technologies will be considered for support.

schemeName: RMEWF-Financial Assistance For Ex-Servicemen In Penury
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial relief to destitute non-pensioner Ex-Servicemen and their widows. Through this scheme, financial assistance per month (paid annually) is provided for lifetime support.

schemeName: Junior Research Fellowship
briefDescription: The Department of Biotechnology, Ministry of Science & Technology, Government of India provides fellowships for pursuing research in biotechnology and life-sciences through the "DBT-Junior Research Fellowship" (DBT-JRF) Programme.

schemeName: Improved Cultivation and Advanced Retting Exercise (I-CARE)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support small and marginal jute growers with adequate pre and post harvesting operations to improve fiber quality and receive higher prices. The scheme provides 100% certified seeds at subsidized rates, free mechanical equipment, microbial consortiums, retting ponds.

schemeName: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: \Small Cardamom Replanting/New Planting: For Kerala & Tamilnadu
briefDescription: Under this scheme to motivate growers to improve production and productivity through systematic replanting of diseased, old, and senile plantations, and to undertake area expansion.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Water Resources,River Development & Ganga Rejuvenation
schemeName: Atal Bhujal Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve the management of groundwater resources in water-stressed areas. It provides institutional strengthening and financial incentives to Gram Panchayats and local communities for sustainable groundwater management and water-efficient practices.

schemeName: Atal Beemit Vyakti Kalyan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme “Atal Beemit Vyakti Kalyan Yojana (ABVKY)” was introduced by the Employees’ State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) on a pilot basis for a period of 2 years w.e.f. 01.07.2018 for providing relief to the Insured Persons (IPs) who have become unemployed.

schemeName: Central Sector Scheme for Rehabilitation of Bonded Labourer
briefDescription: The scheme addresses eradicating bonded labour in India. It introduces varying rehabilitation assistance amounts based on beneficiary categories, such as adults, children, women, and extreme cases, with provisions for annuity schemes and Direct Benefit Transfer.

schemeName: Post Doctoral Fellowship To Women Candidates
briefDescription: The UGC has initiated a scheme of “Post Doctoral Fellowship for Women” to those candidates, who are unemployed holding Ph.D. degree in their respective subject areas with an aim to accelerate the talented instincts of the women candidates to carry out the advanced studies and research.

nodalMinistryName: Comptroller And Auditor General Of India
schemeName: Student Internship Programme
briefDescription: The Student Internship Program, a unique learning opportunity aims to provide the Interns exposure to the functioning of the CAG of India and the Indian Audit & Accounts Department.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Vocational Education and Training Loan Scheme
briefDescription: The Vocational Education and Training Loan Scheme provides financial assistance to youth of the target group to enhance their skills & employability.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Education Loan Scheme
briefDescription: A scheme named Education Loan Scheme by National Scheduled Castes Finance and Development Corporation (NSFDC) under the M/o Social Justice and Empowerment provides loans to students from Scheduled Castes who are pursuing full-time professional or technical courses in recognized institutions.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: PM-YASASVI: Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to the OBC, EBC and DNT students studying at post-matriculation or post-secondary stage to enable them to complete their education.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: RKVY Soil Health and Fertility Village level Soil Testing Lab
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide easy and affordable access to soil testing facilities at the village level and support rural youth through financial assistance of ₹1,50,000/- for establishing Village Level Soil Testing Labs.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Garima Greh Shelter Homes For Transgender Persons
briefDescription: The aims to provide shelter, protection, rehabilitation, livelihood opportunities, and social reintegration support to transgender persons. It also provides shelter facilities, food, medical care, counselling, legal assistance, skill development, and document support to transgender persons.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC students
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to increase the Gross Enrolment Ratio of SC students in higher education by providing financial assistance to students from economically weaker families at the post-matriculation or post-secondary level, enabling them to continue and complete their education.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeShortTitle: SUPPLY OF SCHOOL UNIFORM, TIE BELT
schemeName: Supply of School Uniform and Tie belt to SC/ST Boys/ Girls Students of Std I to VIII
briefDescription: Supply of School Uniform and Tie belt to SC/ST Boys/ Girls Students of Std I to VIII studying in Govt Schools

schemeName: RMEWF-Financial Assistance For Education Of Children & Widows Of Ex-Servicemen
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹1,000/- per month per child to a maximum of two dependent children of eligible Ex-Servicemen (ESM) or their widows for school and undergraduate education, and to widows pursuing a postgraduate degree.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Viksit Bharat Rozgar Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to stimulate employment creation, increase workforce formalization, and enhance employability. It provides financial incentives to first-time employees and offers wage subsidies to eligible employers for creating sustained jobs, especially in manufacturing.

schemeName: Prime Minister Research Chair (PMRC) Scheme - For Fellows
briefDescription: The scheme is a flagship national initiative that aims to attract & engage leading Indian-origin researchers, scientists & professionals from abroad & place them at premier government higher education institutions & national research laboratories in India to undertake cutting-edge research.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: Agricultural Extension
briefDescription: Extension Division endeavours towards successful implementation of Agricultural Extension activities. Through its various programmes, schemes and activities, Extension Division helps farmers to get information regarding scientific research and new knowledge in agricultural practices.

schemeName: Pre-Matric Scholarship
briefDescription: Under this scheme to improve the educational status of students belonging to Other Backward Classes (OBC) by providing fee reimbursement and financial assistance, thereby promoting access to education and supporting their social and economic upliftment.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana - Recognition Of Prior Learning
briefDescription: A skill development scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship that enables Indian youth with prior learning experience or skills to obtain industry-relevant skill certification.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
briefDescription: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY) is an insurance scheme offering life insurance cover for death due to any reason. It is a one-year cover, renewable from year to year. The scheme is offered by banks/post offices and administered through life insurance companies.

schemeName: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
briefDescription: An employment scheme by the MoRD, providing provide at least 100 days of guaranteed wage employment in a financial year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled work. Any Indian citizen above the age of 18 years and residing in a rural area can apply to this scheme.

schemeName: State Marriage Assistance Scheme For Poor Girls
briefDescription: A social welfare scheme by the Social Welfare Department of the Government of Jammu & Kashmir, for Poor Girls of Marriageable Age who belong to either AAY (Antyodaya Anna Yojana) or PHH (Priority Households) ration card holder families. The scheme is operational in all the districts across the UT.

schemeName: National Overseas Scholarship For Scheduled Tribes (ST) Students
briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by the Ministry of Tribal Affairs for regular, full-time ST students to obtain higher education (post-graduate courses viz. Masters, Ph.D. and Post-Doctoral Research) from foreign institutes/universities. The Scheme is implemented through the Indian Embassies.

schemeName: Rajiv Gandhi National Fellowship For Scheduled Caste Candidates
briefDescription: The Rajiv Gandhi National Fellowship (RGNF) Scheme for Scheduled Caste is formulated and funded by the Ministry of Social Justice &Empowerment. The scheme is open to candidates who belong to Scheduled Caste and are pursuing higher studies such as regular and full-time M.Phil.and Ph.D.degrees.

schemeName: Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) And Research Associateship (RA) For Foreign Nationals
briefDescription: The scheme was initiated keeping in view the political and cultural bilateral relations of India with other developing countries: Asia, Africa, Latin America. The scheme has opened new vistas for foreign students and teachers, enable them to come to India and undertake advanced studies and research.

schemeName: Tripura Journalist Health Insurance Scheme
briefDescription: A Health Insurance Scheme by the Directorate of Information & Culture Affairs, for Journalists who are permanent residents of the state of Tripura. The applicant must be an accredited journalist by the state government or PIB. The age must be in between 21-65 years.

schemeName: KCR Nutrition Kit
briefDescription: KCR Nutrition Kits Scheme is a welfare initiative launched by the Government of Telangana, India, aimed at providing nutritious food to pregnant. The primary objective of the scheme is to improve the nutritional status of pregnant women.
tags: Providing Nutritious Food To Pregnant Women And Children
Improve The Nutritional Status Of Pregnant

schemeName: Rythu Bima Scheme
briefDescription: Rythu Bandhu Farmer Group Life  Insurance Scheme for Farmers” is a life insurance scheme by the Government of Telangana that provides insurance coverage to the nominee of a farmer in case of the farmer’s death. It is free for farmers and is implemented through LIC.

schemeName: Maulana Azad National Fellowship For Minority Students
briefDescription: Maulana Azad National Fellowship For Minority Students was launched in 2009 by the Ministry of Minority Affairs for providing financial aid to students for their higher studies.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: CIFE - Institutional Fellowship
briefDescription: From the year 2010 onwards, the division is offering Masters and PhD in two disciplines namely Fish Nutrition and Feed Technology and Fish physiology and Biochemistry with an objective of moulding professionals with fundamental and advanced knowledge and expertise.

schemeName: Employee Health Scheme
briefDescription: The Employee Health Scheme (EHS) is a government-run health scheme in Andhra Pradesh, providing cashless treatment at network hospitals for government employees, pensioners, and their families under the Dr. YSR Aarogyasri Healthcare Trust.

schemeName: Allowance To Dwarf
briefDescription: The government of Haryana introduce a scheme for social empowerment to the Dwarfs on 01.11.2014.

schemeName: Uttar Pradesh Old Age Pension Scheme
briefDescription: The Government of Uttar Pradesh has introduced an old-age pension scheme for the benefit of the senior citizens in the state. Under this scheme, eligible senior citizens will be provided with financial assistance in the form of a monthly pension.

schemeName: Assistance Scheme For Construction Worker In Case Of General Or Accidental Death Or Injury
briefDescription: This scheme will be called "Assistance Scheme for Beneficiary in Normal Death or Accident (in case of death or injury)" registered in Rajasthan Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. This scheme will be effective in entire Rajasthan.

schemeName: Nekar Samman Yojana
briefDescription: In 2020 amidst the Covid pandemic, Chief Minister of Karnataka launched a mega scheme Karnataka Nekar Samman Yojana. It was a relief scheme to provide financial support to destitute weaver of state engaged in the handloom and textile industry whose livelihood was adversely affected by the pandemic.

schemeName: Integrated Child Development Services: Chandigarh
briefDescription: The Integrated Child Development Service (ICDS) Scheme providing for supplementary nutrition, immunization and pre-school education to the children is a popular flagship programme of the government. Launched in 1975, it is one of the world’s largest programmes providing for an integrated package of

schemeName: Incentive for the SC Widow Re-Marriage
briefDescription: Under this scheme, the Social Welfare Department, Government of Karnataka gives incentives to the remarried widows belonging to SC Community. The incentive amount is ₹ 3 Lakh.

schemeName: Shramik Auzaar Sahayata Yojana
briefDescription: "Nirman Shramik Auzaar Sahayata Yojana" is a Social Welfare Scheme by the Department of Labour, Employment, Training & Skill Development Govt of Jharkhand. The scheme is also known as "Toolkit Assistance Scheme for Construction Workers" in English. This is a 100% State Sponsored Scheme.

schemeName: Haryana Divyang Pension Scheme
