schemeName: Scheme for Acquisition of Electro-Medical and Other Equipment (PIPDIC)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to financially assist the registered Medical practitioners for acquisition and installation of Electro Medical and other related equipment. The applications for this scheme are accepted online through the PIPDIC portal.

schemeName: Computer Training Scheme for Visually Impaired Persons
briefDescription: The scheme helps visually impaired individuals by giving them computer and screen-reading training and providing a laptop to the beneficiaries.

schemeName: Scheme of Assistance to Good Borrowers: ‘B’ Category
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support and reward existing industrial units and transport loanees who have maintained a satisfactory repayment track record. It provides term loans ranging from ₹5,00,000/- to ₹150,00,000/- for expansion, modernization, or acquisition of fixed assets.

schemeName: Scheme for Tourism-related Activities
briefDescription: The scheme aims to financially assist entrepreneurs for setting up or development of amusement parks, cultural centres, convention centres, restaurants, tourist service agencies, including expansion and modernization project. The applications for scheme are accepted online through PIPDIC portal.

schemeName: Scheme for Hospitals / Nursing Homes (PIPDIC)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to financially assist the entrepreneurs for setting up hospitals/nursing homes. The applications for this scheme are accepted online through the PIPDIC portal.

schemeName: Kisan Credit Card Scheme for Fisheries- Chief Minister Fishermen Prosperity Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide short-term loans for fisheries. It offers zero-percent interest working capital to the fish farmers through cooperative banks.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Kalyani Vivah Sahayta Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to widowed women during remarriage. It offers a one-time support of ₹2,00,000 to eligible kalyani beneficiaries.

schemeName: Teelu Rauteli Pension Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension of ₹1,200/- to male and female individuals above 18 years of age who have incurred a partial disability of 20% to 40% while performing agricultural activities.

schemeName: Scholarship to Divyang Students (Class 1 to 8)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹600/- for students in Class 1 to 5 and ₹960/- for students in Class 6 to 8, to regularly enrolled disable students.

schemeName: Procedure for Admission in Government Child Care Institution, Government Communication Home and Open Shelter Home
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support orphaned, destitute, abandoned & vulnerable children by providing them with clothing, food, accommodation, medical care, education & other essential facilities in Government Child Care Institutions, Government Communication Homes, & Open Shelter Homes within the state.

schemeName: Pension Scheme for Elderly, Destitute Artists, Litterateurs and Writers of Uttarakhand State
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to elderly and impoverished artists, litterateurs and writers who have dedicated their lives to the development of art, culture, and literature and have made significant and distinguished contributions.

schemeName: Nandaa Gaura Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for upto 2 girls in a family. Assistance is given in 2 installments per girl child: 1st installment of ₹11,000 is provided at the time of birth if girl is born in a hospital/ANM center & 2nd installment of ₹51,000 is given when girl passes Class 12th.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Authors for Book Publication
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the state's eminent litterateurs, writers, poets, and authors by providing financial assistance whose literary works remain unpublished due to financial constraints.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Bal Poshan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve the health of pre-school children (aged 3 to 6 years) by providing nutritious food, including eggs twice a week and banana chips twice a week, at Anganwadi Centres.

schemeName: Livelihood Opportunity Promotion Scheme (Disabled)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-reliance among persons with disabilities through grants, term loans, and margin money assistance.

schemeName: Award Scheme for Candidates Selected in NDA, IMA, OTA, INA, IAF
briefDescription: Under this scheme, a one-time award of ₹50,000/- is given to each candidate from Uttarakhand who has been selected for service at premier defence academies such as the NDA, IMA, OTA, INA, and IAF.

schemeName: Organization of Multi-Purpose Camps/ Public Awareness Camps/ Medical Camps/Legal Service Camps
briefDescription: The scheme aims to organize camps & awareness programs across urban & rural areas to inform and empower vulnerable groups such as women, children, senior citizens, workers in the unorganized sector, persons with disabilities, acid attack survivors & victims of trafficking about their legal rights.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Kaushal Unnayan and Vaishvik Rojgar Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide skill upgradation training along with country-specific training to the youth of the state, enabling them to secure employment opportunities abroad.

schemeName: Operation/implementation of Vidhik Seva Rath
briefDescription: The scheme aims to spread legal awareness and provide information about welfare schemes to people in both urban and remote rural areas, ensuring that citizens are informed about their rights and available government benefits.

schemeName: Scholarship to Poor Students
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to economically disadvantaged students enrolled in undergraduate and postgraduate programs at Uttarakhand Sanskrit University.

schemeName: Uttarakhand Compensation Scheme for Women Victims/Survivors of Sexual Offences and Other Crimes, 2020
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance/compensation ranging from a minimum of ₹3 lakh to a maximum of ₹10 lakh to women victims and survivors of sexual offences, as well as to other women victims of crime in the state.

schemeName: Dr. Dhyanpal Singh Memorial Award (for Final-Year Undergraduate Students of All Colleges)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support and encourage meritorious students by providing them with monetary assistance of ₹30,000/- in their final year of undergraduate studies, thereby reducing financial burdens.

schemeName: Shri Varun Panwar Memorial Award for B.Sc. Agriculture (2nd Year, 3rd Year, and 4th Year) Students
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize and encourage B.Sc. Agriculture students in their 2nd, 3rd, or 4th year of study by awarding them a cash prize of ₹10,000/- for their academic excellence.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Purchase or Construction of House (UKBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme provides loans of up to ₹50,000/- to construction workers registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (UKBOCWWB) for the purchase or construction of a house, at a minimum interest rate of 5% per annum.

schemeName: Maintenance Grant for Children with Disabilities from Birth
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹700/- per month to parents or guardians for the care of children below 18 years of age with more than 40% disability.

schemeName: Training Programme for Sugarcane Farmers
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the knowledge and skills of sugarcane farmers by providing free training and information on advanced and modern sugarcane cultivation techniques.

schemeName: Appointment of Contract Sports Coaches
briefDescription: The scheme facilitates the annual appointment of contract-based sports coaches to conduct various local training camps across Uttarakhand, thereby promoting employment opportunities and strengthening the state’s grassroots sports infrastructure.

schemeName: State Government-Run Old Age and Infirm Homes
briefDescription: Under this scheme, free residential, food, clothing, and healthcare are provided to destitute elderly individuals above 60 years in state-run residential facilities.

schemeName: Grant for Purchase and Repair of Various Assistive Devices/Equipment for Persons with Disabilities
briefDescription: Under this scheme, a grant of up to ₹3,500/- is provided for the purchase of individual aids, which may be increased to a maximum of ₹7,000/- in special cases. Additionally, ₹500/- is provided for the repair of prosthetic limbs and other assistive equipment.

schemeName: Assistance Scheme for Handloom Spinning-Weaving Women Workers
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support to traditional women workers whose primary occupation is handloom weaving, spinning, or related weaving activities. Under this scheme, eligible women workers are provided with handloom equipment, including looms & related equipment, worth upto ₹25,000/-.

schemeName: Ex-Gratia Payment for Loss of Hands, Legs, Eyes, or Vision
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial relief to individuals who suffer physical disabilities such as loss of limbs or vision as a result of disasters or while participating in relief and preparedness activities. Under this scheme, financial assistance between ₹74,000/- to ₹2,50,000/-is provided.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Swarozgar Yojana Ati Sukshm (Nano) Udhyam
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-employment and entrepreneurship among the residents of Uttarakhand by providing financial assistance through banks to facilitate the establishment of new micro (nano) enterprises as well as the expansion of existing businesses.

schemeName: Uttarakhand Oon Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote traditional wool spinning and weaving activities in the state while providing sustainable employment opportunities to local artisans and weavers.

schemeName: Silage evam Dudharu Pashu Poshan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve the nutrition of dairy animals and enhance milk production by providing subsidized silage and feed to members of milk cooperative societies.

schemeName: Dugdh Mulya Protsahan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage milk production and ensure fair remuneration to cattle farmers by providing financial incentives based on the quality of milk supplied to cooperative societies.

schemeName: Health Benefits for Pregnant Mothers and Newborns through Supraja-AYUSH
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the health and well-being of pregnant women and newborns by providing Ayurvedic-based healthcare services and treatment.

schemeName: Fish Farming Diversification (Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe) Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote economic empowerment and livelihood diversification among Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe communities through fisheries-based activities.

schemeName: National Food Security Scheme (Priority Households - White Ration Card) - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure food security for economically vulnerable and priority households in Uttarakhand by providing them with a guaranteed monthly supply of food grains at subsidized rates. Under the scheme, the eligible households are entitled to 5 kg of food grains per person per month.

schemeName: Organization of Sports Competitions and Training Programs
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote sports & identify grassroots-level talent among youth through structured competitions & training. Players are provided with cash prizes and free training, & participation is encouraged at multiple levels, including Gram Panchayat, Development Block, District, and State.

schemeName: Silkworm Rearing Chamber
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote sericulture & enhance silk production among farmers by providing financial assistance for establishing dedicated silkworm rearing chambers. Under this scheme, farmers are provided financial support of upto ₹1,00,000 (80:10:10 pattern) for construction of rearing chambers.

schemeName: Silk Tree Plantation
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote mulberry cultivation and silkworm rearing among farmers in Uttarakhand by providing financial assistance, technical support, and organized cluster-based sericulture activities to enhance their income and livelihood.

schemeName: Silkworm Rearing Equipment
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support individuals in silkworm rearing by providing necessary equipment, financial assistance, and technical guidance. Under this scheme, financial assistance of upto ₹40,000/- is provided to individuals for procuring essential equipment required for silkworm rearing.

schemeName: Vishesh Abhiyaan - Humdard
briefDescription: The scheme aims to organize special campaigns for senior citizens, mentally and physically challenged individuals, and other destitute people in the state to make them aware of welfare schemes, their legal rights, access to benefits, skill development, personal security & protection, etc.

schemeName: Promotion of Institutional Delivery
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote safe and institutional deliveries by providing free accommodation to pregnant women, especially from disaster-prone areas, near district hospitals.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Ekeekrit Bagwani Vikas Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote horticulture development in Uttarakhand by providing farmers with subsidized fruit plants, seeds, pesticides, & horticulture infrastructure such as Cool Houses & Refrigerator Vans, thereby increasing productivity, reducing post-harvest losses, & enhancing farmers’ income.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Purchase of Existing Assets
briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist the units who are in existence for a minimum period of 2 years with good track record. The assistance is provided for purchase of existing land, building and machinery with prescribed residual life. The applications for this scheme are accepted online only.

schemeName: Dr. S.K. Mukherjee Scholarship for B.Sc. Agriculture Students (2nd & 3rd Year)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support to meritorious students pursuing a B.Sc. Agriculture course in their 2nd and 3rd years of study by awarding a one-year scholarship of ₹1,100 per month.

schemeName: Scheme for Setting Up of Industrial Estates
briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist organizations (Public Limited Companies, Private Limited Companies, Partnerships, Sole Proprietary, and Municipalities) for setting up of industrial estates for exclusive allotment of sheds/plots to SSI units. The applications for this scheme are accepted online only.

schemeName: Scheme for Purchase of Paddy Harvesting Machine
briefDescription: "Scheme for Purchase of Paddy Harvesting Machine" aims to assist agriculturists belonging to Puducherry for the purchase of a tractor and harvesting machine to harvest the crops in their vicinity. The applications for this scheme are accepted online only.

schemeName: Capital Investment Subsidy for Establishment of 500 or More Seater Convention Centre as Above cum Hotel under MICE
briefDescription: The scheme aims to boost MICE tourism by incentivizing the creation of large convention centers. It provides a 15% capital subsidy up to ₹10,00,00,000/- to investors establishing convention centers with a 500+ seating capacity and a minimum investment of ₹20,00,00,000/-.

schemeName: Capital Investment Subsidy for Establishment of Way Side Amenities Under Green Field or Franchise Model
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the tourism experience by subsidizing the development of wayside amenities under Green Field or Franchise models. It offers a 15% capital investment subsidy capped at ₹50,00,000/- to investors who establish approved facilities with a minimum capital expenditure.

schemeName: Capital Investment Subsidy for Creation of Infrastructure
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the creation of essential infrastructure on leased tourism lands. It provides a 25% capital investment subsidy up to ₹3,00,00,000/- to private investors establishing power, water, road, and drainage systems for tourism projects.

schemeName: Supply Free Laptops to Visually Impaired Students Pursuing Higher Education
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free laptops to visually impaired students pursuing courses. The scheme is provisioned for providing laptops to the visually impaired students to pursue professional courses after XII, under-graduate and post-graduate courses.

schemeName: Vyasakabi Fakir Mohan Bhasabruti Scholarship
briefDescription: "Vyasakabi Fakir Mohan Bhasabruti Scholarship" is a Scholarship by the Higher Education Department, Govt. of Odisha. The objective of the scheme is the promotion of the Odia Language by way of encouraging meritorious students to take up higher studies in Odia Language at the U.G. and P.G. levels.

schemeName: State Horticulture Scholarship
briefDescription: The “State Horticulture Scholarship” is a scholarship scheme, launched by the Department of Horticulture, Government of Nagaland to provide scholarship/stipend to students who are pursuing B.Sc. (Horticulture) M.Sc. (Horticulture) Ph.D. (Horticulture) courses.

schemeName: Sudakshya For Girls Child Scholarship
briefDescription: This scholarship provides financial assistance to all deserving students who want to pursue higher studies.  Under this scholarship scheme, the students fulfilling the eligibility criteria will receive a maintenance allowance and other benefits.

schemeName: Vijayamritham Scheme - Cash Award For Meritorious Children With Disabilities
briefDescription: The scheme “Vijayamritham Scheme - Cash Award for Meritorious Children with Disabilities” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

schemeName: Educational Assistance To Children Of Prisoners (Pursuing Professional Course)
briefDescription: The scheme “Educational Assistance to Children of Prisoners (Pursuing Professional Course)” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

schemeName: Scheme of Scholarship for Sainik Schools
briefDescription: "Scheme Of Scholarship For Sainik Schools" was launched by the Directorate Of Higher and Technical Education, Meghalaya, to prepare young boys for a career in the Cadre of the Armed Forces. The scholarships are awarded to students whose family income is less than ₹8,000/- per month.

schemeName: Biju Patnaik Sports Award for Excellence in Coaching
briefDescription: The award is given to the coaches who have devoted their career to imparting Coaching in any of the major sports disciplines and have coached Sportspersons achieving excellence at National and International levels.

schemeName: Pichda Varg Post Matric Chhatravritti
briefDescription: Under Pichda Varg Post Matric Chhatravritti Madhya Pradesh Government aimed at providing financial assistance to economically disadvantaged students belonging to these marginalized communities.

schemeName: Research (PhD) Scholarship for SC/ST Students
briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Higher Education Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh, offers financial support for PhD research work to SC/ST students. Eligible students receive ₹16,000/- per month, totaling ₹1,92,000/- per year, which is directly transferred to their bank accounts.

schemeName: Prathibha Scholarship Programme
briefDescription: Prathibha Scholarship Programme is aimed at motivating bright Students to higher studies in Science by awarding Scholarships. Prathibha Scholars are also provided opportunities to attend Science Orientation Programmes and interact with pioneers in Science through the SPEED Scheme.

schemeName: Abhinandan Education Loan Subsidy Scheme
briefDescription: Chief Minister Sarbananda Sonowal launched the Assam Abhinandan Education Loan Subsidy Scheme at the Srimanta Sankardev International Auditorium on 26 December 2019 in the presence of Finance Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma, , several senior officials of the State Finance Department, and bank officials

schemeName: Assam Abhinandan Education Loan Subsidy Scheme
briefDescription: "Assam Abhinandan Education Loan Subsidy Scheme" was launched on 26 December 2019 by the Hon'ble Chief Minister of Assam. The scheme is managed by the Finance Department, Govt. of Assam. The govt. will provide a loan subsidy of up to ₹ 50,000 on education loans to students pursuing higher education.

schemeName: Motor Vehicle Driver-Conductor Welfare Scheme- Chief Minister Self-Employment Scheme for Drivers/Conductors
briefDescription: This scheme aims to support self-employment for registered drivers and conductors by providing financial assistance for the purchase of vehicles to eligible beneficiaries.

schemeName: Exposure Visits To The Assam Legislative Assembly
briefDescription: The Exposure Visits to the Assam Legislative Assembly scheme was introduced in the budget speech during the first Budget Session in July 2016. It aims to provide an opportunity for Political Science students in Assam to visit and observe the functioning of the Assam Legislative Assembly.

schemeName: Payment Related to Wheat Procurement
briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure timely online payment to farmers for wheat sold at government procurement centers through the Just-In-Time (JIT) system directly into their bank accounts.

schemeName: Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram Madhya Pradesh
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free healthcare services to pregnant women and infants up to one year of age, including free treatment, medicines, diet, and transport facilities in government hospitals.

schemeName: Haryana Merit Cum Means Scheme For Minority
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to meritorious students from minority communities in Haryana for pursuing professional and technical courses.

schemeName: Post Matric Scholarship for SC students (Delhi)
briefDescription: The scheme "Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students" aims to support SC students financially for post-matriculation studies. Benefits include fee reimbursement and monthly allowances. Intended beneficiaries are SC students with a family income below ₹2,50,000/- annually.

schemeName: Mukhya Mantrir Eti koli duti paat
briefDescription: Mukhya Mantrir Eti koli duti paat also referred to as the Assam Tea Garden Workers' Financial Assistance Scheme 2025. This initiative marks the 200th-year celebration of Assam Tea and aims to provide one-time financial assistance to tea garden workers in recognition of their invaluable contribution.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Vanbandhu Kalyan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme provides comprehensive support through six key components, including integrated village development under Pradhan Mantri Adi Adarsh Gram Yojana, development of Particularly Vulnerable Tribal Groups, support to Tribal Research Institutes, and Pre-Matric and Post-Matric Scholarships.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Scholarships for Higher Education for Young Achievers Scheme (SHREYAS)  (OBC & Others)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure the educational empowerment of OBC and EBC students. Through this scheme, fellowships and interest subsidies on overseas education loans are provided to eligible beneficiaries.

schemeName: BSR Fellowship Scheme for Science Students - UGC
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide opportunities to meritorious candidates to undertake advanced studies and research leading to Ph.D. degrees in sciences.

schemeName: National Service Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the National Service Scheme (NSS) is to develop the personality and character of students through voluntary community service. The scheme aims to promote social responsibility, leadership, national integration, and a spirit of selfless service among youth.

schemeName: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme- Chhattisgarh
briefDescription: Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹500/- is provided to severely disabled (with a disability of 80% and above) and multi-disabled individuals aged 18 to 79 years who are living below the poverty line (BPL) to support them in living a respectful life.

schemeName: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme- Chhattisgarh
briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹500/- is provided to widows aged 40 to 79 years who are living Below the Poverty Line (BPL) to support them in living a respectful life. This scheme is centrally sponsored.

schemeName: New Charkha-Loom Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme provides 65% financial assistance for purchasing Amber Charkhas (₹13,000/-) and looms (₹30,000/-) to registered Khadi spinners and weavers, promoting sustainable livelihoods.

schemeName: Meghalaya Goat Farming Scheme
briefDescription: The Meghalaya Goat Farming Development Scheme is a component of the Chief Minister’s CM-ELEVATE Program, launched by the Govt of Meghalaya. It aims to employ, engage, and empower youth and rural communities by promoting goat farming entrepreneurship, providing easy access to credit and subsidies.

schemeName: Meghalaya Poultry Farming Scheme
briefDescription: The Meghalaya Poultry Farming Scheme is a component under the Chief Minister’s CM-ELEVATE Program launched  by the Government of Meghalaya. It aims to employ, engage, and empower the youth and rural communities by  promoting poultry entrepreneurship through easy access to credit and subsidies.

schemeName: Chief Ministers Green Taxi Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme promotes clean mobility and electric vehicle adoption in the Greater Shillong Planning Area, while supporting green entrepreneurship and sustainable transport through financial incentives.

schemeName: Poultry Farming Scheme (HSFDC)
briefDescription: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans/benefits to individuals from Below Poverty Line (BPL) families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in both rural and urban areas for self-employment income generating activities such as poultry farming.

schemeName: Trade and Business Sector Scheme (HSFDC)
briefDescription: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans/benefits to individuals from BPL families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in both rural & urban areas for various self-employment income-generating activities such as running a stationery shop, kiryana shop, cloth shop, etc.

schemeName: The Scheme for Fellowship to Under Graduate Students for Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University
briefDescription: "The Scheme for Fellowship to Under Graduate Students for Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University" provides monthly fellowship to meritorious undergraduate students across various faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University.

schemeName: Planning for Best Livestock Keeper's Award Function
briefDescription: The "Planning for Best Livestock Keeper's Award Function" scheme by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department honors outstanding pastoralists in Gujarat by awarding them at Taluka, District, and State levels for their excellence in animal husbandry.

schemeName: Assistance for Cultivation of Medicinal/ Aromatic Crops
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance up to 75% of the cost or ₹11,250/- per hectare (whichever is lower) to farmers in Gujarat cultivating medicinal or aromatic crops on land between 0.20 and 4 hectares.

schemeName: Education Loan Scheme under NSKFDC- Haryana
briefDescription: This scheme offers educational loans of up to ₹10 lakhs for studies within India and up to ₹20 lakhs for studies abroad. These loans are available to eligible students pursuing regular full-time recognized professional/technical courses in India or abroad.

schemeName: Trainning Scheme for Horticulture Skill Development to Landless farm labour at Centre of Excelence of Department
briefDescription: The "Training Scheme for Horticulture Skill Development to Landless Farm Labour at Centre of Excellence of Department" aims to provide skill development training in horticulture to landless farm labourers through the Centres of Excellence.

schemeName: 100% State Government Divyangjan Term Loan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme provides provide financial support to native residents of Gujarat who have a disability of 40% or more. The eligible individuals can avail of a term loan ranging from ₹50,000/- to ₹1,00,000/- at a concessional interest rate of 6% per annum for a repayment period of five years.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Destitute Elderly and Disabled Person
briefDescription: The scheme "Financial Assistance to Destitute Elderly and Disabled Person" provides monthly financial aid to elderly individuals (60+) and severely disabled persons who meet specific income and dependency criteria.

schemeName: Passenger Vehicle/Loading Vehicle Loan Scheme (DAADC)
briefDescription: The "Passenger Vehicle/Loading Vehicle Loan Scheme" introduced by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department provides financial support to unemployed individuals from Antyodaya Caste for purchasing passenger or freight vehicles.

schemeName: New Akanksha Scheme (Higher Education Loan) (GGDC)
briefDescription: This scheme provides educational loans of up to ₹15.00 lakh to students belonging to the Rabari and Bharwad castes from socially and educationally backward classes for pursuing higher professional courses such as medical, dental, engineering, pharmacy, etc.

schemeName: Coaching Sahay for the Preparation of NEET, JEE, GUJCET Examination to both Socially and Educationally Backward Class Trainees/Students and Female Students and Economically Backward Class Students
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support Socially and Educationally Backward Class (SEBC) and Economically Backward Class (EBC) students with coaching fee assistance. Up to ₹20,000 or actual fee is provided for one exam preparation.

schemeName: Special Incentive Assistance to Socially and Educationally Backward Class Trainees for Pre-preparation of Competitive Examination
briefDescription: Under this scheme, to provide financial assistance of up to ₹20,000/- to socially and educationally backward class students preparing for state and central government job exams.

schemeName: Maintenance of Govt Boys and Girls Hostels (SC)
briefDescription: Under this scheme, it provides free hostel, food, and academic facilities to scheduled caste students pursuing post-SSC education.

schemeName: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance for the Production and Publication of Excellent Original Children's Literature
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote high-quality literary works for children by providing financial support to Gujarati authors for publishing original, unpublished children's books that contribute to cultural and moral development.

schemeName: One Tea Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the One Tea Scheme is to ensure a minimum guaranteed price for fresh tea leaves to protect tea farmers from financial losses and provide economic stability. It also aims to support bought-leaf factories and promote sustainable tea cultivation in Meghalaya.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Samarth-Respite Care Scheme
briefDescription: Samarth (Respite Care) scheme, launched by the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, aims at setting up Samarth Centres for providing respite and residential care for the specified categories of Persons with Disability (PwD).

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Pre- Matric Scholarships Scheme for Scheduled Castes & Others
briefDescription: The Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme for Scheduled Castes & others is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme implemented by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of India.

schemeName: Kunwar Bai Nu Mameru Yojana- SEBC & EBC
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide marriage-related financial aid of ₹12,000 per daughter (up to two daughters per family) to socially and educationally backward classes and economically backward class families.

schemeName: Kutirjyoti Yojana Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free household electricity connections to Scheduled Tribe families in tribal areas.

schemeName: Visiting Advanced Joint Research Faculty Scheme
briefDescription: VAJRA Faculty Scheme is a dedicated program exclusively for overseas scientists and academicians with emphasis on NRI and Persons of Indian Origin/Overseas Citizen of India to work as adjunct/visiting faculty for a specific period of time in Indian Public funded academic and research institutions.

schemeName: SERB International Research Experience
briefDescription: The Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), a statutory body under the Department of Science and Technology, Government of India has launched "SERB International Research Experience (SIRE)".

schemeName: SERB Research Scientist Scheme
briefDescription: SERB Board has launched a new ‘SERB Research Scientist (SRS) Scheme’ for the awardees of INSPIRE Faculty and Ramanujan Fellowships, who fail to secure regular positions after completion of the regular tenure of five years in the respective schemes.

schemeName: J.C. Bose Fellowship
briefDescription: The “J.C. Bose fellowship” is awarded to active scientists in recognition of their outstanding performance. The fellowship is scientist-specific and very selective.

schemeName: National Energy Conservation Award
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize and reward organizations for their exemplary efforts in energy conservation and energy efficiency.

schemeName: National Dhanwantari Ayurveda Award
briefDescription: The objective of the award is to motivate vaidyas and Ayurveda experts to adopt and showcase best practices in Ayurveda, promoting high standards of excellence. The award also aims to encourage innovation and outstanding performance in the field through healthy competition.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: New Swarnima Scheme For Women
briefDescription: A term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment for women entrepreneurs from backward classes to obtain a loan of up to ₹ 2,00,000/- @ 5% per annum, thereby providing them social & financial security.

schemeName: Integrated Dairy Development Scheme Gujarat
briefDescription: Under this scheme, tribal women beneficiaries are provided with milch cattle, dairy equipment, and financial assistance of up to ₹90,000 per unit.

schemeName: Rastriya Arogya Nidhi - Health Minister’s Cancer Patient Fund
briefDescription: The scheme-component aims to provide financial assistance to poor patients living below the poverty line and suffering from cancer, for their treatment at 27 Regional Cancer Centers (RCCs).

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Package : Insurance Scheme For Health Workers Fighting COVID-19
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial protection through insurance cover of ₹50,00,000/- to healthcare workers fighting COVID-19.

schemeName: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Consolidation of Coffee
briefDescription: The scheme "Consolidation of Coffee" aims to increase the productivity of the existing coffee holdings by gap filling or rejuvenation, followed by improved cultivation methods such as application of compost, bush management, shade management, pest and disease control, etc.

schemeName: Scholarship Scheme for Girl Children of Workers of Jute Mills/MSME JDP Units
briefDescription: National Jute Board Act, 2008 provides to “secure better working conditions and provisions and improve amenities and incentives for workers engaged in the jute industry.”

schemeName: Deen Dayal SPARSH Yojana (Scholarship For Promotion Of Aptitude & Research In Stamps As A Hobby)
briefDescription: "Deen Dayal SPARSH Yojana" awards annual scholarships to students who have good academic records and are also pursuing 'Philately' as a hobby. The objective is to “Promote Philately among children at a young age in a sustainable manner that can reinforce and supplement the academic curriculum.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Pension Scheme to Disabled Persons (Divyangjan)- DNH & DD
briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Social Welfare Department to provide financial assistance to individuals with disabilities. The primary objective is to provide financial benefits to eligible Divyangjan to cater to their basic needs. The scheme is targeted at Divyangjan aged between 18 to 59 years.

schemeName: Varishtha Pension Bima Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a pension scheme for senior citizens. Through this scheme, immediate annuity, pension, and return of purchase price on death are provided to citizens aged 60 years and above.
tags: Return Of Purchase Price On Death

schemeName: Integrated Child Development Services Scheme
briefDescription: In Nagaland, the ICDS programme was launched in the year 1975 in the Jalukie block of Peren district with 50 Anganwadi centres. The programme has since grown and at present, there are 60 (sixty) ICDS projects in 11 (Eleven) districts of the State.

schemeName: State Research Scholarship
briefDescription: This scholarship is specially designed for students who are pursuing research work. Under the scheme, beneficiaries will get cash awards to conduct their research work.

schemeName: WISE Post-Doctoral Fellowship
briefDescription: “WISE Post-Doctoral Fellowship” is a new programme of the Department of Science & Technology that aims to provide opportunities to women scientists & technologists between the age group of 27-60 years who want to continue their research as bench-level scientists in basic and applied sciences.

schemeName: LLB Internship Programme
briefDescription: Department of Justice introduced an Internship Programme for young law students. The purpose is to well acquaint law students in the field of research & referencing work, in various specialized areas of justice delivery, such as Tele-Law, Nyaya Bandhu etc.

schemeName: Good Samaritan Scheme
briefDescription: Launched on 3rd Oct 2021 by the MoRTH, the scheme grants an award to the good samaritan who has saved the life of a victim of a fatal accident (involving a motor vehicle) by administering immediate assistance and rushing to the Hospital/Trauma Care Centre within the Golden Hour of the accident.

schemeName: National Scheme Of Incentive To Girls For Secondary Education
briefDescription: The National Scheme of Incentive to Girls for Secondary Education promotes the girl child's enrolment of 14-18 years age group at secondary stage, who passes class 8th and subsequently drops out for various socio-economic reasons.

schemeName: Savitribai Jyotirao Phule Fellowship For Single Girl Child
briefDescription: Savitribai Jyotirao Phule Fellowship for Single Girl Child (SJSGC) is a Fellowship Scheme by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Department of Higher Education, for pursuing research work leading to the award of a Ph.D. degree. The target group of this scheme is the ‘single girl child'.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemeName: Advanced Vocational Training Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide innovative, effective and integrated training opportunities for work force who need new skills to enjoy the dignity that comes with employment, independence and self-reliance.

schemeName: Teelu Rauteli Award
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize and honor women and adolescent girls who have made outstanding achievements in various fields such as social work, education, literature, art, culture, courage, and bravery.

schemeName: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: For Minor Irrigation
briefDescription: The scheme offers loans to farmers for minor irrigation projects, aiming to enhance water access for agriculture. Loan amounts range from ₹65,000/- to ₹1,20,000/- at an interest rate of 11% to 11.75%.

schemeName: Issuance of Free House Sites
briefDescription: This scheme provides free residential land sites to eligible individuals from the Backward Classes (BC), Most Backward Classes (MBC), and Denotified Communities (DNC) who do not own a house or land, helping them secure housing stability.

schemeName: PM Street Vendor’s AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
briefDescription: PM SVANidhi is a micro-credit scheme launched on 1st June 2020 by the MoHUA to provide handholding support to street vendors. The scheme facilitates a working capital collateral-free loan of ₹10,000, with subsequent loans of ₹20,000 and ₹50,000 with a 7% interest subsidy.

schemeName: Financial Assistance To Visually Challenged Teachers
briefDescription: Financial assistance scheme providing up to ₹36,000 annually to visually challenged permanent college teachers for reader assistance, Braille books, and learning aids. Implemented by University Grants Commission to support teaching, research, and academic independence.

schemeName: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for White Goods (Air Conditioners and LED Lights)
briefDescription: The scheme targets manufacturers of components / sub-assemblies of Air Conditioners & LED Lights and offers 4–6% incentive on incremental sales to boost localization, reduce imports, and build a domestic supply chain.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Pre-Matric Scholarships to the Children of Those Engaged in Occupations Involving Cleaning and Prone to Health Hazards
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to children whose parents/guardians belong to one of the following categories, to pursue Pre-Matric education: Tanners, Flayers, Waste Pickers and Persons who are either presently engaged in Manual Scavenging.

schemeName: Prime Minister’s Internship Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide internship opportunities to one crore youth in top 500 companies in five years. Through this Scheme, youth will gain exposure for 12 months to real-life business environment, across varied professions and employment opportunities.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Statistics and Programme Implementation
schemeName: Scheme of Internship for Post-Graduate/Research Students
briefDescription: MoSPI is implementing the scheme of Internship for Post-graduate/Research Students of Statistics/ Mathematical Statistics/ Operations Research/ Economics/ Demography or any of the applied field of Statistics of recognized Universities//Institutions.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of New and Renewable Energy
schemeName: National Renewable Energy Internship Scheme
briefDescription: The "National Renewable Energy Internship Scheme" by MNRE provides internship opportunities to facilitate students pursuing undergraduate/graduate/post-graduate degrees (Engineering, Science, Management, Law, etc) or research scholars enrolled in recognized institutes/universities.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: Khadi Gramodyog Vikas Yojana: Gramodyog Vikas Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase productivity and wages of Khadi artisans, improve production infrastructure, boost employment and sales, revive traditional rural skills, modernize sales outlets, and promote marketing and exports.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Development Of North Eastern Region
schemeName: Financial Support To The Students Of N.E.R For Higher Professional Courses (NEC Merit Scholarship)
briefDescription: The scholarship scheme aims to support students of the North Eastern States undergoing studies in different disciplines at different levels in Institutions inside as well as outside the North-East but within the country.

schemeName: Ramalingaswami Re-Entry Fellowship
briefDescription: The Department of Biotechnology has instituted a scheme known as the “Ramalingaswami Re-Entry Fellowship”. The scheme is aimed at Indian Nationals who are working overseas in various fields of biotechnology and life sciences and are interested in taking up scientific research positions in India.

schemeName: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme for Railway Protection Force
briefDescription: Prime Minister’s Scholarship Scheme (PMSS) for RPF was announced by Hon’ble Prime Minister of India in his address to the nation from the historical Red Ford on 15th August 2005 to encourage higher technical and professional education for the dependent wards of Ex/Serving RPF/RPSF personnel& widows.

schemeName: Research Associates (RA)
briefDescription: The Research Associates (RAs) of the Department of Biotechnology (DBT) in India are individuals who engage in research work under the DBT-Research Associateship Program in Biotechnology and its was started in 1999.

schemeName: IGSTC Industrial Fellowship- PhD Industrial Exposure Fellowship
briefDescription: The "Indo-German Science & Technology Centre (IGSTC) Industrial Fellowship Programme" was launched by Secretary, Department of Science and Technology, Govt. of India on the occasion of IGSTC’s 11th Foundation Day on 14th June 2021 to support young Indian researchers for industrial exposure in German

schemeName: Prime Minister’s Fellowship for Doctoral Research
briefDescription: Prime Minister’s Fellowship for Doctoral Research scheme is a prestigious initiative of Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), Department of Science & Technology, Government of India towards the advancement of university research engagements in line with industry requirement.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Establishment of Small Scale Poultry Unit (Layer) for livestock owner of Daman & Diu
briefDescription: The scheme aims at the economic upliftment of the SC/ST, SMF, and BPL Families. Through this scheme, financial assistance in the form of a subsidy is provided to SC/ST, SMF, and BPL families.

schemeName: Women In Science and Engineering-Societal Challenges with Opportunities Fellowship
briefDescription: The “WISE-SCOPE Fellowship” Program was started by the Department of Science & Technology, Government of India with the aims to provide opportunity to Women Scientists and Technologists who have completed Ph.D. and want to utilize their S&T knowledge and expertise for the benefit of society.

schemeName: Prime Minister’s Fellowship for Doctoral Research
briefDescription: Prime Minister’s Fellowship for Doctoral Research scheme is a prestigious initiative of Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), Department of Science & Technology, Government of India towards the advancement of university research engagements in line with industry requirement.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: National Fellowship for Students with Disabilities
briefDescription: A Scheme "National Fellowship For Students With Disabilities" was initiated by the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities under the "Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment".

schemeName: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Degree)
briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by MoE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical degree course in an AICTE approved institution. The benefits are provided for max. 4 years for first-year admitted students and max. 3 years for second-year admitted students through lateral entry.

schemeName: Internship Scheme Of The Ministry Of Labour & Employment
briefDescription: Through the Internship Scheme, the Ministry of Labour & Employment engage eligible students as “Interns" to work for mutual benefit. The “Interns” shall have an opportunity to know about the Government functioning and Department Policy issues in the Government of India.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemeName: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme-2
briefDescription: To promote apprenticeship training in the country, by providing partial stipend support to the apprentices engaged under the Apprentice Act, 1961, undertaking capacity building of the apprenticeship ecosystem, and providing advocacy assistance to the stakeholders.

schemeName: Promotion of Exportable surplus of identified spices in NE: Cultivation of NE ginger (Ha)
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to promote the cultivation of ginger in the North Eastern region by supporting farmers with financial assistance for quality planting material, enhancing productivity and quality, and increasing the exportable surplus of spices from the region.

schemeName: Quality Improvement Programme (QIP)
briefDescription: The primary objective of this scheme is to enhance the expertise and capabilities of faculty members in degree and diploma-level institutions across the country. The aim is to enable teachers to acquire Master's and Doctoral degrees and instil in them a culture of research.

schemeName: Post Doctoral Fellowship to Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe Candidates
briefDescription: This scheme has been initiated keeping in view social background of candidates from the deprived section of society and to provide them an opportunity to undertake advanced studies and research in Science, Engineering & Technology, Humanities and Social Sciences in Indian Universities/Institutions.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana
briefDescription: This is a micro-financing programme aiming towards the empowerment of women from underprivileged backgrounds or economically backward areas. Through this scheme, these women can apply for a loan at a nominal interest rate to fulfil their dreams and goals and gain financial independence.

schemeName: RMEWF-Financial Assistance To 100% Disabled Child Of Ex-Servicemen
briefDescription: A scheme to provide financial assistance to Ex-Servicemen or their widows for their 100% disabled child.

schemeName: Jute Design Resource Centre Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to foster innovation and product diversification in the Jute Diversified Products sector. It provides innovative designs, skill training, and technical specifications to Jute Artisans, Micro Small and Medium Enterprises, Exporters, and Women Self Help Groups.

schemeName: Education Loan Scheme of NMDFC
briefDescription: Loan of upto ₹20,00,000/- for domestic courses & ₹30,00,000/- for courses abroad under Credit  Line-1 and Credit line -2 is extended to beneficiaries belong to minority communities at 3% p.a. & 8% p.a respectively.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Upgradation of Merit of Scheduled Caste Students
briefDescription: The scheme aims to upgrade the merit of Scheduled Caste students by providing them with facilities for all round development through education in residential or non-residential schools, addressing their educational deficiencies that prevent them from taking advantage of reservation quotas.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Construction of Hostels for OBC Boys and Girls
briefDescription: The Scheme aims at providing hostel facilities to students belonging to socially and educationally backward classes, especially from rural areas, to enable them to pursue secondary and higher education.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Scheme for Promotion of Affordable Rental Smart Housing (SPARSH 2.0): Registering Housing Complexes
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote affordable rental housing infrastructure. Through this scheme, registration and recognition benefits are provided to eligible housing complexes.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Pension Scheme to Old Age Persons (Senior Citizen)-DNH&DD
briefDescription: The objective of this scheme is to provide financial support to eligible senior citizens to cater to their basic needs. The scheme benefits senior citizens aged 60 years and above, providing a monthly pension of ₹1,500/- for those aged 60–69 years and ₹2,000/- for those aged 70 years and above.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeShortTitle: SUPPLY OF SCHOOL UNIFORM AND TIE BELT
schemeName: Supply of School Uniform and Tie belt to other than SC/ST Boys Students of Std I to VIII
briefDescription: Supply of School Uniform and Tie belt to other than SC/ST Boys Students of Std I to VIII studying in Govt Schools

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Supply of School Stationery to all Students for IX to XII
briefDescription: Supply of School Stationery to all Students for IX to XII studying in Govt Schools

schemeName: Post Doctoral Fellowship (PRL Funded)
briefDescription: The fellowship offers candidates the opportunity to pursue research in PRL’s cutting-edge science & engineering research areas. The tenure of the fellowship is for a maximum of two years, subject to annual progress reviews. The fellowship provides a competitive stipend, research opportunities.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: PM-YASASVI: Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
briefDescription: The objective of the Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC, and DNT students (who are not covered under SC, ST, or OBC) is welfare and motivation to the children of these categories by providing financial assistance at pre-matriculation or secondary stage.

schemeName: Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award
briefDescription: The Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award was established to commemorate the birth centenary of Pujya Shri Mota, the founder of the Hari Om Ashram, Nadiad. It is awarded to an eminent Indian scientist for their innovative and outstanding contributions to the field of Science and Technology.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC and DNT Students - DNH & DD
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide educational empowerment and financial assistance to OBC, EBC, and DNT students. Through this scheme, ₹4,000/- per annum is provided to eligible students studying in Classes 9 and 10 in Government Schools.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Post Matric Scholarship for students with Disabilities - DNH & DD
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide scholarship assistance and educational support to students with benchmark disabilities. Through this scheme, financial assistance, tuition fee support, maintenance allowance, and related benefits are provided to eligible students with disabilities.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Pre-Matric  Scholarship for Students with  Disabilities, DNH & DD
briefDescription: The scheme provides a maintenance allowance of ₹500 per month for day scholars and ₹800 per month for hostellers, a disability allowance of up to ₹4,000 per annum, and a book allowance of ₹1,000 per annum to support the school education of students with disabilities.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Pre Matric Scholarship for SC students- DNH & DD

schemeName: Post Graduate Scholarship for University Rank Holders Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to attract talented students towards higher education and promote academic excellence at the postgraduate level. The scholarship is tenable for the full duration of the postgraduate course, subject to a maximum period of two years.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: Netaji Subhas - ICAR International Fellowship
briefDescription: The scheme aims to develop competent human resources in agriculture and allied sciences through international doctoral education and research opportunities, while providing fellowship support, travel assistance, and exposure to world-class institutions.

schemeName: Prime Minister Research Chair (PMRC) Scheme - For Host Institutions
briefDescription: The scheme is a flagship national initiative that aims to attract & engage leading Indian-origin researchers, scientists & professionals from abroad & place them at premier government higher education institutions & national research laboratories in India to undertake cutting-edge research.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: National Talent Scholarship Postgraduate
briefDescription: Merit-based support through the National Talent Scholarship to the post-graduate students seeking admission in agricultural universities in a state other than the state of their domicile through ICAR All India Entrance Examination (AIEE).

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: Student READY (Rural Entrepreneurship Awareness Development Yojana)
briefDescription: The Student READY (Rural Entrepreneurship Awareness Development Yojana) program aims to provide rural entrepreneurship awareness, and practical experience in a real-life situation in rural agriculture, and create awareness to undergraduate students about practical agriculture and allied sciences.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Education to the Wards of Beedi/Cine/IOMC/LSDM Workers – Pre & Post-Matric
briefDescription: The scheme aims to fund the pre-matric and post-matric education of wards belonging to specific mine, beedi, and cine workers. It provides annual scholarships between ₹1,000/- and ₹25,000/- based on the student's academic level and course type.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana (PMBJP)
briefDescription: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana was launched by the Department of Pharmaceuticals, in November 2008. Under the scheme, dedicated outlets known as Janaushadhi Kendras are opened to make quality generic medicines available to all at affordable prices.

schemeName: Pravasi Bharatiya Bima Yojana
briefDescription: A mandatory insurance scheme by Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) for safeguarding the interests of Indian emigrant workers falling under Emigration Check Required (ECR) category going for overseas employment to ECR countries.

schemeName: SMILE - Comprehensive Rehabilitation For Welfare Of Transgender Persons – Skill Development And Training
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide employment opportunities to the person belonging to transgender person community by providing them market-oriented skills.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: SMILE - Comprehensive Rehabilitation For Welfare Of Transgender Persons
briefDescription: A scheme to provide Financial Assistance in the form of scholarships is provided to Transgender students studying in secondary school (IX & X)  & senior secondary school (XI & XII) to reduce the incidence of dropout and support their educational aspirations.

schemeName: Pre Matric Scholarship For Scheduled Tribe Students
briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by Ministry of Tribal Affairs for regular, full time students from Scheduled Tribe studying in Class 9th and 10th, in a Government School or in a School recognized by Govt. or a Central/State Board of Secondary Education.

schemeName: Tejaswini-the Radiant
briefDescription: A scheme to provide financial assistance to the young women for setting up gainful self-employment ventures, suited to their skills, training, aptitude and local conditions.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemeName: Digital India Internship Scheme
briefDescription: An opportunity for a student to secure practical work experience under the guidance of a qualified and experienced Supervisor/Mentor in Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) in the form of Digital India Internship Scheme.

schemeName: Junior Research Fellowship In Sciences, Humanities, And Social Sciences
briefDescription: The scheme of Junior Research Fellowship in Sciences, Humanities, and Social Science by UGC, Dept. of Education, is open to candidates who qualify for the National Eligibility Test-Junior Research Fellowship(NET-JRF) of the UGC and the UGC-Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (UGC-CSIR).

schemeName: Boarding House Stipend Scheme (Tripura Govt.)

schemeName: Credit Card Scheme For Artisans And Weavers Of Handicrafts And Handloom Sector

schemeName: Dr. D.S. Kothari Post Doctoral Fellowships In Sciences

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojna (PMFBY)

schemeName: Tenzing Norgay National Adventure Award

schemeName: Biju Pucca Ghar Yojana

schemeName: Dr. Panjabrao Deshmukh Hostel Maintenance Allowance

schemeName: Akanksha Scheme

schemeName: Financial Assistance To Women And Girl Acid Attack Victims

schemeName: The Artist Welfare Fund Of Assam
briefDescription: The scheme "The Artist Welfare Fund of Assam" is a scheme of financial asssistance by the Assam State Film (Finance and Development) Corporation, Department of Cultural Affairs, Govt. of Assam. The scheme extednds to the whole of Assam.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Kanya Abhibhawak Pension Scheme
briefDescription: The Government of Madhya Pradesh has launched a scheme entitled “Mukhyamantri Kanya Abhibhavak Pension Yojana” on 01 April 201,  for the welfare of citizens having one daughter.

schemeName: Cycle Sahayata Yojana

Applications for this scheme are accepted online through the official website of the department. In this scheme, bicycles are provided to the women workers.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Yuva Swavalamban Yojana

schemeName: Krushy Aranya Protsaha Yojane (kapy)

schemeName: Petrol Subsidy To Persons With Disability

schemeName: Chief Ministergi Artistessingi Tengbang - Assistance To The Cultural Group For Training With New Production
briefDescription: "CMAT - Assistance to the Cultural Group for Training with New Production" by the Dept. of Art and Culture, Govt. of Manipur aims at providing financial assistance to registered cultural groups that have been relentlessly working on providing training to the younger generation with new products.

schemeName: Nishaktata Pension Yojana (JBOCWWB)

The scheme provides a pension of ₹ 1,000/- per month to the registered beneficiary who is permanently disabled due to paralysis/leprosy/tuberculosis/accident.

schemeName: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Kisan Sashaktikaran Yojana

schemeName: LIDCOM Education Loan Scheme

In this scheme, finance of upto ₹ 20,00,000 is provided for post graduate students in the 18-50 years age group from Charmakar Community for studies in India and in abroad.

schemeName: Scholarship To 2 Years Pre-Service Student Teachers Undergoing D.El.Ed Programme At DIETs And CTTC Sohra
briefDescription: The scheme “Scholarship to 2 Years Pre-Service Student Teachers undergoing D.El.Ed Programme at DIETs and CTTC Sohra” was launched by the Dept. of Education, Govt. of Meghalaya in 2012. The scheme offers a scholarship of ₹5000 p.m. for 2 years (10 months per year) to attract the state's best talent.

schemeName: NAMO E-Tablet Scheme
briefDescription: The Namo Tablet Yojana in Gujarat is a state-specific version of the central government's PM Tablet Scheme. The scheme was launched in 2017 by the Gujarat government and aims to distribute tablets to around 3.5 lakh students in the state.

schemeName: Financial Assistance To Self-Employment For Trained Disabled Persons
briefDescription: The "Financial Assistance to Self-Employment for Trained Disabled Persons" is a scheme by the Govt. of Maharashtra. schemeName: Soil Testing Laboratory
briefDescription: Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare Department launched the "Soil Testing Laboratory" scheme for the farmer on 01 April 2013.

schemeName: Stipends To Trainees In Industrial Training Institute
briefDescription: The scheme “Stipends to Trainees in Industrial Training Institute” was launched by the Department of Social Justice and Special Assistance, Government of Maharashtra for Scheduled Caste students in Industrial Training Institute.

schemeName: Feed And Fodder Entrepreneurship Scheme

schemeName: Non-Governmental Aided Organization (Special Schools And Vocational Training Centre) For Disabled

schemeShortTitle: GRANTS IN AID TO SC/ST PATIENTS
schemeName: Financial Grants In Aid To SC/ST Patients Suffering From Cancer And Other Malignant Diseases
briefDescription: The scheme “Financial Grants in Aid to SC/ST patients suffering from cancer and other malignant diseases” was launched by the Government of Assam in 2017 to provide financial assistance in the form of grants in Aid to SC/ST patients who are suffering from cancer and other malignant diseases.

schemeName: Chhattisgarh Mukhyamantri Kanya Vivah Yojana

schemeName: Prosthetic Aid Scheme

schemeName: Vidya Scheme

schemeName: Vidyasiri food And Accommodation Scholarship Scheme

Scheme offers a monthly stipend of Rs. 1,500 for10 months

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Yuva Swarojgar Yojana

schemeName: Old-Age Pension Scheme
briefDescription: The Himachal Pradesh government offers an Old Age pension scheme to support elderly citizens who have no means of livelihood. The scheme offers financial assistance to eligible citizens based on their age and income level.

schemeName: Rehabilitation Treatment For The Disabled
briefDescription: The government of Meghalaya provides rehabilitation treatment for persons with disabilities under the "Disability Rehabilitation Scheme".

schemeName: Partial Travel Support Scheme
briefDescription: The Himachal Pradesh Council for Science, Technology & Environment (HIMCOSTE), has a scheme for providing partial travel assistance to deserving bright young Scientists and Research Scholars working in state

schemeName: Financial Assistance For Marriage (APB&OCWWB)

schemeName: Bal Ashrams

schemeName: State Welfare Scheme For Purohits

schemeName: Spurring Entrepreneurship Initiative

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Jankalyan (Shiksha Protsahan Yojna)

schemeName: Maternity Benefit Scheme (APB&OCWWB)

schemeName: Chief Minister Nari Shakti Yojana

schemeName: Subsidy Scheme On Establishment Of 25 R.I.R. Birds’ Unit For Scheduled Caste

Birds’ unit for Scheduled Caste” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to provide employment, nutritious diet and to raise the income of Schedule Caste People of the society.

schemeName: Kanya Sumangala Yojana

schemeName: Agricultural Skill Development Training Programme For Women Farmers And Farmers
briefDescription: The scheme “Agricultural Skill Development Training Programme for Women Farmers and Farmers” was started by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

schemeName: Kali Bai Bheel Medhavi Chhatra Scooty Scheme
briefDescription: In 2015-16, Rajasthan State started the "Kali Bai Bheel Medhavi Chhatra Scooty Scheme" for Girls students.

schemeName: Kali Bai Bheel Medhavi Chhatra Scooty Scheme
briefDescription: In 2015-16, Rajasthan State started the "Kali Bai Bheel Medhavi Chhatra Scooty Scheme" for Girls students.

schemeName: Motivation Of Unemployed Persons To Start Self-Employed Enterprises Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme “Motivation of Unemployed Persons To Start Self-Employed Enterprises Scheme (MUPSES)” was launched by the Union Territory of Puducherry in the year 2006 with a view to encouraging self-employment among the youth in manufacturing and service activities.

schemeName: Palanhar Scheme

schemeName: Financial Assistance Scheme For Higher Competitive/ Entrance Examination To Scheduled Castes/ Backward Classes Students

schemeName: Financial Aid For Providing Hostel Facility To Transgender Students

Studies/ Research Students.

schemeName: Travel Concession To The Differently Abled Persons In State Owned Transport Corporation Buses
briefDescription: The Government of Tamil Nadu introduced Differently Abled Persons In Stated Owned Tranportat Corporation buses.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Aawasiye Bhu-Adhikaar Yojana

schemeName: Annal Ambedkar Business Champions Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme “Annal Ambedkar Business Champions Scheme (AABCS)” was launched by the Department of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, Government of Tamil Nadu.

schemeName: Udita Yojana
briefDescription: Madhya Pradesh State Government started "Udita Yojana" for women health promotions.

schemeName: Assistance For Purchase Of Spectacles By A Differently Abled Person

schemeName: Unemployment Allowance for the Educated Unemployed Youth Scheme

schemeName: Mandahasam Scheme To Provide Artificial Dentures To Senior Citizens
briefDescription: The scheme “Mandahasam Scheme to Provide Artificial Dentures to Senior Citizens” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

schemeName: Thalolam Scheme

schemeName: Ladli Laxmi Yojana
briefDescription: Ladli Lakshmi Yojana has been started in Madhya Pradesh for Girl Child in 2007.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Avivahita Pension Yojana
briefDescription: Madhya Pradesh State Government started the "Mukhyamantri Avivahita Pension Yojana" for unmarried women of the state.

schemeName: DEVELOPMENT OF HANDICRAFTS
briefDescription: The government of Puducherry takes the initiative to revive the vanishing crafts and restore the significance of traditional crafts.

schemeName: Kerala State Young Scientist Awards

schemeName: Mangalya Scheme For Widow Remarriage

The applicant should be a retired seaman. The age of the applicant should be 60 years or above.

schemeName: Disabled Person Pension Scheme - Punjab
briefDescription: Punjab State Government started a pension for disable person of the state.

schemeName: Young Investigators Programme in Biotechnology
briefDescription: The programme “Young Investigator’s Programme in Biotechnology (YIPB)” is a research support programme that aims to provide quick research support to young researchers to pursue their ideas in newly emerging and front-line areas of research in Biotechnology.

schemeName: Kala Samman Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme "Kala Samman Scheme" grants financial assistance to eminent artists who are in indigent circumstances as a token of respect for their contribution to the field of Art and culture.

schemeName: Kisan Samriddhi Yojana - Chhattisgarh
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Kisan Samriddhi Yojana" for farmer.

schemeName: Dai Didi Mobile Clinic Scheme
briefDescription: Government of Chhattisgarh state, started a scheme named "Dai Didi Clinic Scheme" in 2020.

schemeName: Short Term Loan Scheme

schemeName: Self Employment Scheme - Goa

briefDescription: Chhattisgarh state Government started a scheme "Vishvakarma Durghatana Mrtyu Par Antyeshti Evan Anugrah Raashi Bhugataan Yojana" for labor workers.

schemeName: Barbershop Renovation Grant
briefDescription: The “Barbershop Renovation Grant” scheme is launched by the Backward Communities Development Department, Government of Kerala. Under the scheme, financial assistance will be provided to the traditional barber of rural areas to uplift the standard of the traditional barbershops.

schemeName: Futkar Sabji, Phal-Phool Vikreta Hetu Taraju, Baat Evan Tokari Sahaayata Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Futkar Sabji, Phal-Phool Vikreta Hetu Taraju, Baat Evan Tokari Sahaayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 15 June 2016.

schemeName: Silicosis (Bimari) Se Pidit Shramiko Ke Liye Aarthik Evam Punarvas Sahayata Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh state Government started a scheme "Silicosis (Bimari) Se Pidit Shramiko Ke Liye Aarthik Evam Punarvas Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 16 January 2018.

schemeName: E-Rikshaw Sahayta Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "E-Rikshaw Sahayta Yojana" for unorganized worker in 20 December 2016.

schemeName: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to the Publishers for Publishing Books of Goan Authors
briefDescription: "Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to the Publishers for Publishing Books of Goan Authors"  by the Directorate of Art and Culture, Government of Goa, has been designed to promote Goan publishers to provide them with financial support for the publication of books.

schemeName: National Scheme of Apprenticeship Training
briefDescription: The primary goal of this scheme is to bridge the gap in practical experience for fresh Graduate Engineers, Diploma holders, and 10+2 Vocational pass-outs in approximately 10,000 industrial establishments. The apprentices undergo a one-year training period, receiving a monthly stipend.

schemeName: Theka Shramik Evan Hamaal Shramik Baahy Rogi Chikitsa Sahaayata Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Theka Shramik Evan Hamaal Shramik Baahy Rogi Chikitsa Sahaayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

schemeName: Mahila Kamgar Kaushal Unnayan Evan Theka Shramik, Hamaal Tatha Ghareloo Mahila Kamgaar Parivar Sashaktikaran Yojana
briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Mahila Kamgar Kaushal Unnayan Evan Theka Shramik, Hamaal Tatha Ghareloo Mahila Kamgaar Parivar Sashaktikaran Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

schemeName: Award of Opportunity Cost to Parents of Scheduled Caste Girl Students
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to financially assist the SC parents for sending school their daughters who otherwise earn livelihood for the family engaging themselves in menial labour.

schemeName: Stipend to Scheduled Caste Trainees in Technical Training Institutions
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial support to Scheduled Tribe candidates/trainees who are undergoing training in the Government Technical Training Institutions of the Union Territory of Puducherry.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Purchase of Barrier Net and its Accessories
briefDescription: “Financial Assistance for Purchase of Barrier Net and its Accessories” is a scheme by Dept. of Fisheries, Govt. of Goa. Under this Scheme financial assistance is provided as a subsidy on the purchase of barrier nets and accessories for the fishermen. The applications are accepted offline.

schemeName: ASEAN-India Research Training Fellowship
briefDescription: The “ASEAN-India Research Training Fellowship (AI-RTF)” is a fellowship scheme initiated by the Department of Science & Technology, Government of India under ASEAN-India Science & Technology Development Fund to support young talented researchers/scientists of ASEAN member countries.

schemeName: Financial Assistance To Fishermen For Purchase of Fisheries Requisites (Gill Net/ River Gill Net with Accessories)
briefDescription: “Financial Assistance To Fishermen For Purchase of Fisheries Requisites” is a scheme by the Department of Fisheries, Government of Goa. Through this scheme, a 50% subsidy is provided to the fishermen of Goa for the purchase of fisheries requisites (gill nets with accessories).

schemeName: Mukhya Mantri Shahri Ajeevika Guarantee Yojna
briefDescription: The “Mukhya Mantri Shahri Ajeevika Guarantee Yojna” was launched by the Department of Urban Development, Govt. of Himachal Pradesh. The objective of the scheme is to enhance livelihood security in urban areas by providing 120 days of guaranteed wage employment to every household in a financial year.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Take up Value Addition to Seafood
briefDescription: Through this scheme, individuals who have been residents of Goa for the last 15 years, and are interested in setting up a unit for value-added fisheries products are provided financial assistance as a subsidy of 50% of the cost for the Construction or Renovation of the Unit/ Purchase of Equipment.

schemeName: Goa Value Added Tax-Based Subsidy on H.S.D. Oil Consumed by Fishing Vessels Scheme
briefDescription: “Goa Value Added Tax-Based Subsidy on H.S.D. Oil Consumed by Fishing Vessels Scheme” is a scheme by the Department of Fisheries, Govt. of Goa. Through this scheme, the amount equivalent to the actual VAT paid shall be reimbursed to the owner as a subsidy on H.S.D. Oil consumed by the fishing vessel.

schemeName: Natural Calamity Relief to Fishermen of State
briefDescription: “Natural Calamity Relief to Fishermen of State” is a scheme by the Dept of Fisheries, Govt of Goa. Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided to the active fishermen who contribute to the Fishermen Corpus Relief Fund, whose fishing vessels are damaged or lost due to natural calamities.

schemeName: Interest Subsidy on Loans for Agriculture and Allied Activities
briefDescription: “Interest Subsidy on Loans for Agriculture and Allied Activities” is a scheme by the Dept. of Fisheries, Govt. of Goa. The bonafide agriculturist, individual of the animal husbandry/fisheries sector from Goa are provided a loan of upto ₹ 5,00,000 for the purpose of Agriculture and Allied Activities.

schemeName: Reimbursement/ Spot Exemption of Sales Tax on High-Speed Diesel Oil
briefDescription: The scheme "Reimbursement/ Spot Exemption of Sales Tax on High-Speed Diesel Oil" under "Financial Assistance for Availing Subsidy Components for the Development of Marine Fisheries" introduced to reimburse the sales tax on high-speed diesel oil used by the registered mechanized boat operators.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Kalakar Sahayata Yojana
briefDescription: Mukhyamantri Kalakar Sahayata Yojana is a scheme under the Odia Language, Literature & Culture Department, Government of Odisha aims to offer sustenance and assistance to elderly artists who, despite facing financial hardship, have consistently devoted themselves to enriching culture of the state.

schemeName: Government Hostel for Working Women/ Girl Students
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide suitable, inexpensive, and safe accommodation to women employed in government offices, organizations, and firms, as well as girl students studying in colleges. Essential facilities include a cot with mattress, lockable cupboards, television, newspapers, magazines, etc.

schemeName: KULAVILAKKU
briefDescription: This scheme aims to enhance the nutritional status of Pregnant Women. ₹500/- assistance is provided to eligible beneficiaries during their pregnancies. The scheme is a crucial step towards ensuring the well-being of both mother and child. The benefit will be provided for upto two pregnancies only.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Fresh Water Aquaculture Farms
briefDescription: “Financial Assistance to Fresh Water Aquaculture Farms” is a scheme by the Dept. of Fisheries, Govt. of Goa. Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided to eligible fishermen for the construction and renovation of the Farm, for the purchase of farming equipment, and the purchase of feed.

schemeName: Certification Program for Goan IT Professionals
briefDescription: The scheme provides reimbursement of up to 50% of the expenditure incurred for obtaining certifications for improving their employability. The scheme has been framed as a part of Goa's IT Policy that envisages Goa as an aspirational geographical and human resource base for IT Units.

schemeName: Bed & Breakfast/Homestay Scheme- Punjab
