briefDescription: The scheme "Pandit Deen Dayal Upadhyay Samoohik Pashudhan Beema Yojana" aims to provide socio-economic security to livestock farmers in the state by covering livestock under an insurance scheme. Financial protection against the risk of loss due to animal death is extended to livestock owners.

schemeName: Special Livestock Insurance Scheme
briefDescription: "Special Livestock Insurance Scheme" is a welfare initiative targeting SC families engaged in livestock rearing. The scheme provides free insurance for livestock, enhancing the economic security of resource-poor SC families. The scheme covers milch animals, sheep, goats, pigs, camels, etc;

schemeName: Scheme for Wage Compensation to Handloom Weaver Families
briefDescription: "Scheme for Wage Compensation to Handloom Weaver Families" by the Dept. of Handlooms & Textiles, Andhra Pradesh aims to provide wage compensation relief to handloom weaver families. A relief assistance of ₹4,000 per weaver family is provided to compensate for wage loss during the rainy season.

schemeName: Panchayat Secretariat Strengthening Scheme
briefDescription: The "Panchayat Secretariat Strengthening Scheme" by the Panchayati Raj Department, Government of Jharkhand, aims to provide financial assistance of ₹15,000 per month to each Gram Panchayat for operational and maintenance purposes, ensuring efficient governance at the grassroots level.

schemeName: Valmiki Chhatravritti Yojana
briefDescription: The "Valmiki Chhatravritti Yojana" by the Department of Higher and Technical Education, Government of Jharkhand, aims to provide financial assistance and encouragement to orphaned and differently-abled students to pursue higher education and benefits include full tuition fee reimbursement.

schemeName: INDIRAMMA Weavers Pension (Urban)
briefDescription: "INDIRAMMA Weavers Pension (Urban)" scheme aims to provide monthly pensions to destitute weavers aged 50 years or above. To be eligible, they should be from a BPL family, and be a resident of Andhra Pradesh. The eligible individuals will be identified by their respective Ward Sabhas.

schemeName: Haryana State Meritorious Incentive Scheme for the Students Who Attain First Position in CBSE Annual Exams in the State
briefDescription: The scheme "Haryana State Meritorious Incentive Scheme" aims to encourage meritorious students who attain top positions in CBSE annual exams by providing them with financial incentives. Selected students receive an annual incentive covering their school/college fees up to their graduation.

schemeName: Free Books Scheme for Scheduled Caste Students Pursuing Higher Education
briefDescription: The scheme was launched by the Department of Higher Education, Govt. of Haryana, on 1st July, 2008, with the aim of attracting SC students towards higher education. Under this scheme, SC students studying in govt. colleges will receive ₹2,000/- per annum for purchasing books.

schemeName: Divyangjan Scholarship Scheme
briefDescription: "Divyangjan Scholarship Scheme" provides financial assistance for the education and training of differently-abled children, who are regular students in a school or college. The application needs to be submitted to the District Office, Panchayat and Social Welfare / Janpad Panchayat Office.

schemeName: Transport Loan Scheme
briefDescription: "Transport Loan Scheme" aims to promote self-employment among target groups by providing term loans for Light Motor Vehicles. The scheme benefits Scheduled Castes, Other Backward Classes, Minorities, and Safai Karamcharis with financial assistance up to ₹5,00,000/-.

schemeName: Composite Loan Scheme
briefDescription: "Composite Loan Scheme" aims to provide need-based financial support to individuals from Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, Other Backward Classes, Minorities, and PwDs to help them pursue various income-generating activities. The scheme encourages self-employment and entrepreneurship.

schemeName: Goa Mediclaim Scheme
briefDescription: “Goa Mediclaim Scheme” provides financial assistance to avail super-speciality treatments that are not available in the Government Hospitals of Goa, such as dialysis, plastic surgery, ICU care, angiography and angioplasty, open-heart surgery, kidney transplantation, neurosurgery, etc.

schemeName: Hostel Facility Scheme (HPBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The Hostel Facility Scheme, introduced by the HPBOCWWB , provides financial assistance ranging from ₹15,000 to ₹20,000 annually. This support covers accommodation, boarding, and food expenses for the children of registered worker while they reside in a hostel.

schemeName: Consolidated Stipend Scheme for Scheduled Caste Students Pursuing Higher Education
briefDescription: The scheme was launched by the Department of Higher Education, Government of Haryana, on 1st July, 2008, with the aim of attracting SC students towards higher education. Under this scheme, SC students studying in Govt. Colleges will receive a stipend of ₹1,000 per month.

schemeName: Paternity Benefit Scheme (BBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The "Paternity Benefit Scheme" by the Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers' Welfare Board, Labour Resources Department, Government of Bihar, provides ₹6,000/- per childbirth to the male workers, provided that their wife is not registered with the Board.

schemeName: e-Adhigam Scheme - Free Tablet
briefDescription: This scheme was launched with objective of promoting digital education & providing online learning to children from poor & needy families, proving to be a boon for them. Under this scheme, free tablets are provided to students, enabling access to state-of-the-art software & learning materials.

schemeName: Mahila Swayamsiddha Yojana Rajasthan
briefDescription: The scheme objective is to provide free skill training and self-employment support to widowed, abandoned, and destitute women through voluntary organizations. The scheme is implemented by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department with financial assistance provided to participating NGOs.

schemeName: Reimbursement of Tuition Fee and Transport Facility to Scheduled Castes Students Studying in Technical Institutions in Haryana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Scheduled Castes students pursuing AICTE-approved technical courses. Under this scheme, eligible students receive tuition fee reimbursement and transport facility benefits.

schemeName: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Financial Assistance for Studying Bisexual Children
briefDescription: The scheme objective is to provide financial assistance of ₹6,000 per month for up to 12 months to transgender students from Class 6 and above for accommodation and daily needs if they live away from their homes for education.

schemeName: Free Passport Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to facilitate higher education and global career opportunities for students by covering the cost of passport issuance. Under this scheme, final-year UG and PG students in government colleges receive reimbursement for passport application fees.

schemeName: Vivah Sahayata Yojana (Labor Welfare Board Madhya Pradesh)
briefDescription: Under this scheme, ₹15,000 is provided per case for the marriage of a daughter (above 18 years of age) of workers/employees working in institutions covered under the Madhya Pradesh Labor Welfare Fund Act, 1982, or to a female worker herself.

schemeName: Uchch Shiksha Puraskar Yojana
briefDescription: "Uchch Shiksha Puraskar Yojana" aims to encourage and motivate students from weaver families to pursue higher education. ₹20,000/- is provided to talented students from weaver families who get admission in first year of Engineering/Medical/CA/MBA courses in any government college in Chhattisgarh.

schemeName: Mukhya Mantri Sarvajan Uchcha Shiksha Chhatravriti Yojana
briefDescription: This scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from all sections of Rajasthan who are pursuing higher education at IITs, IIMs, and other national-level institutions. Under this scheme, 50% of the non-refundable fees are reimbursed to eligible students.

schemeName: To Assist the Farmers for Construction of Community Base Water Tank/Storage Structure for Efficient Use of Water Through Drip Irrigation
briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for constructing community-based water tanks/storage structures to ensure efficient water use through drip irrigation.

schemeName: Academic Scholarship Scheme (Labor Welfare Board Madhya Pradesh)
briefDescription: Under this scheme, up to two children of workers employed in industrial institutions/establishments covered under the Board are eligible for scholarship benefits. The scholarship is provided to students from Class 5th to 12th and higher education, who have passed their previous class.

schemeName: Coaching Help Scheme for JEE-GUJCET-NEET Exams
briefDescription: The "Coaching Help Scheme for JEE-GUJCET-NEET Exams" scheme provides financial assistance to non-reserved category students from the science stream who are getting coaching in institutions with three years or more experience.

schemeName: Training Assistance for Competitive Examinations
briefDescription: The "Training Assistance for Competitive Examinations" scheme provides financial assistance to non-reserved category students who are undergoing training in recognized institutions for competitive recruitment examinations.

schemeName: Financial assistance to Meritorious Scheduled Tribe Students who have Passed First Division from Board and University
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to motivate meritorious Scheduled Tribe students of Rajasthan by providing one-time financial assistance of ₹3,500/- to those pursuing regular college courses and achieving first division.

schemeName: Devnarayan Pratibhawan Chhatra Protsahan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage academic excellence among students belonging to Special Backward Classes (SBC). It provides an annual financial incentive of ₹3,500/- to students pursuing education from Class 10th to postgraduate level in government schools or colleges.

schemeName: Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme for the Children of Parents/Guardians Engaged in Unclean and Hazardous Occupations - Goa
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to children whose parents belong to Other Disadvantaged Categories, supporting their education at pre-matric level. This initiative seeks to enhance student participation & reduce dropout rates, particularly during the transition from primary to upper

schemeName: Grant on Passing the Written Examination of Competitive Examinations for Recruitment in Armed Forces
briefDescription: Under this scheme, a grant of ₹15,000/- is provided from the Amalgamated Fund to the children of ex-servicemen who pass the written examination of CDS, NDA, IMA, OTA, Air Force, or Naval Academy, for the purpose of coaching.

schemeName: Arka Vertical Garden
briefDescription: "Arka Vertical Garden" aims to promote vertical gardening in urban and peri-urban areas to increase self-sufficiency and produce pesticide-free vegetables. The scheme provides subsidized vertical garden structures to help families grow their choice of vegetables using vertical space.

schemeName: Prime Minister Early Career Research Grant
briefDescription: This programme is initiated by the Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF) to assist researchers to initiate their research career in a new institution with a flexible budget and progressive initiatives for ease of doing research.

schemeName: Scheme of Providing Assistance to Encourage Farmers for Adoption of Organic Farming
briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to promote organic farming by providing financial assistance to farmers for certification, input subsidies, and residue testing.

schemeName: Farm Storage Structure Scheme
briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to help farmers to protect their harvested crops from damage due to natural calamities and store them safely for better financial returns by selling at optimal prices.

schemeName: Union Territory of Lakshadweep Pension Scheme for Old Age
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide monthly financial assistance of ₹1,500/- to senior citizens in the UT. The scheme covers persons above 60 years of age who do not have any source of income.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Hunar Vikas Yojana- Professional/Technical Training
briefDescription: Under this scheme, vocational/technical training is provided to Palanhar beneficiary boys & girls through recognized training providers such as the Rajasthan Skill & Livelihood Development Corporation, Rajasthan Knowledge Corporation Ltd., it is etc. recognized by the State or Central Govt.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Hunar Vikas Yojana- Higher Education/Technical Education
briefDescription: Under this scheme, the State Government provides financial assistance to eligible boys and girls enrolled under the Palanhar Scheme to pursue higher or technical education, based on their qualifications and interest in employment-oriented courses.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Asahaya Punarwas Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance and rehabilitation support to destitute individuals who are orphaned, abandoned by their parents, or have no one to care for them. Beneficiaries receive one-time financial aid and support for admission to day-care centers or old-age homes.

schemeName: Incentive Scheme for Meritorious Students of Economically Backward Class of General Category
briefDescription: Under this scheme, a one-time financial assistance of ₹15,000/- along with a certificate of appreciation is awarded to top 100 meritorious students of Class 10 & each stream of Class 12, who are listed in state-level merit list of Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education, Ajmer.

schemeName: Free Travel in Uttarakhand Transport Corporation Buses to Widowed Daughters-in-Law of Freedom Fighters
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free travel facilities in Uttarakhand Transport Corporation (UTC) buses to the widowed daughters-in-law of freedom fighters. Beneficiaries under this scheme are entitled to avail complimentary travel across all UTC bus services within the state.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Hunar Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free training in trades such as sewing, embroidery, knitting, plumbing, electronics, and in Information Technology fields including computer hardware, software, networking, accounting, and more, to individuals belonging to minority communities.

schemeName: Merit cum Means Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions
briefDescription: "Merit cum Means Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions" is a scholarship scheme by the Technical Education Department, Government of Chhattisgarh. The scheme provides ₹600/- per month to eligible students for pursuing education from recognized Polytechnic Institutions in Chhattisgarh.

schemeName: Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter scheme
briefDescription: The "Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter Scheme" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, is designed to help farmers reduce fodder wastage and improve their dairy farming efficiency.

schemeName: Bicycle Distribution Scheme for Girl Students of Economically Weaker Section
briefDescription: Under this scheme, free bicycles will be distributed to 5,800 girl students belonging to the Economically Weaker Section (EWS), who are studying in government schools from Class 6 to Class 8, to facilitate their commute between home and school.

schemeName: Children's Drawing Painting Competition
briefDescription: The "Children's Drawing and Painting Competition", organized by the Art, Culture and Museums Department, Goa, aims to encourage creativity and artistic expression among Goan children and to develop a healthy competitive spirit at a young age.

schemeName: Awarding Teleeducation Scholarships To Afghan Students
briefDescription: The "Awarding Teleeducation Scholarships To Afghan Students" scheme under e-VidyaBharati Network Project, launched by the Ministry of External Affairs, offers 1000 annual scholarships to Afghan students for UGC-approved online UG and PG programs from Indian universities.

schemeName: Pension Scheme to the Dependents (Husband/Wife) of Identified State Agitators, Other than those Who either went to Jail for 7 Days or were Injured During the Uttarakhand State Movement, after the Death of the Agitator
briefDescription: The scheme provides a monthly pension of ₹4,500/- to the dependents (husband/wife) of identified state agitators, excluding those jailed for 7 days or injured during the Uttarakhand movement, who were not receiving any government pension or in government service.

schemeName: Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter scheme
briefDescription: The "Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter Scheme" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, is designed to help farmers reduce fodder wastage and improve their dairy farming efficiency.

schemeName: Bicycle Distribution Scheme for Girl Students of Economically Weaker Section
briefDescription: Under this scheme, free bicycles will be distributed to 5,800 girl students belonging to the Economically Weaker Section (EWS), who are studying in government schools from Class 6 to Class 8, to facilitate their commute between home and school.

schemeName: Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar Sanskrit Scholarship Scheme for Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Students
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage and motivate students belonging to Scheduled Caste (SC) and Scheduled Tribe (ST) communities who are studying in Sanskrit schools from Class 6 to Class 12 in Uttarakhand by providing financial scholarships to support their education.

schemeName: Shodhgrantha Chayan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to invite scholars from any state in India to submit research manuscripts on Sanskrit literature, as well as socially relevant research books related to Sanskrit literature in the context of Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Akhil Bhartiya Sanskrit Kavi Sammelan
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote and popularize Sanskrit language and literature by encouraging poets who compose and recite in Sanskrit. 15 poets from Uttarakhand and other states are invited to present their works at national/state festivals, each receiving ₹2501/-.

schemeName: Research Fellowship Scheme for Scheduled Tribe Candidates
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the Scheduled Tribe candidates from Scheduled Areas and the Saharia Area of Rajasthan to register themselves as research scholars with all recognized Central/State/Deemed/Private University located in any part of India for pursuing Ph.D. Programme.

schemeName: Green Skill Development Programme (GSDP)
briefDescription: The scheme "Harit Kaushal Vikas Karyakram" implemented by the Govind Ballabh Pant National Institute of Himalayan Environment (NIHE), aims to impart eco-based livelihood skills to youth and communities in the Himalayan regions.

schemeName: Skill Development
briefDescription: The scheme "Skill Development" by the Wadia Institute of Himalayan Geology, aims to impart practical training to postgraduate students in various Earth Science disciplines, including structural and evolutionary geology, geochemistry, geomorphology, glaciology, magnetostratigraphy, etc.

schemeName: Veer Chandra Singh Garhwali Paryatan Swarojgar Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote tourism-based self-employment and entrepreneurship among unemployed residents of Uttarakhand by providing financial assistance and subsidies for the development of tourism-related infrastructure and services. This scheme is applicable in entire Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Student Program Under AcSIR
briefDescription: The scheme "Student Program Under AcSIR" implemented by the Academy of Scientific and Innovative Research (AcSIR), aims to promote high-quality research and leadership development in Earth Sciences through doctoral education. It provides research opportunities to geoscience postgraduate students.

schemeName: Financial Incentive to SC Meritorious Boy Students
briefDescription: The scheme provides a financial incentive of ₹5,000/- to the meritorious boys from Scheduled Castes who have secured 80% or above marks in the HSSLC examination. The objective is to motivate and encourage SC students to pursue higher studies and bring them at par with the rest.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to OBC Students Appearing in the Mains Examination of UPSC
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial grants to the OBC students for appearing in the UPSC Mains Exam. An amount upto ₹50,000/- is provided to each beneficiary. The assistance is extended depending on the applicant meeting the eligibility criteria and the documents submitted.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Matsya Sampada Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance fish production, generate employment opportunities, and improve the livelihoods of fish farmers by providing free training, field visits, and seminars on various fisheries-related activities.

schemeName: Samuhik Kanya Vivah Sahayata Yojana (UKBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the marriage of daughters of registered construction workers by providing financial assistance of ₹61,000/- for their daughter’s marriage in a group marriage event.

schemeName: Freeship less than ₹1,00,000 (UG students only)
briefDescription: The scheme "Freeship Less than ₹1,00,000 only for UG students" by the Dean Student Welfare, GBPUAT, Pantnagar aims to support meritorious undergraduate students from low-income families. This Freeship scheme provides full tuition fee exemption to eligible students.

schemeName: Sanskrit Shodh Chhaatravrtti Yojana
briefDescription: The aim of the scheme is to encourage and support high-quality research in Sanskrit by providing financial assistance to meritorious Ph.D. students across state universities.

schemeName: Akhil Bharatiya Civil Services Pratiyogita
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide an opportunity for personnel from various government departments of the state to participate annually in the All-India level competitions in various sports, organized by the Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Government of India.

schemeName: Stipends to Students of Minority Caste for Technical and Vocational Courses after SSC
briefDescription: The scheme “Stipends to Students of Minority Caste for Technical and Vocational Courses after SSC” by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Gujarat, supports education for Minority Caste students by providing a monthly stipend for one year.

schemeName: Braille Equipment Provision
briefDescription: The "Braille Equipment Provision" scheme aims to empower persons with visual disabilities to live independently by supporting their writing, computing, mobility, and entertainment needs. Through this scheme, Braille equipment is manufactured and made available to individuals and institutions.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Motor Cycle with Ice Box - Haryana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to strengthen fish transportation infrastructure and ensure the freshness and quality of fish during transit. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to fishers for purchasing motorcycles equipped with ice boxes, ensuring efficient and hygienic fish transport.

schemeName: PMMSY: Ice Plant/Cold Store of minimum 10-ton capacity Haryana
briefDescription: The subsidy for 10-ton capacity ice plant/cold storage units under Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) supports the establishment of ice plants or cold storage facilities with a minimum capacity of 10 tons to improve fish preservation and cold chain infrastructure in Haryana.

schemeName: Shravan Tirthdarshan Yojna
briefDescription: The scheme aims to facilitate pilgrimage travel for senior citizens of Gujarat by providing financial assistance for travel expenses. It benefits eligible senior citizens through reimbursements or direct arrangements with authorized travel agents.

schemeName: PMMSY: Insulated Vehicles - Haryana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a subsidy per unit for purchasing insulated vehicles for the beneficiaries to promote cold-chain logistics in fish transportation.

schemeName: PMMSY: Ice Plant/Cold Store of Minimum 20-Ton Capacity - Haryana
briefDescription: The subsidy for 20-ton capacity ice plant/cold storage units under Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) supports the establishment of ice plants or cold storage facilities with a minimum capacity of 20 tons to improve fish preservation and cold chain infrastructure in Haryana.

schemeName: Jyoti Gramodyog Vikas Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme provides margin money subsidies (25–30%) for new rural industrial projects (₹1,00,000/- to 25,00,000/-) to artisans, entrepreneurs, and SHGs, leveraging a 24-hour electricity supply in villages. Beneficiaries must be aged 25–50 years with a Class 10th education.

schemeName: PMMSY: Ice Plant/Cold Storage of Minimum 50-Ton Capacity - Haryana
briefDescription: This scheme provides financial assistance for setting up ice plants or cold storage units with a minimum capacity of 50 tons, supporting cold chain infrastructure under PMMSY.

schemeName: PMMSY: Large Fish Feed Mill of Production Capacity of 20 Ton /Day Scheme - Haryana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to strengthen aquaculture through fish feed production. It provides a grant per unit to the beneficiaries under PMMSY.

schemeName: Solar Water Heating System (Domestic Sector)
briefDescription: The scheme "Solar Water Heating System (Domestic Sector)" by the Renewable Energy Department, Haryana, aims to promote the use of solar energy for domestic water heating by providing a financial subsidy to the residents of Haryana and Haryana Government employees residing in Chandigarh.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Medium Fish Feed Mill of Production Capacity of 8 Ton/Day
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote fish feed self-sufficiency and affordability among fish farmers. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided for setting up medium-sized fish feed mills with a production capacity of 8 tons per day, benefiting entrepreneurs and fish farmers.

schemeName: Gaurav Puraskar Award
briefDescription: The scheme "Gaurav Puraskar Award" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to honour artistes for their significant achievements in music, dance, drama, and folk art by providing a cash award, trophy, and appreciation letter.

schemeName: New Swarnima Yojana for Women (GTKVN)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote economic upliftment of women from Thakor & Koli communities living below poverty line by supporting them in self-employment ventures. Under this scheme, 100% financial support up to ₹1,00,000/- is provided to eligible women for starting a business/trade of their choice.

schemeName: Micro Finance Scheme (GNDTDC)
briefDescription: The scheme promotes self-employment among Nomadic and Denotified Tribes by offering loan up to ₹1,25,000 at a concessional interest rate to help start small-scale businesses or enterprises.

schemeName: Swayam Saksham Scheme (Gujarat Gopalak Vikas Nigam)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to instil a sense of self-reliance among youth pursuing vocational education/training. Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided for establishing various professional units

schemeName: Mahila Samrudhhi Yojana (Gujarat Gopalak Vikas Nigam)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to create self-employment for women and make them self-reliant. Through this scheme, individual women entrepreneurs are provided with microfinance loans to start a business of their choice.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Mini Fish Feed Mills of Production Capacity of 2 Ton /Day
briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance, in form of subsidy, is provided to individuals for setting up mini feed mills, ensuring the local availability of quality fish feed at affordable prices for fishers and fish farmers.

schemeName: Self-Employment loan scheme for Minority Widows, Divorcees / Abandoned Women
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide self-employment loans to women from minority communities. Financial assistance with a 20% subsidy is provided to widows, divorced women, and abandoned women from minority communities. The scheme is implemented by the KSMDFC.

schemeName: Mother Teresa Scholarship
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the higher education of students belonging to minority communities. Through this scheme, an amount per annum is provided to students from minority religious communities domiciled in Kerala who are pursuing a diploma in nursing and paramedical courses from government.

schemeName: CA/ICWA CMA /CS Scholarship
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide scholarships to students from minority religious communities studying Chartered Accounts/Cost & Management Accounts/Company Secretaryship courses. Through this scheme, a scholarship is provided to eligible students.

schemeName: Intensive Fisheries Development Programme - Subsidy on Insurance Premium for Shrimp Crop Insurance
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote sustainable aquaculture by reducing financial risk of shrimp farmers through subsidized insurance coverage.Under this scheme, a 50% subsidy is provided on insurance premium paid by eligible fish farmers for shrimp crop insurance, helping them mitigate potential crop losses

schemeName: Education Loan Scheme: Haryana Women Development Corporation
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage female students from Haryana to pursue higher education and reduce their interest burden. Through this scheme, financial assistance and an interest subsidy are provided to eligible female students.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Scaling Mount Everest and Other Inaccessible Mountains of the World
briefDescription: The scheme "Financial Assistance for Scaling Mount Everest and Other Inaccessible Mountains of the World" aims to promote mountaineering by providing financial aid to successful climbers, including up to ₹15,00,000 for those who scale Mt. Everest.

schemeName: Pre-Matric Scholarship for the Students of Economically Backward Class
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the education of poor students by offering scholarships from class 1st to 10th in government and aided schools.

schemeName: Rock Climbing Adventure Training Course
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote physical fitness, adventure awareness, and confidence-building among children through a 6-day rock climbing adventure course for 100 children aged 9 to 12 years, organized at Mount Abu/ Junagadh Center.

schemeName: Assistance for Exhibitions Abroad and Out of State
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote fine arts by providing financial assistance of up to ₹1,00,000 to artists from Gujarat for organizing art exhibitions abroad and in other states of India.

schemeName: Scheme for the Welfare of Schedule Caste Families in Fisheries Sector: Subsidy on 1st Year Lease Money
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide full-time employment to individuals from Scheduled Caste families in the fisheries sector and to uplift these families by promoting fish farming through financial assistance for leasing Panchayati ponds or watershed areas.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY-Inland): Establishment of Large RAS Culture System Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance for various inland fisheries activities, including the establishment of large Recirculating Aquaculture Systems (RAS), and is provided to individuals, societies, self-help groups, associations, reservoir leaseholders, and private entities.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY-Inland): Establishment of Medium RAS Culture System Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance fish production and create employment through sustainable inland fisheries. It provides financial support to eligible beneficiaries for setting up medium-scale RAS units.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY-Inland): Establishment of Back-Yard Mini RAS Unit Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance inland fish production and create employment. It provides subsidies to eligible beneficiaries for fish hatchery and RAS unit establishment.

schemeName: Sub mission on Seeds and Planting Material
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase the production of certified/quality seed; strengthen Seed Testing Laboratories; assist Seed Producing Institutes for the adoption of new technologies, ensuring farmers get quality seeds at the right time and reasonable prices.

schemeName: Mission for Integrated Horticulture Development (MIDH)
briefDescription: The scheme "Mission for Integrated Horticulture Development (MIDH)" is a centrally sponsored scheme that aims to promote growth in the horticulture sector through financial and technical support to farmers for cultivation, post-harvest management, and market linkage development.

schemeName: Parivahan Scheme (GBCDC)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for vehicle purchases in the transport sector for SEBC unemployed individuals. A loan is provided under the scheme.

schemeName: Provide Assistance to Farmers Bringing Goods to Market Committees for Cost of Goods Transportation (Tribal)
briefDescription: The scheme "Provide Assistance to Farmers Bringing Goods to Market Committees for Cost of Goods Transportation (Tribal)" aims to encourage tribal farmers to bring their produce to market committees by providing financial assistance towards transportation costs.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY-Inland): Inputs for Freshwater Aquaculture - Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase inland fish production and employment through reservoir-based fish farming. The scheme offers financial assistance to individuals and groups via the iKhedut portal.

schemeName: Assistance to Co-operative Irrigation Societies (Trible Area)
briefDescription: The scheme "Assistance to Co-operative Irrigation Societies (Tribal Area)" aims to enhance agricultural productivity by financially supporting co-operative irrigation societies in tribal areas through the installation of water distribution infrastructure.

schemeName: Kasturba Gandhi Residential Girls’ Hostel
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage girls’ participation in education at the upper primary and secondary levels and to provide quality education to girls from disadvantaged groups (SC, ST, OBC, Minority communities and BPL families) studying in Classes 6 to 12.

schemeName: Vocational Education Programme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to impart vocational education alongside academic learning to students of classes 9 to 12 in selected government secondary schools. Vocational education is offered in 08 sectors approved by the Government of India under the NSQF framework.

schemeName: AGR-4 Scheduled Castes Sub-Plan for Distribution of Seeds and Fertilizers Input Kits at Subsidised Rates to Scheduled Caste Cultivators
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide subsidised seeds, fertilizers, and organic inputs to Scheduled Caste farmers to improve agricultural productivity.

schemeName: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: 100% Soluble Chemical Fertilizer/Nano Fertilizer Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to help Adivasi farmers and tribal cultivators increase crop production and improve their livelihood. Through this scheme, subsidies are provided for various agricultural inputs and equipment such as seeds, fertilizers, plant protection equipment, and pump sets.

schemeName: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Plant protection pesticides Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to help Scheduled Tribe farmers and tribal cultivators residing outside tribal areas achieve higher agricultural crop production and improve their livelihood. Through this scheme, various tools and practices are provided to the farmers at subsidised rates.

schemeName: Procedure for Making "Orphan Certificate" for Getting Horizontal Reservation for Orphan Children
briefDescription: This certificate provides 5% horizontal reservation in Government/Non-Government services for affected children, including those whose both biological or adoptive parents have died within 21 years from the child’s birth. orphan children residing in voluntary or government-run homes within the state.

schemeName: National Mission For Sustainable Agriculture-Parmparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (NMSA-PKVY)
briefDescription: The scheme "National Mission For Sustainable Agriculture-Parmparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (NMSA-PKVY)" is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme that aims to promote organic farming practices through providing financial assistance for organic inputs and infrastructure support to farmers.

schemeName: Whale Shark Conservation Programme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to protect the endangered Whale Shark, the world's largest fish, along the Gujarat coast, a crucial breeding site. It mitigates threats from fishing by providing compensation for damaged nets and cultivates a strong conservation ethic among local fishermen and the broader public.

schemeName: Assistance for Establishment of On farm Storage for Sorting-Grading
briefDescription: The scheme "Assistance for Establishment of On-Farm Storage for Sorting-Grading" aims to prevent post-harvest spoilage in horticultural crops by providing financial assistance for constructing storage infrastructure and purchasing sorting-grading equipment for farmers across the state.

schemeName: Assistance for Area Expansion of Vegetable Crops through Hybrid Seed
briefDescription: The scheme "Assistance for Area Expansion of Vegetable Crops through Hybrid Seed" aims to promote natural farming and hybrid seed cultivation through financial assistance to farmers. The scheme provides up to ₹20,000 per hectare to encourage sustainable agricultural practices.

schemeName: Pandit Deendayal Educational Excellence Award
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote academic excellence among schools & students by providing cash awards to the best-performing schools at the high school & intermediate levels at the state level, as well as to students securing top positions in Uttarakhand Board High School & Intermediate Examinations.

schemeName: Loans to Tribal Students for Higher Studies Abroad
briefDescription: The scheme's purpose is to offer financial assistance to tribal students for higher education abroad. It provides a loan of up to ₹15,00,000 at a 4% annual interest rate.

schemeName: Loan For Commercial Pilot Training
briefDescription: The scheme aims to offer affordable loans of up to ₹25,00,000 at a 4% annual interest rate to tribal students who want to pursue pilot training.

schemeName: Procedure for Admission to Government Women Welfare and Rehabilitation Centre and Women's Home
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide support to women above 18 years of age who are orphans, destitute, abandoned, found on roads, or mentally and physically disabled. Such women are provided with clothing, food, accommodation, medical care, counselling, entertainment, and training facilities free of cost.

schemeName: Project Sankalp
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide industry-led vocational skilling to enhance youth employability and meet industry demand for skilled manpower. It offers sector-specific training, apprenticeship, and employment opportunities, benefiting youth with better job prospects.

schemeName: Gujarat State Electric Vehicle Policy
briefDescription: The policy aims to transition Gujarat's transportation sector towards electric mobility and establish the state as a manufacturing hub for electric vehicles. It provides subsidies for electric vehicle purchases and charging infrastructure development to promote sustainable transportation.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Gyansetu Merit Scholarship Yojana
briefDescription: This scheme introduced by the Education Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to support meritorious students by providing scholarships from Class 6th to Class 12th in selected schools.

schemeName: Mukhya Mantrir Nijut Moina Aasoni
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support ten lakh girl students with financial grants as admission incentives for Higher Secondary, Graduation, and Post-Graduation studies to eradicate child marriage. It benefits unmarried girl students domiciled in Assam with monthly financial assistance.

schemeName: Scholarships to Meritorious Students of Sanskrit Schools
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote Sanskrit education by providing scholarships to meritorious students of Prathmik Madhyama (Class 10) and Uttar Madhyama (Class 12) in Sanskrit schools who secure the highest marks.

schemeName: Silicosis Financial Assistance Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to heirs of workers engaged in Akik occupation who died due to silicosis disease. It benefits the families of deceased workers with monetary compensation of ₹1,00,000/- as support for occupational disease-related deaths.

schemeName: Dastkar Prashikshan (I.T.I)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide benefits to the youth of the state by connecting them with private-sector employment or self-employment opportunities through skills training offered at district ITIs.

schemeName: Subsidy for Battery Operated 2-Wheelers
briefDescription: This scheme is introduced by the Climate Change Department, Gujarat, aims to promote renewable energy and clean transportation by providing a subsidy to students for the purchase of battery-operated two-wheelers from authorized manufacturers.

schemeName: Subsidy For Battery Operated Three-Wheelers
briefDescription: This scheme is introduced by the Climate Change Department, Gujarat, aims to promote the adoption of eco-friendly vehicles by providing a subsidy on the purchase of battery-operated three-wheelers.

schemeName: Namo Laxmi Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme "Namo Laxmi Yojana" by the Education Department, aims to reduce the dropout rate of girls in secondary and higher secondary education by providing financial assistance for completing studies from Class 9th to 12th.

schemeName: Super-100 Programme - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to identify and support the brightest Class 12 Science stream students by providing them with high-quality coaching and guidance for engineering and medical entrance examinations. The programme is a unique state-level initiative approved by the Government of India.

schemeName: Training Program for A-HELP Women Workers - Uttarakhand Livestock Development Board
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide community-service-based skill development and employment opportunities for women in the field of animal husbandry. Eligible women members of Self-Help Groups under the Uttarakhand State Rural Livelihood Mission can apply.

schemeName: National Livestock Mission: Entrepreneurship Development Scheme - Uttarakhand Livestock Development Board
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote employment generation through entrepreneurship development in the small ruminants, poultry, piggery, and the fodder sectors by providing financial and institutional support to individuals and organized groups under the National Livestock Mission.

schemeName: Promotion of Konkani Songs with Choreography & Dancing
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote Konkani songs by presenting them with choreography and dancing to attract youth towards Konkani cultural performances. It provides cash prizes, mementos, certificates and traveling allowances to participating groups in organized competitions.

schemeName: High Altitude Guide Course
briefDescription: The scheme aims to train and certify youth of Uttarakhand as professional high-altitude guides who have already completed a Low Altitude Guide Course from a recognized institution.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Troupes Going to Mumbai/Poona and Other Parts of the Country & Vice Versa
briefDescription: The scheme aims to compensate Goan dramatic troupes for transportation expenses when staging Tiatrs in Mumbai, Poona, and other parts of India, and vice versa. It offers financial assistance to promote Goan Tiatr, benefiting directors and writers of Goan and Mumbai/Poona troupes.

schemeName: Promotion of Patriotism/National Integration/Communal Harmony - Production of Musical Programme or Tiatr
briefDescription: The scheme aims to project patriotism, nationalism, and communal harmony through tiatrs, songs and music. It provides remuneration and venue cost coverage to individuals, organizations, educational institutions and clubs.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Information, Monitoring, Evaluation and Social Audit (I-MESA): Evaluation and Studies
briefDescription: The "Evaluation and Studies" component of the scheme aims to establish institutionalized mechanisms for achieving transparency and accountability, generating lessons learned for real-time program improvement, and ensuring effective knowledge dissemination among stakeholders and targeted beneficiary.

schemeName: Government of Mizoram Incentive Cash Award Scheme To Successful Candidates for Central and All India Service Examination
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage educated youth among the citizens of India and bonafide residents of Mizoram who aspire to succeed entry to Central and All India Services, addressing the issue of Mizo educated youths lagging behind and becoming increasingly marginalized in examinations.

schemeName: Establishment of Digital Learning Platform
briefDescription: The scheme aims to establish Digital Learning Platform to provide training and career counseling on various subjects, including ICT orientation, emerging technologies, and more, through both online and offline modes for students of secondary schools across the state.

schemeName: Conducting Outreach Programmes in Various Fields
briefDescription: It aims to promote scientific awareness among students, teachers, and the general public by conducting outreach programmes and activities in various fields of science through both online and offline modes, thereby making science education and research more accessible across the state.

schemeName: Konkani Song & Music Awards (Tiatr Kantaram)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage producers, lyricists, singers, and musicians to produce qualitative Konkani Audio/Video/Digital albums of Tiatr songs. Cash awards from ₹5,000/- to ₹30,000/- are provided across twelve categories to Goan artists producing Konkani kantaram albums.

schemeName: Margadeepam Scholarship
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide educational financial support to minority community students in Kerala. It offers ₹1,500/- annual scholarship to eligible students from Class 1st to Class 8th studying in government and government-aided schools.

schemeName: Netaji Subhash Chandra Bose Boys Residential Hostel Scheme (Classes 1 to 8)
briefDescription: In Madhya Pradesh, Netaji Subhash Chandra Bose Residential School Scheme for Boys (Class 1-8) Introduce by the School Education Department. It aims to ensure primary education and reduce the gender gap in education. Free residence, food, clothing, books, uniforms, and medical care are provided.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Dairy Animal Distribution Programme (Special Backward Tribes Baiga, Bharia & Sahariya)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve the livelihood and nutritional security of tribal communities by providing two dairy animals at a 90% subsidy to eligible tribal livestock farmers.

schemeName: Tour Program of Modern Laboratories
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote biotechnology education and research by providing students, researchers, and farmers with exposure to modern laboratories, advanced research activities, and innovative technologies.

schemeName: Nandi Shala Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve local cattle breeds through natural insemination. Under this, indigenous breeding bulls are provided on subsidy to livestock farmers in rural Gram Panchayats.

schemeName: Financial Assistance To Dairy Farmers Belonging To Scheduled Tribes And Scheduled Caste For Purchase Of Basic Dairy Equipments
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide assistance to the Scheduled Tribes and Scheduled Caste communities for the purchase of basic dairy equipments needed to run a small scale dairy farming, and to encourage the tribal population to adopt Animal Husbandry activities, especially Dairy Development Schemes.

schemeName: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Compensation Towards Natural Calamities
briefDescription: The scheme aims to financially assist the Goan artists to meet expenses towards repair or construction of their houses damaged due to natural calamities. The maximum financial assistance provided under this component is ₹25,000/- or the valuation done by the Taluka Mamlatdar.

schemeName: Development of Manures & Fertilizers: Assistance for use of Soil Conditioner
briefDescription: The scheme aims to amend the soil based on soil test reports, address pH and nutrient deficiencies in fertilization practices, and address important soil deficiencies like micronutrients that affect crop productivity. The payment of the sanctioned subsidy is through the Electronic Clearance System.

schemeName: Yatra Anudan
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support researchers and scientists in attending international scientific workshops and other programs by providing eligible applicants with travel grants covering up to 50% of the expenses (maximum ₹25,000/-).

schemeName: Namami Gange Yojana- Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote sustainable and organic farming practices among farmers residing in villages along the banks of the Ganga and its tributaries.

schemeName: Allotment of Canteens
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote trade and entrepreneurship by allotting canteens for selling tea and other food items to eligible residents of Uttarakhand through a fair and transparent tender process.

schemeName: Madhya Pradesh Fasal Vividhikaran (Crop Diversification) Encouragement Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage crop diversification by providing necessary inputs to farmers who shift from growing wheat and paddy. Benefits are provided primarily to the implementing Company, Firm, or Institution to cover costs related to Human Resources and Marketing, benefiting farmers.

schemeName: Goa State Logistics and Warehousing Incentives Scheme: Subsidy on Electricity Duty
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for the development of the logistics and warehousing industry in the State. This component offers a 100% annual reimbursement of electricity duty, up to a maximum of ₹5,00,000/-, to eligible Cold Chain Units.

schemeName: Goa State Logistics And Warehousing Incentives Scheme: Subsidy on Stamp Duty and Registration Charges
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance by reimbursing Stamp Duty and Registration Charges paid by prospective developers engaged in the establishment of Logistics and Warehousing projects. The scheme provides 100% reimbursement, capped at ₹10,00,000/- for Stamp Duty.

schemeName: Development of Manures & Fertilizers:  Assistance for construction/Installation of Organic Manure Units
briefDescription: The scheme aims to aid in the conversion of available on-farm organic waste into chemical-free organic manure, providing quality organic farming inputs for sustainable agriculture. The applications for this scheme are accepted offline via the Zonal Agriculture Officer.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Kanya Abhibhavak Pension Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support to parents or couples who have only daughters. The scheme provides a recurring monthly pension amount of ₹500/- (Rupees 500) to the eligible recipient or couple. The applicant must be a resident of the state of Madhya Pradesh.

schemeName: Manav Garima Yojna SCW (EBC)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist the economically backward class in becoming self-employed through the distribution of business tool-kits that help them establish small-scale ventures and earn a sustainable livelihood.

schemeName: Mukhya Mantri Krishak Samriddhi Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to incentivize farmers for improving production and quality of specific Rabi and Kharif crops by providing an incentive payment over and above the Minimum Support Price received. It provides varying financial incentives per quintal to registered farmers selling wheat, paddy, etc.

schemeName: Deendayal Upadhyay Gram Jyoti Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to strengthen the rural power infrastructure by implementing feeder separation, metering, distribution system strengthening, and rural electrification works.

schemeName: Weekly Iron Folic Acid Tablets Free Distribution - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: This aims to improve the health and nutritional status of school-going children by preventing and reducing iron deficiency anemia. Under this scheme, teachers distribute free iron and folic acid tablets every Monday to all students enrolled in government & government-aided schools across the state.

schemeName: Rural Business Incubators - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship and develop a robust entrepreneurial ecosystem in the state by providing aspiring and existing entrepreneurs with technical, business, legal, marketing, and mentorship support.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Asangathit Mazdoor Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide social and financial welfare benefits to unorganized sector workers. It offers increased remuneration, seasonal bonuses, electricity subsidies, and assistance such as e-rickshaws to registered unorganized laborers in Madhya Pradesh.

schemeName: Grant of Stipend to Junior Advocates Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide monthly financial assistance to young Junior Advocates in the Union territory of Puducherry. The benefit is a stipend of ₹5,000/- per month for up to two years offered to eligible Law Graduates who are citizens and residents of Puducherry.

schemeName: Union Home Minister’s Medal for Excellence in Police Training
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize the crucial role of trainers and support staff in police organizations, making training a respectable assignment and promoting high quality in police training institutes. It provides recognition, a Certificate (Scroll), and a cash reward of ₹25,000/- to trainers.

schemeName: Nashamukt Gram Panchayat Puraskar Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to incentivize and recognize Gram Panchayats that demonstrate outstanding work towards de-addiction, ensuring 100% of their population lives a drug-free life. The scheme provides the benefit of a cash award of ₹1,00,000/- and a Certificate of Appreciation to Gram Panchayat.

schemeName: Award Scheme to Encourage Entrepreneurs - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize exceptional craftsmanship among registered artisans and weavers in Uttarakhand by encouraging innovation, creativity, and excellence in the handicrafts and handloom sectors through state and district-level awards.

schemeName: Tribals Development Plan: Purchase of Tourist Taxi
briefDescription: This sub-scheme aims to empower Scheduled Tribe (ST) families by providing financial assistance to purchase tourist taxis for self-employment in Goa’s growing tourism industry. It supports tribal households in transitioning from traditional occupations to sustainable livelihood opportunities.

schemeName: Lakhpati Didi Yojana - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The primary objective of the scheme is to improve the economic status of women in Uttarakhand by empowering them to become financially self-reliant and achieve the status of “Lakhpati Didis.”

schemeName: Grants-in-aid and Monthly Grants to Soldiers Decorated With Gallantry Decorations
briefDescription: The scheme provides a grant of ₹20,00,000–₹12,000 and a monthly allowance of ₹5,000–₹1,500 to gallantry awardees as a mark of honor and recognition for their valor.

schemeName: Distribution of Materials to Promote Herbal Cultivation in Uttarakhand - Herbal Research and Development Institute, Uttarakhand
briefDescription: Under this scheme, there is a special provision for the free distribution of seeds or saplings of medicinal plants up to 3 nali and seeds or saplings of aromatic plants up to 5 nali to farmers belonging to border districts, Scheduled Castes/Tribes, and Below Poverty Line (BPL) categories.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to the Family of Temple Employees
briefDescription: The scheme aims to grant financial assistance to the family of the temple employee who expires while in service. The scheme provides an amount of ₹5,000/- under the Group Insurance Scheme and an amount of ₹20,000/- under the Chief Minister’s Welfare Fund. The applications are accepted offline.

schemeName: Promotion of Post-Harvest Management, Processing, and Value Addition of Aromatic Plant Produce to Farmers/Institutions/Groups in the State - Centre for Aromatic Plants
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage and support farmers, institutions, and groups engaged in aromatic plant cultivation to establish post-harvest management and processing facilities.

schemeName: Quality Test Report - Centre for Aromatic Plants
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide quality testing facilities at a subsidized rate to registered aromatic farmers, enabling them to obtain authentic quality reports for their produce or essential oils.

schemeName: Training Classes In Veda/Devaram
briefDescription: The scheme aims to conduct training classes in Veda, Devaram, and Nalayira Divya Prabantham for divine worship/Poojas. It benefits eligible candidates by providing religious training in Saivaite and Vainavaite temples, and provides an honorarium of ₹1,000/- per month to the instructing pandits.

schemeName: E-Rickshaw Kalyan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among unemployed youth in the state by providing affordable loans for purchase of e-rickshaws, thereby enhancing their livelihoods. Under this scheme, loans are provided to unemployed youth for purchase of e-rickshaws at an annual interest rate of 9%.

schemeName: Issuing Legal Production Certificate (LPC) to Producers of Medicinal Plant Products for Export - Herbal Research and Development Institute, Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to facilitate the lawful export of endangered and CITES-listed medicinal plant species such as Kuth, Kutki, etc. by issuing Legal Production Certificates (LPC) to cultivators who legally grow these species on their own measured land.

schemeName: Goa (Subsidy to Clay Idol Makers) Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage Goan artisans to continue traditional clay idol making by providing a subsidy of ₹100/- per idol, supporting registered local craftsmen in preserving cultural heritage and ensuring livelihood sustainability.

schemeName: Haj Pilgrimage to Saudi Arabia
briefDescription: The scheme aims to perform Haj Pilgrimage at Holy Mecca. The scheme provides an air fare subsidy of ₹24,000/- for each pilgrim and includes free medical facility while in Mecca. The applicant must be an Indian citizen who possesses sound health and has not performed Haj for the preceding five years.

schemeName: Registration of Herb Cultivators - Herbal Research and Development Institute, Uttarakhand
briefDescription: It aims to register cultivators who grow medicinal and aromatic plants, make the process of using their cultivated herbs easier, and stop the illegal collection of herbs from forests.

schemeName: Revised Scheme For Incentives To Milk Producers
briefDescription: BRIEF DESCRIPTION: The scheme aims to encourage farmers and youth in Goa to take up Dairy business to increase local milk production and achieve state self-sufficiency. It offers a 40% composite subsidy on milk proceeds (incentive and cattle feed subsidy) to eligible resident farmers.

schemeName: National Food Security Scheme (Antyodaya Anna Yojana - Pink Ration Card) - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure food security for the poorest and most vulnerable families by providing them with subsidized food grains under the Antyodaya category in the state. Under the scheme, eligible beneficiaries receive 35 kg of food grains and 1 kg of sugar per ration card at subsidized rates.

schemeName: Scheme for SSI / MSI Sector (PIPDIC)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to extend financial support to establish new, or expand/modernize existing, Small Scale Industry and Medium Scale Industry units. Benefits include term loans up to ₹10,00,00,000/- for fixed asset acquisition.

schemeName: Financial Incentives for Certification and Intellectual Property Rights Reimbursement Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial incentives to industrial units, hospitals, and educational institutions in the State of Goa to obtain quality certifications and register Intellectual Property Rights, thereby enhancing their competitive strength in global markets and promoting innovation.

schemeName: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM): Self-Employment Programme – Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote sustainable livelihoods and economic empowerment of the urban poor by providing financial support and guidance for establishing self-employment ventures, strengthening their family’s economy, and generating new employment opportunities.

schemeName: Aawasiy Suvidha 1 – Indralok Aawasiy Yojana (Group Housing)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide residential facilities to homeless families through a registration process and lottery-based allotment.

schemeName: Mushroom Production and Marketing Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote mushroom cultivation among farmers by providing subsidized inputs, training, and support for marketing, thereby increasing their income and encouraging entrepreneurship in the sector.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Purchase of Battery Operated Vehicles
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to eligible residents of Puducherry for the purchase of Battery-Operated vehicles. The scheme provides financial support, including an investment subsidy of ₹80,000/- provided by the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy, Govt. of India.

schemeName: Scheme Of Assistance To Good Borrowers: ‘A’ Category
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide special financial assistance to existing good borrowers who have maintained an excellent track record of timely repayment. Benefits include term loans up to ₹150,00,000/- and an interest rate concession of 1% less than the normal rate for modernization, expansion, etc.

schemeName: Scheme Of Assistance To Women Entrepreneurs (Mahalir Udavi)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to extend financial assistance to new or existing Micro Enterprises and Small Scale Industry units exclusively promoted by women or having a majority of women entrepreneurs. It provides term loans and working capital assistance up to 75% of the project cost.

schemeName: Scheme of Assistance to SC/ST Entrepreneurs
briefDescription: The scheme aims to extend financial assistance to SC/ST Entrepreneurs for setting up new Micro Enterprises or for expansion of existing units. The applications for this scheme are accepted online through the PIPDIC portal.

schemeName: Scheme for Marketing Organisations
briefDescription: The scheme was launched by PIPDIC, Department of Industries & Commerce, Puducherry. The scheme aims to financially assist entrepreneurs for setting up entrepreneurs setting up of hotel/restaurant projects in urban areas. The applications for this scheme are accepted online through the PIPDIC portal.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Chhaatrvrtti Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support eligible NCC cadets through financial incentives to encourage continued participation in education and NCC training. Under this scheme, scholarship amounts ranging from ₹600/- to ₹2,400/- are provided annually to eligible NCC cadets at group and unit levels.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Aanchal Amrit Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve the health of children between 3 to 6 years of age by providing them fortified and flavored milk containing Vitamins A and D, four days a week, at Anganwadi Centres.

schemeName: Integrated Toll Free 104 Helpline
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide the general public with round-the-clock (24×7×365) access to reliable health information and medical advice through the toll-free number 104.

schemeName: Nishulk Ganavesh Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free uniforms to all girl students studying in Classes 1 to 8 of government and government-aided schools, as well as to all boys belonging to Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes, and boys from the General category who fall under the BPL category.

schemeName: Sanskrit Chhaatr Pratiyogita
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote Sanskrit education among students by organizing Sanskrit competitions at various levels. Under this scheme, Sanskrit competitions are organized at various levels for both junior (Class 6 to 10) and senior (Class 11 to post-graduation) categories.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand for Religious Pilgrimages
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹50,000/- to permanent residents of the state who have successfully completed the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra, irrespective of their religion or caste.

schemeName: Paalna Ghar (Crèche)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide day care facilities for children aged 6 months to 6 years of working couples at a nominal monthly fee in Crèches.

schemeName: Livelihood Opportunity Promotion Scheme (Scheduled Tribes)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among Scheduled Tribe individuals through financial support, including loans, margin money, and grants.

schemeName: Minority Scholarship Scheme for Class 1 to 10
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide scholarships to students belonging to minority communities who are studying in Classes 1 to 10 in any recognized government/non-government educational institution in Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Assistance for Purchase of Traditional Musical Instruments and Costumes for Scheduled Caste/Tribe Individuals
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support scheduled caste and scheduled tribe individuals whose livelihood depends on traditional arts by providing them with essential musical instruments and costumes.

schemeName: Out of Turn Employment to Sportspersons in State Services
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide job opportunities to medal-winning sportspersons of Uttarakhand, who have represented the state in international and national games, by offering them out-of-turn employment in various state services.

schemeName: Dr. V.N. Mathur Award (M.Sc. Mathematics)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support and encourage meritorious students pursuing an M.Sc. in Mathematics, thereby assisting them and reducing their financial burden. The assistance of ₹20,000/- per year is provided to eligible students.

schemeName: Swanath Scholarship Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support to diploma and graduate-level students who are orphans, whose parents or either parent has died due to COVID-19, or who are dependents of martyrs from the military or central armed forces.

schemeName: Research Assistantship
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide research assistantship to undergraduate and postgraduate research scholars to support their academic and research activities.

schemeName: Samaaveshit Shiksha
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide equal and inclusive educational opportunities to all children with special needs (Divyang children) studying in government schools from Classes 1 to 12.

schemeName: Sponsorship for Employment
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide employment opportunities to ex-servicemen and their legal dependents by sponsoring them for contractual posts. Under this scheme, eligible candidates are sponsored for various departmental positions based on demand and their qualifications.

schemeName: Allotment of Commercial Shops
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote ease of doing business for licensed traders by providing them with well-located commercial shops in market yards (mandis).

schemeName: Son/Daughter Education Assistance (UKBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to the children of registered building and construction workers pursuing education from Class I up to higher education or professional courses.

schemeName: Seemant Parvatiya Janpad Baal Vigyan Mahotsav
briefDescription: It aims to provide students from classes 6 to 12 of government/non-government schools in six border districts of the state (Uttarkashi, Chamoli, Rudraprayag, Champawat, Bageshwar,Pithoragarh) with an opportunity to participate in science competitions & to promote scientific awareness in these areas.

schemeName: Old Age Pension Scheme- On Completion Of 65 Years (UKBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension of ₹1,500/- to construction workers registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board who have attained the age of 65 years.

schemeName: Labour Card and Renewal of Labour Card
briefDescription: Under  this facilities, a labour card is issued to workers engaged in construction, repair, maintenance, and related activities, enabling them to avail the benefits of all welfare schemes provided by the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare

schemeName: Motorcycle Taxi Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among the residents of Uttarakhand by providing interest-free loans for purchasing motorcycles or scooters to operate as motorcycle taxis, thereby enhancing tourism connectivity and generating livelihood opportunities in the state.

schemeName: Procedure for Making Medical Certificate (for Certifying Disability)
briefDescription: The certificate aims to ensure that persons with disabilities can easily obtain authentic medical certification required to avail benefits under various social welfare schemes, including disability pensions, scholarships, healthcare facilities, and employment reservations.

schemeName: Akhil Bharatiya Samanvit Anusandhan Pariyojana - Veer Chandra Singh Garhwali Uttarakhand University of Horticulture and Forestry
briefDescription: The scheme aims to conduct research and improve important horticultural and forestry species, conserve their germplasm, provide improved seeds and saplings, and train farmers in using better techniques to enhance productivity.

schemeName: Agricultural Investment Grant (in Case of Crop Damage of 33% or More)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to farmers who suffer crop losses of 33% or more due to natural calamities such as floods, heavy rainfall, drought, hailstorms, or other notified disasters.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Natural Disaster
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide timely financial assistance and relief to individuals and families affected by natural calamities, helping them recover from losses to life, property, and livelihood.

schemeName: Bhesaj Krishi Vikas Yojana (Herbal Cultivation Programme)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the cultivation of medicinal and herbal plants (Jadi-Buti) among local farmers and unemployed youth, providing sustainable employment and improving their economic well-being.

schemeName: Spice Area Expansion
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote and expand the cultivation of high-value spices such as ginger, chili, turmeric, and garlic among farmers by providing quality seeds and tubers at a subsidized rate, thereby increasing spice production and enhancing farmers’ income in Uttarakhand.

schemeName: Vegetable Area Expansion
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote and expand vegetable cultivation across the state by providing seasonal vegetable seeds to farmers at a 50% subsidy.

schemeName: Maternity Financial Assistance (UKBOCWWB)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support to registered women construction workers during the maternity period. This assistance is admissible only for the birth of up to two children.

schemeName: “Ishan Uday” Special Scholarship Scheme For North Eastern Region
briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by the Ministry of Education and the University Grants Commission. Taking special interest with regard to the promotion of higher education in the NER, i.e. for improving the GER, promoting higher education, and encouraging children belonging to the economically weaker sections.

schemeName: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme was introduced from the Academic year 2006-07 to encourage higher technical and professional education for the dependent wards of Ex-servicemen/ Ex-Coast Guard personnel and their widows.

schemeName: Refinance Scheme for Acquisition of ISO 9000 Certification for SSI Unit (ISO 9000)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist the existing industrial concerns in the SSI sector for the expenses on consultancy, documentation, audit, certification fees, equipment, and calibrating instruments required would be taken into account for determining the loan requirement.

schemeName: Financial Assistance for Setting Up of Cold Storage
briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist the Proprietary/Partnership Concerns, Public/Private Limited Companies, Co-operative Societies, Market Committees, Boards, and Agro Industries Corporations. The assistance is provided for setting up of Cold Storage facilities. The applications for this scheme are online.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Sampoorna Pushti Yojana: Purna Aahaara for Children (6 months - 5 years)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide nutritional support to Severely Acute Malnourished (SAM) children. Under the scheme, eligible beneficiaries are provided Take Home Ration (THR) of 3 kg per month, along with 30 eggs per month, for a duration of 112 days.

schemeName: Ashirbad: Scheme for Specially Cared Children
briefDescription: The scheme aims for in-situ rehabilitation & continuation of their life in similar family based non-institutional socio-cultural environment, where ever feasible & in the best interest of child & to ensure that care givers & other kith & kins are encouraged to provide best of care to these children.

schemeName: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Resources in Tribal Areas: Fish Seed Stocking - Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for fish seed stocking, including transportation costs, is provided to beneficiaries from Scheduled Tribes involved in inland fisheries.

schemeName: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Resources in Tribal Areas: Fish Seed Rearing - Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and provide employment to people involved in inland fisheries activities.

schemeName: Scheme for Purchase of 4 Wheeler for Own Use
briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist Qualified Personnel in Medicine, Management, Accountancy, Engineering, Architecture, etc. and Good Borrowers of the Corporation (Industrial Units) for purchase of New Four Wheeler Vehicle (Air Conditioned or Non-air-conditioned) for own use. The applications are online.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Sampoorna Pushti Yojana: Nutrition for Severely Underweight and Moderately Acute Malnourished Children (6 months - 3 years)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve child nutrition outcomes, with a specific focus on providing nutritional support to Severely Underweight (SUW) and Moderately Acute Malnourished (MAM) children aged between 6 months and 3 years.

schemeName: Capital Investment Subsidy for Establishment of Heritage Hotel where the Heritage Assets are obtained from Tourism Department on Lease
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the establishment of heritage hotels in properties leased from the Tourism Department. It provides a 15% capital investment subsidy up to ₹5,00,00,000/- to investors who establish heritage hotels in these leased assets.

schemeName: Capital Investment Subsidy for Establishment of New Hotel or Mini Resort of Standard Category
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage the establishment of new standard category hotels and mini resorts in Madhya Pradesh. It provides a 15% capital subsidy up to ₹50,00,000/- to private investors and entrepreneurs creating tourism accommodation infrastructure.

schemeName: Mukhya Mantri Vidyarthi Kalyan Yojana
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to school and college students in the form of scholarships of upto ₹2,400/- per month to students from IRDP/BPL Families bonafide in Himachal Pradesh, and pursuing their study in Govt / Govt Aided Institutions in Himachal Pradesh.

schemeName: Banishree Scholarship
briefDescription: The aim provides assistance and encourages them to study as well as acquire technical/ professional/ vocational training.

schemeName: Capital Investment Subsidy For Creation of Infrastructure Along With Installation of Equipment To Establish Film Studio, Film Making, Museum, Aquarium, Theme Park
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote private investment in the creation of film studios, museums, aquariums, and theme parks. It provides a 15% capital subsidy up to ₹5,00,00,000/- to investors who meet the minimum capital expenditure requirements.

schemeName: Capital Subsidy to Existing Hotels for Renovation/Modernization & Upgradation
briefDescription: The scheme aims to incentivize existing hotels and resorts in Madhya Pradesh to upgrade their facilities to Deluxe, 4-Star, or higher categories. It provides capital subsidy benefits to private investors and hotel owners who undertake significant renovation and modernization projects.

schemeName: Dulari Kanya
briefDescription: “Dulari Kanya” is a scheme for the girl child by the Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh. The objective of the scheme is to end the preference between male and female child, encouragement of institutional delivery, immunization of children, to end child marriage and overall empowerment of females.
