briefDescription: Direct Loans For Business  Enterprise Scheme is implemented by Karnataka Minorities Development Corporation Limited. Under this scheme, loans will be provided to eligible entrepreneurs to start or expand their businesses by mortgaging property (building or land).

schemeName: Chief Minister’s Paryatan Vikas Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme “Chief Minister’s Paryatan Vikas Yojna (CMPVY)” was launched by Government of Arunachal Pradesh is to develop tourism facilities in the state to attract more tourism.

schemeName: Crop Cluster Development Programme
briefDescription: The CCDP aims to develop organized marketing and improve the livelihoods of horticulture farmers in Baagwani Villages through on-farm and marketing support, promoting sustainable agriculture-based livelihoods.

schemeName: Scheme For Welfare Of Children In Need Of Care And Protection
briefDescription: "Scheme for Welfare of Children in Need of Care and Protection" is a Social Welfare Scheme by the Directorate of Women & Child Development, Govt. of Goa. The objective of this scheme is to assist the Voluntary Organizations that cater to the needs of destitute and orphans up to the age of 18 years.

schemeName: Financial Assistance To Pre-primary School In Remote Areas
briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to set up pre-primary schools in remote tribal areas, in the form of rent amount payable for the premises, fixed remuneration to one Teacher, one helper, teaching aid/equipment, toys, and mid-meal.

schemeName: Scheme For Soft Loan To The Grant-in-aid/ Non-grant In Aid Institutions For Maintenance And Upgradation Of Infrastructure Facilities
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to support the efforts of the management of the Non-Government aided institutions/non-grant-in-aid institutions for the upgradation and maintenance of infrastructural facilities for promoting a conducive atmosphere for learning.

schemeName: Scheme to Provide Grant to the Institutions for Long Term Project in the Field of Art and Culture (Sarjansheel Goa)
briefDescription: "Scheme to Provide Grant to the Institutions for Long Term Project in the Field of Art and Culture (Sarjansheel Goa)" implemented by the by the Directorate of Art and Culture, provides financial support to the institutions/ individuals involved in long-term projects in the field Art & Culture.

schemeName: Scheme for Margin Money Grant to Nano Units
briefDescription: The scheme “Margin Money Grant to Nano Units” is a loan-linked scheme operated by Directorate of Industries & Commerce, Govt. of Kerala. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Nano units in the State, engaged in manufacturing,job work & service activity having any type of value addition.

schemeName: Soft Loan Scheme for Women Entrepreneurs
briefDescription: The scheme “Soft Loan Scheme for Women Entrepreneurs” was started under Kerala Startup Mission to support women startups with a soft loan of an amount limited to ₹15 Lakhs as working capital for implementing works & projects received from Govt. departments and Public Sector Undertaking in Kerala.

schemeName: Stamp Duty Reimbursement Scheme
briefDescription: Through “Stamp Duty Reimbursement Scheme”, in case of land/ developed area purchased/ leased by Start-ups/ incubators/ accelerators, the stamp duty for land area lease/ sale transaction for start-ups/incubators/ accelerators will not exceed ₹ 100/-, and the excess amount paid will be reimbursed.

schemeName: Special Incentive Allowance Scheme
briefDescription: Launched in 2018, the "Special Incentive Allowance Scheme" is one of the "Information Technology Policy Schemes" by the Department of Information Technology, Government of Goa. New and Existing Units would be provided with the allowance once at the end of every three year period.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: Single Point Registration Scheme
briefDescription: National Small Industries Corporation enlists Micro & Small Enterprises under Single Point Registration scheme for participation in Government Purchases. The units enlisted under this scheme of NSIC are eligible to get the benefits under Public Procurement Policy for Micro & Small Enterprises.

schemeName: Campus Recruitment Assistance Scheme
briefDescription: The objective and the scope of this scheme is to provide Campus Recruitment Assistance to the eligible IT Units in Goa. A recruitment assistance of ₹10,000 per Fresher will be provided to the Existing and New units that recruit through Campus recruitment from the educational institutes in Goa.

schemeName: Promotion of Energy Audit and Conservation of Energy (PEACE): Training Programme
briefDescription: "Promotion of Energy Audit and Conservation of Energy (PEACE): Training Programme" is introduced to enable MSMEs to establish the systems and processes necessary to improve energy performance, and energy efficiency, and help reduce energy consumption and costs.

schemeName: Payroll Subsidy
briefDescription: The scheme "Payroll Subsidy" by the Govt of Tamil Nadu, is introduced with the objective of assisting MSMEs in reducing their employee cost. The scheme provides reimbursement of employee's contributions to the EPF for their employees, subject to a maximum of ₹ 24,000/- per employee per annum.

schemeName: AICTE e-Shodh Sindhu Scheme (eSS)
briefDescription:
AICTE e-Shodh Sindhu Scheme (eSS) provides subscriptions of e-Resources like Web of Science, Scopus,
ASME, ASCE and Bentham Science to institutions.

schemeName: "Grant to Silk Societies/Agency" Component of the "Development of Silk" Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme "Grant to Silk Societies/Agency" aims to encourage the silk weaving artisans to form registered societies/agencies to develop a cluster approach among the artisans which is effective and advisable at present for the successful development of their business.

schemeName: "Grant of Margin Money for Availing the Capital Loan" Component of the "Development of Silk" Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage the entrepreneur to set up Silk Weaving Units in Puducherry. This margin money grants will reduce the initial financial burden on the entrepreneurs while availing term loan/working capital loan from the financial institutions for setting up of silk weaving units.

schemeName: Sales Rebate under 'Marketing And Publicity'
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a sales rebate of 15% to the Sales Emporia / Showrooms recognized by the UT of Puducherry for the sale of Handicrafts and micro and small enterprises products manufactured by the units in Puducherry. The objective is to promote the sale of the products of MSMEs.

schemeName: "Capital Investment Subsidy: Physically Handicapped Persons/ Ex-Servicemen" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries"
briefDescription: Through this scheme, the new industrial units which started production on or after 5th August 2009 by physically handicapped entrepreneurs and Ex-Servicemen for the investments made on land, building and plant and machinery are eligible for capital investment subsidy at the rate of 25%.

schemeName: "Rent Subsidy" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries"
briefDescription: This scheme aims to support SC/ST and women entrepreneurs who have initiated production on or after 27-3-2002 in a rented building. It provides rent subsidy for the first five years from the commencement of commercial production on a tapering basis, with a max ceiling of ₹5,000 per month.

schemeName: "Generator Subsidy" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries"
briefDescription: Through this scheme, the micro, small and medium industrial units (manufacturing and service sector) shall be eligible for the grant of 50% subsidy with a cap of ₹5,00,000/- per industrial unit on the investment made on or after 5-3-2009 on generator sets. The applications are accepted offline.

schemeName: "Assistance for Intellectual Property Protection Support" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - Various Incentives"
briefDescription: Through this scheme, assistance of 50% is provided subject to a maximum of ₹2,00,000/- for the expenditure for obtaining domestic patent (₹5,00,000/- for international patent). The applications are accepted offline in the prescribed form available on the Official Website of the Department.

schemeName: "Employment Incentive" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries"
briefDescription: A Wage/Employment subsidy of 20% of wage/ salary up to a maximum of ₹5,00,000/- per annum is provided in the case of workers who are covered under the Provident Fund (PF). The new units which commence production on or after 2-8-2004 would alone be eligible for this incentive for 5 years.

schemeName: "Outstanding Exporter" under “Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - State Awards to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises”
briefDescription: "Outstanding Exporter" under “Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - State Awards to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises” by the Industries & Commerce Dept, Puducherry, awards the direct manufacture exporters that are exporting for 3 years.

schemeName: Harvesting Tools Assistance for Scheduled Castes (HRT-4)
briefDescription: Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to farmers belonging to the SC category as well as to FPOs (Farmers Producer Organizations), FPCs (Farmers Producer Companies), FIGs (Farmer Interest Groups), SHGs (Self-Help Groups), and Cooperative Societies for purchasing harvesting tools.

schemeName: Harvesting Tools Assistance for Scheduled Tribes (HRT-3)
briefDescription: Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to farmers belonging to the ST category as well as to FPOs (Farmers Producer Organizations), FPCs (Farmers Producer Companies), FIGs (Farmer Interest Groups), SHGs (Self-Help Groups), and Cooperative Societies for purchasing harvesting tools.

schemeName: Handicrafts Export Award
briefDescription: The "Handicrafts Export Award" scheme was launched by the Handlooms, Handicrafts, Textiles, and Khadi Dept, Government of Tamil Nadu. This award is given to encourage the exporters of handicraft items with a cash prize of ₹40,000/-, 4 gm gold medal, thamirapattiram & a certificate.

schemeName: Pilgrimage Rejuvenation and Spiritual Augmentation Drive (PRASHAD)
briefDescription: Launched in 2014–2015, the scheme "Pilgrimage Rejuvenation and Spiritual Augmentation Drive (PRASAD)" is a Central Sector Scheme by the Ministry of Tourism, Government of India. The scheme focuses on developing and identifying pilgrimage sites across India to enrich the religious tourism experience.

schemeName: West Bengal Handloom and Khadi Weavers Financial Benefit Scheme 2024: Support for One Time Settlement (OTS) of NPA Accounts of PWCS
briefDescription: “Support for One Time Settlement (OTS) of NPA Accounts of PWCS" is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Handloom and Khadi Weavers Financial Benefit Scheme 2024” by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal aims to make PWCS debt free by providing financial support for OTS of NPA accounts.

schemeName: The West Bengal Incentive Scheme: Subsidy for Quality Improvement
briefDescription: “Subsidy for Quality Improvement” incentives under the “WBIS” scheme aims to provide a reimbursement for the fixed capital investment expenditure incurred for quality improvement, modernization and installation of pollution control devices and for obtaining ISI/BIS/ISO certification.

schemeName: West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme: Power Subsidy
briefDescription: “Power Subsidy” incentives under “West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME&T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide power subsidy on electricity consumption for 5 years from the date of commencement of production.

schemeName: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: Power Subsidy (PS)
briefDescription: “Power Subsidy (PS)” incentives under “Banglashree for MSMEs” scheme implemented by the MSMEs Dept., Government of West Bengal, aims to provide power subsidy on the electricity consumed for the manufacturing activity to an eligible micro or small enterprise.

schemeName: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: Subsidy for Water Conservation/Environment Compliance (WCS)
briefDescription: “Subsidy for Water Conservation/Environment Compliance” incentives  by the MSMEs Dept., Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement of expenditure incurred by it towards the cost of captive Effluent Water Treatment Plant for wastewater recycling and/ or other pollution control devices.

schemeName: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: Subsidy for Standard Quality Compliance
briefDescription: “Subsidy for Standard Quality Compliance” incentive under the “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement of the expenditure incurred for obtaining certification from approved Institutions/ Research Labs.

schemeName: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: Subsidy for Patent Registration
briefDescription: “Subsidy for Patent Registration” incentive under the “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal,  aims to provide reimbursement of expenditure incurred by it for obtaining Patent Registration.

schemeName: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: Subsidy for Energy Efficiency
briefDescription: “Subsidy for Energy Efficiency” incentives under the “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide a reimbursement for the cost of energy audit and installations for energy conservation as per energy audit.

schemeName: Scheme of Financial Assistance for Cultural Organization for Holding Conference, Seminar, Symposium, Exhibition, Festival, Competition etc.
briefDescription: The Arts and Culture Department launched the "Scheme of Financial Assistance for Cultural Organization for Holding Conference, Seminar, Symposium, Exhibition, Festival, Competition etc." The scheme aims to provide annual grant to the institution/organization organizing a seminar, symposium.

schemeName: Sanctioning of M.C.R. Chappals to Senior Citizens
briefDescription: The "Sanctioning of M.C.R. Chappals to Senior Citizens" scheme aims to provide M.C.R. (Micro Cellular Rubber) chappals to senior citizens. This initiative ensures that eligible senior citizens receive the necessary support to improve their comfort and mobility.

schemeName: Mahila Samridhi Yojana under NSKFDC- Haryana
briefDescription: This scheme offers loans up to ₹1,00,000/- to women Safai Karamcharis or their dependents for economic development through self-employment initiatives, such as establishing cloth shops, dairies, tea shops, bangle shops, beauty parlours, papad making, basketry, tailoring shops, etc.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Assistance For Entrepreneurship Under Skill Development
briefDescription: “Assistance For Entrepreneurship Under Skill Development” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, DNH & DD, aims to provide assistance to budding entrepreneurs and their staffs to undergo Entrepreneurship /Management training.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Assistance For Saving In Consumption Of Energy And Water
briefDescription: “Assistance For Saving In Consumption Of Energy And Water” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, DNH & DD, aims to provide assistance to the existing/ new Enterprise for taking action for saving in consumption of Energy and Water.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for Textile Sector: Assistance Of Interest Subsidy For Textile Sector
briefDescription: “Assistance Of Interest Subsidy For Textile Sector” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for Textile Sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide credit linked interest subsidy for Textile and Technical Textile sector.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) For Handicraft Artisans: Assistance For Capital Investment For The Handloom And Handicrafts Artisans Of The U.T. Requiring Financial Assistance For Purchase Of Machinery Or Raw Materials
briefDescription: This is a sub-scheme under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)”, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, that aims to provide financial assistance for purchase of machinery or raw materials for development of their business.

schemeName: Ex-Gratia Grant for Disability to Defence Forces Personnel
briefDescription: Under the scheme, the ex-gratia grant will be given to those personnel of the Defence Forces hailing from Haryana who get disabled for life and are boarded out of service due to disability declared as in war/operation, in operational area, terrorist activities & natural calamities, etc.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Orphan Children of Ex-Servicemen
briefDescription: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹3,000/‐ per month shall be granted to those Orphan Children of Ex-Servicemen only who are bonafide resident of the Haryana State and are not in receipt of any kind of financial assistance from any Department of Haryana Government.

schemeName: Talab Matsyiki Vishesh Sahayata Yojana (Anusuchit Jaati/Janajati/Ati Pichhada)
briefDescription: The Bihar Government's Animal and Fisheries Resources Department has introduced the "Talab Matsyiki Vishesh Sahayata Yojana (Anusuchit Jaati/Janajati/Ati Pichhada)" aims to support fish farmers by providing financial and technical assistance for pond construction, installation of necessary equipment

schemeName: Pathari Kshetr Talab Nirman Aadharit Matsya Paalan ki Yojana
briefDescription: The "Pathari Kshetr Talab Nirman Aadharit Matsya Paalan ki Yojana" aims to promote fisheries by constructing ponds and setting up related supporting units in plateau-dominated districts. The initiative is designed to create new employment opportunities and provide a means of livelihood for farmers.

schemeName: Disabled State Level Award Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to encourage persons with disabilities and organizations working for the interests of persons with disabilities and to motivate the community for overall rehabilitation of persons with disabilities.

schemeName: Farmers Interest Group (FIG)
briefDescription: The “Farmers Interest Group (FIG)” scheme supports every group of 15 farmers with grants for agricultural development. The scheme offers assistance for office equipment, training, ID cards, and district-level meetings.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Alpsankhyak Chhatravas Yojana
briefDescription: Under this scheme, students belonging to minority communities who are studying in a recognized institution, school, college, university, or technical institution in their respective districts and residing in minority hostels are provided a monthly stipend of ₹1,000/-.

schemeName: Providing Mini Tractor and its Sub Parts to the Self Help Group of Scheduled Castes
briefDescription: The "Providing Mini tractor and its sub parts to the Self Help Group of Scheduled Castes" is a scheme by the Govt. of Maharashtra. This scheme aims to improve the financial condition of the scheduled castes and Nav-Buddhists Self Help Group.

schemeName: Vadh Se Bachaye Govansh Ko Sahayata Yojana
briefDescription: The "Vadh Se Bachaye Govansh Ko Sahayata Yojana" scheme, initiated by the Directorate of Gopalan on 02/07/2015, provides financial assistance for the care and maintenance of cattle rescued from illegal slaughter or smuggling.

schemeName: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance for Power Connection Charges
briefDescription: The "Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs" aims to empower the state's dynamic MSME sector, which significantly contributes to employment, GDP, and exports.

schemeName: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance in Rent to MSEs
briefDescription: The "Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs" aims to empower the state's dynamic MSME sector, which significantly contributes to employment, GDP, and exports.

schemeName: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance for Interest Subsidy to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprise (Manufacturing Sector)
briefDescription: The "Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs" aims to empower the state's dynamic MSME sector, which significantly contributes to employment, GDP, and exports.

schemeName: Scheme of Assistance for Common Environment Infrastructure: Scheme of Assistance for Strengthening the Regulation and Environmental Compliance
briefDescription: The scheme "Scheme of Assistance for Common Environment Infrastructure" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy aims to provide incentives for environmental compliance to ensure long-term economic and ecological balance.

schemeName: Scheme for Assistance to Logistic Park
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Financial Assistance to Logistic Parks" aims to promote the development of logistic parks to enhance infrastructure and streamline the supply chain across the state.

schemeName: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to Large Industries and Thrust Sector: Assistance of Interest Subsidy
briefDescription: The "Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to Large Industries and Thrust Sector"  aims to provide incentives to attract increased investments in the manufacturing sector to create more employment opportunities in Gujarat.

schemeName: Scheme for Financial Assistance to Integrated Logistics Facilities: Capital Subsidy
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Financial Assistance to Integrated Logistics Facilities" under the Gujarat Integrated Logistics and Logistics Park Policy, provides financial support to private developers for creating logistics facilities and parks with the necessary infrastructure and services.

schemeName: Integrated Fisheries Scheme
briefDescription: The "Integrated Fisheries Scheme" by the Fisheries Division, Government of Jharkhand, aims to promote fish-duck farming and increase fish farmers' income. The scheme provides financial assistance of up to 80% for eligible SC/ST/women beneficiaries and 70% for others.

schemeName: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance of Capital Investment Subsidy
briefDescription: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" aims to support SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthen MSMEs, making them globally competitive.

schemeName: Goa Traditional Bakers (Poders) Subsidy Scheme
briefDescription: "Goa Traditional Bakers (Poders) Subsidy Scheme" aims to provide financial assistance to traditional bakers (poders) in Goa to ensure the protection and growth of this traditional occupation. Subsidies for the purchase of flour are provided to traditional bakers who produce essential Goan breads.

schemeName: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Financial Support to MSMEs in ZED Certification
briefDescription: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" aims to support SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthen MSMEs, making them globally competitive.

schemeName: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance for Interest Subsidy (Manufacturing Sector)
briefDescription: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" aims to support SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthen MSMEs, making them globally competitive.

schemeName: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance for Raising Capital through SME Exchange
briefDescription: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" aims to support SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthen MSMEs, making them globally competitive.

schemeName: Fair Recreational Activity and Non-Competitive Involvement in Sports Urban Connect Scheme (F.R.A.N.C.I.S Urban Connect Scheme)
briefDescription: "Fair Recreational Activity and Non-Competitive Involvement in Sports Urban Connect Scheme (F.R.A.N.C.I.S Urban Connect Scheme)" aims to provide safe play areas for healthy recreation and sports to urban communities. Assistance is provided to develop safe play areas in urban spaces.

schemeName: Preferential Purchase Incentives for Micro and Small Enterprises Scheme
briefDescription: "Preferential Purchase Incentives for Micro and Small Enterprises Scheme" aims to encourage and boost the Micro and Small Scale Enterprise Sector. Benefits such as price matching, reduced tender document costs, and priority in payments are provided to Micro and Small Enterprises.

schemeName: Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME): Financial Support to MSMEs in ZED Certification
briefDescription: The scheme "Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME)" launched by the Industries and Mines Department aims to position Gujarat as a global business hub, promoting sustainable manufacturing, MSME growth, and export competitiveness.

schemeName: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance to MSME Manufacturing Sector Participation in the Exhibition (National and International)
briefDescription: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" aims to support SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthen MSMEs, making them globally competitive.

schemeName: Gujarat Textile Policy: Capital Subsidy (Fiscal Incentives to Labour Intensive Unit)
briefDescription: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

schemeName: Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME): Assistance in Implementation of Information and Communication Technology (ICT)
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME)" launched by the Industries and Mines Department aims to position Gujarat as a global business hub, promoting sustainable manufacturing, MSME growth, and export competitiveness.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemeName: National Livestock Mission: Promotion of Piggery Entrepreneur
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship in pig farming by providing a one-time capital subsidy of up to ₹30 lakh to eligible entrepreneurs and organizations to establish breeder farms.

schemeName: Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME): Assistance for Raising Capital through SME Exchange
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME)" launched by the Industries and Mines Department aims to position Gujarat as a global business hub, promoting sustainable manufacturing, MSME growth, and export competitiveness.

schemeName: Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME):  Assistance for Reimbursement of CGTMSE Fees
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME)" launched by the Industries and Mines Department aims to position Gujarat as a global business hub, promoting sustainable manufacturing, MSME growth, and export competitiveness.

schemeName: Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME): Assistance in Rent to MSEs
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME)" launched by the Industries and Mines Department aims to position Gujarat as a global business hub, promoting sustainable manufacturing, MSME growth, and export competitiveness.

schemeName: Gujarat Textile Policy: Interest Subsidy
briefDescription: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

schemeName: Shilp Guru Award
briefDescription: The “Shilp Guru Award” for master craftspersons was introduced by the Ministry of Textiles to honor legendary master craftspersons of handicrafts whose work and dedication have contributed not only to the preservation but also to the promotion of the rich and diverse craft heritage of the country.

schemeName: Scheme to Provide Assistance for Setting Up Farmer Support Centers in State Market Committees and for Computerization of All Market Committees
briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to establish farmer support centers at market committee levels and computerize all market committees in Gujarat.

schemeName: Goa State Export Market Development Scheme, 2008
briefDescription: The scheme "Goa State Export Market Development Scheme" encouraged Goan industries to improve export markets and support them in establishing their goods firmly in the export market. It provided interest-free loans up to ₹5,00,000/- for participating in exhibitions and market study tours abroad.

schemeName: Creation of Modern Facilities in Market Committee: Scheme to provide assistance foe setting up modern facilities in Market Committee
briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to Market Committees for setting up modern facilities, improving agricultural infrastructure, and enhancing the competitiveness of agricultural markets.

schemeName: Scheme to Provide Assistance to Sate Market Committees as well as Taluka-District Co-operative Purchase and Sale Union to Construct Large Size Warehouse Godowns
briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to State Market Committees and Taluka-District Co-operative Purchase and Sale Unions for constructing large-sized warehouse godowns

schemeName: Gujarat Textile Policy: Assistance to SHG for Job Work (Fiscal Incentives to Labour Intensive Unit)
briefDescription: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

schemeName: Interest Subsidy Scheme for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe Entrepreneurs
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage SC/ST entrepreneurs to establish micro or small-scale service enterprises & to expand, diversify, or modernize their existing units. Under this scheme, a loan amount ranging from a min. of ₹20.00 lakhs to a max. of ₹1,000.00 lakhs is provided at an interest rate of 4%.

schemeName: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Equipment in Tribal Areas
briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to enhance fish production and provide employment opportunities to Scheduled Tribes (ST) individuals engaged in inland fisheries.

schemeName: Construction of Dudhghar/ Godown (Scheduled Tribe Area)
briefDescription: The scheme "Construction of Dudhghar/ Godown (Scheduled Tribe Area)" provides financial assistance for the construction of Dudhghar (milk storage unit) and Godown (cattle feed storage) for Village Milk Producer Co-operative Societies in Scheduled Tribe areas of Gujarat.

schemeName: West Bengal Incentive Scheme for Approved Industrial Park (SAIP) for MSMEs: Construction of Approach Road
briefDescription: The “Construction of Approach Road” under the “SAIP for MSMEs” scheme, facilitates the Private Industrial Park in provision with Approach Road catering to the AIP.

schemeName: Marathi Drama Competition ‘A' & ‘B' Group
briefDescription: The scheme "Marathi Drama Competition 'A' & 'B' Group" is a state-level initiative by the Kala Academy, under the Department of Art and Culture, Government of Goa. It provides a platform to urban and rural theatre groups and offers transport assistance for artistes and stage material as per govt.

schemeName: Scheme for Additional Interest Subsidy over and above RIPS 2024 and Reimbursement of Annual Credit Guarantee Fee
briefDescription: As per the MSME Policy 2024, it supports the establishment of new MSMEs and the expansion, diversification, or modernization of existing ones by offering interest subsidies and reimbursement of guarantee fees to ease access to finance and reduce the cost of credit.

schemeName: One Act Play competition at High School, Higher Secondary School and College level (Konkani, Marathi & English)
briefDescription: The "One Act Play Competition" is a Cultural Scheme by the Department of Art, Culture and Museums, Government of Goa, encouraging students' personality development through theatre, with participation open to all Goan schools and colleges, and transport assistance provided as per government norms.

schemeName: Scheme for Supply of Improved Seeds for Fodder
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Supply of Improved Seeds for Fodder" aims to supply improved quality fodder seeds to registered Gaushalas and Panjarapols to ensure round-the-year green fodder availability for livestock.

schemeName: Uttarakhand Tourism Entrepreneur Promotion Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to aims to encourage and financially strengthen permanent residents/entrepreneurs of the state who invest ₹1 crore to ₹5 crore in the tourism sector.

schemeName: Mahila Nursery Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote nursery establishment by providing women's groups with high-quality seedlings or saplings from certified sources, along with a fixed grant, technical support, and training to ensure effective nursery operations.

schemeName: Rural Sports and Health Promotion Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme promotes fitness among rural youth by providing financial assistance to the mangal dals for setting up open gyms in each Gram Panchayat. Financial assistance of ₹17,960/- is allocated per gram panchayat for installing open gym/community fitness equipment to encourage fitness & well-being.

schemeName: Scheme of Grants-in-Aid for supporting professional associations/ organisations of social scientists, companies and trusts duly registered under the Companies Act for their development
briefDescription: The Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR), under the Ministry of Education, Government of India, provides Grants-in-Aid for supporting professional associations/ organisations of social scientists, companies and trusts  for their development.

schemeName: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries: Prawn Seed Stocking Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and to provide employment to Scheduled Caste (SC) individuals involved in inland fisheries activities.

schemeName: Grants Provisioned under Uttarakhand Tourism Policy, 2023
briefDescription: The aims to promote sustainable tourism development in the state by encouraging private and institutional investment in the tourism sector through targeted financial incentives and subsidies.

schemeName: Entrepreneurship and Development Programme
briefDescription: Under this scheme, interested entrepreneurs, NGOs, scientists, researchers, and teachers from across the state are provided support to convert natural resources into viable business opportunities by enhancing technology and value addition.

schemeName: Pandit Deen Dayal Upadhyay Vigyaan Gram Sankul Pariyojana
briefDescription: The project aims to promote sustainable rural development through the application of science & technology to enhance livelihoods in selected villages throughout Uttarakhand. Under the project, rural development initiatives are implemented through the formation of village clusters across the state.

schemeName: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to Registered Organizations/Government Organization/Non-Government Organizations/Institutions for Running Residential Facilities/Half Way Homes for Persons with Disabilities
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to registered organizations, Government organizations, and institutions for running residential facilities or halfway homes for Persons with Disabilities. The scheme provides financial support in the form of operational grants.

schemeName: Drone Policy 2023 - Information Technology Development Agency
briefDescription: The policy aims to promote the use, innovation, and development of drone technology for improving service delivery and governance in Uttarakhand, while strengthening the drone ecosystem through collaboration among industry, academia, and government.

schemeName: World Bank-funded Uttarakhand Drinking Water Programme (For Semi-Urban Areas)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide affordable and reliable domestic drinking water connections to eligible households in selected semi-urban areas of Uttarakhand, ensuring improved access to safe and adequate drinking water.

schemeName: Swachh Bharat Mission (Grameen - Waste Management) - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote sustainable solid and liquid waste management in rural Uttarakhand by providing necessary infrastructure and facilities to ensure cleaner villages, improved sanitation, and better public health.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana - Har Khet Ko Pani (Groundwater Irrigation Scheme) Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide assured and sustainable irrigation to every farm by developing groundwater-based irrigation facilities for farmers. This scheme is a centrally sponsored scheme with a funding pattern of 90% Central share and 10% State share.

schemeName: Jal Jeevan Mission (Har Ghar Jal Yojana) - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide every rural household in Uttarakhand with safe and adequate drinking water through household tap connections, ensuring the supply of 55 litres of potable water per person per day.

schemeName: Establishment of Tea Factories - Uttarakhand Tea Development Board
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the development of the tea industry in Uttarakhand by establishing tea factories for processing locally produced green leaves, generating local employment, enhancing farmers’ income through fair procurement, and developing a sustainable tea value chain in the state.

schemeName: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Resources in Tribal Areas: Prawn Seed Stocking - Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and provide employment to people involved in inland fisheries activities.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY-Inland): Medium Biofloc Establishment - Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and provide employment to people involved in inland fisheries activities.

schemeName: Ayurswasthya Yojana: AYUSH and Public Health
briefDescription: The scheme-component aims to promote AYUSH-based interventions to improve community health outcomes by supporting preventive, promotive, curative, and rehabilitative healthcare services.

schemeName: A Scheme to Provide Assistance for Building E-Market Facilities in Market Committees
briefDescription: This scheme provides financial assistance to market committees in Gujarat to establish e-market facilities, aligning with the National Agriculture Market Policy for a unified national e-market.

schemeName: Assistance to Co-operative Irrigation Societies M. N. R.-10 (General Area)
briefDescription: The scheme "Assistance to Co-operative Irrigation Societies, M. N. R.-10 (General Area)"  aims to increase agricultural production by supporting irrigation cooperative societies through the provision of pumps and electric motors for efficient water distribution.

schemeName: Assistance to Trusts/Institutions for Setting Up Cultural Centers/Auditoriums in the Municipal Area
briefDescription: The scheme "Assistance to Trusts/Institutions for Setting Up Cultural Centers/Auditoriums in the Municipal Area" aims to promote cultural infrastructure through financial assistance to trusts and institutions for building or renovating cultural centres within municipal areas.

schemeName: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme- For Startups
briefDescription: The scheme “Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)” was launched by the DPIIT on 19th April 2021 with an outlay of INR 945 Crore to provide financial assistance to startups for Proof of Concept, prototype development, product trials, market-entry, and commercialization.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemeName: Electronic Manufacturing Clusters (EMC) Scheme: Common Facility Centres/ Brownfield Electronics Manufacturing Clusters
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the upgradation of Brownfield EMCs through Common Facility Centres (CFCs). It provides financial assistance for infrastructure improvement and shared facilities for existing electronics manufacturing units.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemeName: Scheme for Promotion of Manufacturing of Electronic Components and Semiconductors (SPECS)"
briefDescription: The scheme aims to offset the disability for domestic manufacturing of components and semiconductors to strengthen the electronics manufacturing ecosystem. Through this scheme, a financial incentive of 25% on capital expenditure to legal entities registered in India.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemeName: Production Linked Incentive Scheme (PLI) for IT Hardware Scheme 2.O
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote domestic manufacturing of Laptops, Tablets, All-in-One PCs, Servers, and Ultra Small Form Factor (USFF) devices in India through production-linked financial incentives.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemeName: Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial incentives for manufacturing electronic components in Bharat. Through this scheme, turnover and capital expenditure-linked incentives are provided to companies and Limited Liability Partnerships.

schemeName: The West Bengal Incentive Scheme: Capacity Utilisation
briefDescription: “Capacity Utilisation” incentives under the “The West Bengal Incentive Scheme” implemented by the Dept. of Tourism, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide additional Floor Area Ratio (FAR) over and above the maximum permissible FAR as may be fixed by the competent authority.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemeName: India BPO Promotion Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to create employment opportunities and promote investment in the IT/ITeS sector by establishing BPO/ITeS units in smaller cities. Through this scheme, financial support in the form of Viability Gap Funding is provided to eligible companies.

schemeName: Technology Acquisition Assistance
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support Micro and Small enterprises in state to acquire advanced technology/ software related to their production/ manufacturing processes through assistance towards cost incurred for technology/ software acquisition.

schemeName: Sagar Samman Award- Sagar Samman Varuna Award
briefDescription: This scheme aims to recognize outstanding maritime contributions by providing top national recognition to distinguished maritime professionals.

schemeName: Ayush Oushadhi Gunvatta evam Uttpadan Samvardhan Yojana (AOGUSY): Pharmacovigilance of ASU&H Drugs Including Surveillance of Misleading Advertisements
briefDescription: The scheme-component aims to establish a robust safety monitoring and surveillance system for Ayurveda, Siddha, Unani and Homoeopathy (ASU&H) drugs and to monitor misleading advertisements related to Ayush medicines.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: Assistance to Training Institutions Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for creation, strengthening, and expansion of training institutions under MSME for skill development and entrepreneurship training.

schemeName: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas: Support to Small Growers' Collectives/ SHGs/ Cooperatives for Coffee Marketing
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to extend support to small and tiny growers, incentivizing them to form collectives/ Self Help Groups/ Cooperatives, thus encouraging them to take up marketing of coffee produced on a community-based approach through suitable financial incentives.

schemeName: Shahari Waqf Sampatti Vikas Yojana
briefDescription: Under the scheme, interest free loan to Waqf Boards (WBs)/waqf institutions is granted to various Waqf Boards and Waqf Institutions in the country for construction of economically viable buildings on the Waqf land, such as commercial complex, marriage halls, hospitals, cold storage etc..

schemeName: Comprehensive Handicrafts Cluster Development Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance, infrastructure development, skill upgradation, and market linkage support to artisans, craftsmen, and cluster-based enterprises.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: Consortia & Tender Marketing Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme aims to facilitate Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs) in marketing their products and services through individual or collective participation in tenders via consortia. It helps MSEs secure bulk orders, improve competitiveness, and access government procurement opportunities.

schemeName: Technology Development And Utilization Programme For Women
briefDescription: In order to meet the specific needs of women and to enhance the contribution of women towards technology capability building, the “Technology Development & Utilization Programme for Women (TDUPW)” has been formulated by the Department of Scientific and Industrial Research (DSIR).

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemeName: Flexible Memorandum of Understanding (Flexi-MoU) Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme is designed to cater to the needs of both industry as well as trainees. The scheme allows industries to train candidates as per their skill set requirements and provides trainees with an industry environment aligned with the market demand and latest technology to undergo training.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of New and Renewable Energy
schemeName: Production Linked Incentive Scheme Tranche-I under National Programme on High Efficiency Solar PV Modules
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the manufacturing of high-efficiency solar photovoltaic modules and reduce import dependence. Through this scheme, Production Linked Incentive is provided to eligible manufacturers.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: Coir Vikas Yojana- Export Market Promotion Scheme
briefDescription: Coir Board is implementing the Central Sector Scheme “Export Market Promotion Scheme” with a view to improve the export performance of Indian Coir Sector through various export market promotion activities.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: MSME Sustainable (ZED) Certification Scheme
briefDescription: MSME Sustainable (ZED) Certification Scheme is an extensive drive to create awareness amongst MSMEs about Zero Defect Zero Effect (ZED) practices and motivate and incentivize them for ZED Cerficaon while also encouraging them to become MSME Champions.

schemeName: Scheme for Grant of Financial Assistance for Administering Road Safety Advocacy and Awards for the Outstanding Work Done in the Field of Road Safety
briefDescription: The objective of the Scheme is to stimulate and encourage opportunities for various agencies through participation, in order to create awareness on road safety.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: Intellectual Property Right Scheme Under MSME Innovative Scheme
briefDescription: Intellectual Property Right Scheme offers legal and intellectual property filing support including patents, trademarks, copyrights, designs, geographical indications (GI) etc.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: Export Promotion Council Membership Reimbursement Scheme for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe
briefDescription: Export Promotion Council Membership Reimbursement Scheme provides  reimbursement to an SC/ST Micro & small enterprises(MSEs), on annual membership subscription fee / one-time subscription charges/entry fee charged by various Export Promotion Councils (EPC).

schemeName: AICTE-IDEA (Idea Development, Evaluation & Application) LAB SCHEME
briefDescription: Through Idea Lab Scheme, AICTE will be setting up Idea Labs in AICTE approved institutions to encourage students for application of science, technology engineering and mathematics (STEM) fundamentals towards enhanced hands-on experience, learning by doing and even product visualization.

schemeName: Scheme for Setting Up of Plastic Parks
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase the competitiveness and value addition in the plastic processing industry through cluster development. It provides grant-in-aid up to ₹40,00,00,000/- for common infrastructure benefits intended for Special Purpose Vehicles and local enterprises.

schemeName: VAIshwik BHArtiya Vaigyanik (VAIBHAV) Fellowship
briefDescription:
VAIBHAV Fellowship envisages collaboration between scientists of Indian Diaspora with
Indian Higher Educational Institutions/Universities/Public Funded Scientific
Institutions. Fellow would identify an Indian Institution for collaboration &
may spend upto two months in a year for a max. of 3 years.

schemeName: Star College Scheme For Strengthening Of Science Education And Training At Undergraduate Level
briefDescription: The Dept. of Biotechnology has launched "Star College Scheme for Strengthening of Science Education and Training at Undergraduate Level" for improving critical thinking and 'hands-on' experimental work at the undergraduate (college) level in sciences.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for Thrust Sectors: III. Scheme C4: For Food Processing Industries
briefDescription: “Scheme For Food Processing Industries'' under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for Thrust Sectors, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide Interest Subsidy to the Establishment /Expansion of Food processing industries.

schemeName: Supporting Community Radio Movement in India
briefDescription: The GOI has a policy for grant of License to eligible organisations for setting up of Community Radio Stations. To support the Sector, the Scheme provides financial assistance once the Community Radio is made operational by eligible organisation. The Scheme also has components for capacity building.

schemeName: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for Automobile and Auto Components Industry
briefDescription: The scheme offers financial incentives to boost domestic manufacturing of Advanced Automotive Technology products and attract investments in the automotive manufacturing value chain.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Raising and Accelerating MSME Performance (RAMP) Interventions: Reimbursement of Energy and Water Audit Fees- DNH&DD
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote resource efficiency and sustainability among MSMEs by encouraging the adoption of energy and water-saving measures through professional audits. It provides financial assistance to cover part of the audit cost.

schemeName: Infrastructure and Technology Support
briefDescription: The sub-scheme “Infrastructure and Technology Support” aims to develop world-class infrastructure in the country to support handicraft production, enhance product quality, and reduce costs to enable it to compete in the global market.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Raising and Accelerating MSME Performance (RAMP) Interventions: Reimbursement of GST Amount for Promoting Destination Wedding- DNH&DD
briefDescription: This intervention promotes tourism in the Union Territory by incentivising destination weddings organised through local MSME service providers by reimbursing the GST component paid by clients.

schemeName: Advance Authorisation(AA)
briefDescription: Advance Authorisation scheme enables duty free import of inputs for export production, including replenishment of inputs or duty remission Advance Authorisation covers manufacturer exporters or merchant exporters tied to supporting manufacturer(s).

schemeName: Financial Assistance For Development Of Buddhist/Tibetan Arts And Culture
briefDescription: The scheme “Financial Assistance for Development of Buddhist/Tibetan Arts and Culture” was launched by the Ministry of Culture, Government of India to provide financial assistance to voluntary Buddhist/Tibetan organizations including Monasteries.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - Swachhta Udyami Yojana – Swachhta Se Sampannta Ki Aur
briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure mechanised cleaning and provide related safe and sustainable livelihood opportunities to Safai Karamcharis and liberated Manual Scavengers. The Financial assistance is provided for the procurement and operation of sanitation-related equipment and vehicles for the target.

schemeName: Cultural Function And Production Grant Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme covers all ‘not-for-profit’ organizations, NGOs, Societies, Trusts, and Universities for supporting Seminars, Conference, Research, Workshops, Festivals, Exhibitions, Symposia, Drama-Theatre, Music, etc., and small research projects on different aspects of Indian Culture.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Credit Based Schemes For SC - Term Loan (TL)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for viable income-generating activities of Scheduled Caste beneficiaries. Through this scheme, term loans of up to 95% of the project cost are provided for projects costing up to ₹50,00,000/-.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: Khadi Karigar Janashree Bima Yojana
briefDescription: A group insurance scheme by MoMSME for khadi artisans (spinners and weavers). The scheme provides insurance cover against normal death, accidental death and disability of the insured member.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Formalisation Of Micro Food Processing Enterprises
briefDescription: Launched on 29th June 2020, PMFMPE is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme by the MoFPI, designed to address the challenges faced by the micro enterprises and to tap the potential of groups and cooperatives in supporting the upgradation and formalization of these enterprises.

schemeName: Modernisation And Removal Of Obsolescence
briefDescription: MODROB scheme, one of the AICTE Quality Improvement Scheme (AQIS), intends to support the development of laboratories with appropriate equipment/ technology/ tools/ software and encourages financial contribution from the industry.

schemeName: Galvanizing Organic Bio-Agro Resources Dhan (GOBARdhan)
briefDescription: GOBARdhan Scheme was launched in April 2018 as a part of the Solid and Liquid Waste Management component under Swachh Bharat Mission (Grameen) to positively impact village cleanliness and generate wealth and energy from cattle and organic waste. The main focus of GOBARDHAN is to keep villages clean.

schemeName: Haritha Haram
briefDescription: The objective of the Haritha Haram program is to increase the green cover of the state from the existing 24% to 33% by planting and nurturing millions of saplings every year. The program also aims to create awareness among the public about the importance of preserving and protecting the environment.

schemeName: The Meghalaya Victim Compensation Scheme, 2022
briefDescription: The Meghalaya Victim Compensation Scheme, 2022 is a social welfare scheme introduced by the Social Welfare Department, Govt. of Meghalaya. Under this scheme, financial assistance to the victim along with support services such as shelter, counseling, medical aid, legal assistance, education, etc.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana
briefDescription: Introduced by the Department of Fisheries, Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) is a scheme to bring about ecologically healthy, economically viable, and socially inclusive development of the fisheries sector of India.

schemeName: CM’s Lairik Heiminnashi Programme (CMLH): Pre-Matric Remedial Coaching
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide handholding support in the form of remedial coaching to students studying in government academic institutions or institutions receiving grant-in-aid support from the Government, who belong to minority, OBC or SC communities of the State of Manipur.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: Sub-mission On Agriculture Mechanization
briefDescription: The Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization was launched in 2014-15 by the Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers’ Welfare.

schemeName: Biponi Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to support to the Micro & Small enterprises to participate in different trade fairs and events within the State, in the Country and abroad for marketing of their products and also getting the exposure.

schemeName: Acharya Vidyasagar Gau Samvardhan Yojana
briefDescription: The objective of this scheme is to Increase in milk production, improving the economic status of the beneficiaries, increase in milk production capacity of animals and provide employment opportunities.

schemeName: National Handicrafts Development Programme: Infrastructure And Technology Support: URBAN HAAT
briefDescription: The scheme "Infrastructure & Technology Support: URBAN HAAT" is introduced is to set up a permanent marketing infrastructure in towns/ metropolitan cities to provide direct marketing facilities to handicrafts artisans/handloom weavers, enabling them to sell their products to wider target audience.

schemeName: Chief Minister’s Krishi Samuh Yojana
briefDescription: The Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh started the scheme “Chief Minister’s Krishi Samuh Yojana (CMKSY)” to empower the farmers through a cooperative approach by Institutionalisation of Farmers’ Producers’ Organisation and infusing timely support of good agriculture practices and marketing interventions.

schemeName: Chief Minister's Adarsh Gram Yoiana 2017
briefDescription: The Government of Arunachal Pradesh has decided to implement the Chief Minister's Adarsh Gram Yojana 2017 for creating model villages in the state.

schemeName: Himachal Pradesh Maharishi Valmiki Sampoorn Swachata Puraskar (state Sanitation Reward Scheme)
briefDescription: The Maharishi Valmiki Sampoorn Swachata Puruskar (MVSSP) is a scheme under the Swachh Bharat Mission (G), Rural Development Department, H.P Government to identify and recognize the cleanest Gram Panchayat at various levels, including block, district, division, and state.

schemeName: District Innovation And Challenge Fund
briefDescription: The objectives of the "District Innovation and Challenge Fund (DICF)" are to Instill a sense of competitiveness amongst the Deputy Commissioners for developmental interventions, and to bring innovation in the design, planning, and implementation of critical infrastructure.

schemeName: Chief Minister’s White Revolutions Scheme
briefDescription: The CMWRS is a scheme aimed at boosting milk production and rejuvenating cooperative systems in five potential districts of Arunachal Pradesh. It targets 200 dairy farmers in a cooperative model to create subsistence means of livelihood for poor farmers and enhance organic agricultural productivity.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: National Awards For Empowerment Of Persons With Disabilities: National Awards For Institutions Engaged In Empowering Persons With Disabilities: Divyangjano Ke Liye Sarvshrestha Niyoktha
briefDescription:
The "Divyangjano Ke Liye Sarvshrestha Niyoktha" award is given by DoEPwD to the outstanding employers of the disabled under: 
1.  Government organization.
2.  Public Sector Undertaking or Autonomous Body or Local Government Body.
3.  Private or Non-Governmental Organization.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: National Awards For Empowerment Of Persons With Disabilities: National Awards For Institutions Engaged In Empowering Persons With Disabilities: Divyangjanon Ke Sashaktikaran Men Karyrat Sarveshrestha Sansthan (Private Organization, NGO)
briefDescription: The "Divangjano ke Shashaktikaran Mein Karyrat Sarveshrestha Sansthan" award is given by DoEPwD to an organization working for the empowerment of Persons with Disabilities for a minimum period of 10 years after registration under Society Act/ Trust Act / Section 8 of Companies Act 2013.

schemeName: Financial Assistance For Cultural Activities In Performing Arts For Building Grants Including Studio Theatres
briefDescription: The scheme “Financial Assistance for Cultural Activities in Performing Arts for Building Grants Including Studio Theatres” was launched by the Ministry of Culture, Government of India.

schemeName: Agriculture And Processed Foods Export Promotion Scheme Of APEDA For The 15th Finance Commission Cycle (2021-22 To 2025-26)
briefDescription: The Financial Assistance Scheme (FAS) is an export promotion scheme run by APEDA. The scheme aims to facilitate the export of agri-products by providing assistance to exporters.

schemeName: Grant-in-Aid Scheme To Provide Financial Assistance To The Mahila Mandals/ Women’s Self-help Groups (SWAWLAMBHAN)
briefDescription: The SWAWLAMBHAN Scheme by the Govt. of Goa provides financial assistance to Mahila Mandals/Self-Help Groups for training/orientation for members of the Mahila Mandal/Self-Help Groups for generating their own activity for self-employment.

schemeName: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance in the Form of Grant-In-Aid to Bhajani/ Choir/ Cultural Group/ Institutions for Purchase of Musical Instruments
briefDescription: The Scheme Provides Financial Assistance in the form of a Grant-In-Aid to Bhajani/ Choir/ Cultural Group/ Institutions for the Purchase of Musical Instruments. The Scheme is implemented by the Directorate of Art and Culture.

schemeName: Trademark Reimbursement Scheme
briefDescription: “Trademark Reimbursement Scheme” is a part of the Start-up Policy 2017. For start-ups that have successfully entered the production/service delivery phase, and want to trademark their company name and logo, 50% of the cost of trade-mark registration of their company name and logo will be reimbursed.

schemeName: R&D Reimbursement Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme “R&D Reimbursement Scheme” is a part of the Start-up Policy 2017. The objective of the policy is to promote innovation amongst the Goans and local start-ups. 50% of R&D expenses, including salaries of PhD holders employed by start-ups, will be reimbursed for a period of two years.

schemeName: Interest Subsidy Reimbursement Scheme
briefDescription: Through the "Interest Subsidy Reimbursement Scheme”, the projects which show immense promise and potential will be eligible for a grant of 30% of the loan interest amount, for the purpose of repayment of the interest component of a loan availed.

schemeName: Seed Capital Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme “Seed Capital Scheme” is a scheme by the Department of Information Technology, Electronics and Communications, Government of Goa, for the Startups of Goa. Through this scheme, startups with a promising idea can get a one-time grant of up to ₹ 10,00,000.

schemeName: Tea Development and Promotion Scheme (TDPS): Plantation Development for Small Tea Growers (PDSTG): Mechanization for Individual Small Growers
briefDescription: The objective of this component is to increase the production, productivity and quality of tea, overall development of small tea growers to help them move up in the value chain, sustainability of production by promoting organic tea cultivation& climate resilient tea and to make them self-reliant.

schemeName: Skill Development Fee Reimbursement Scheme
briefDescription: Through the “Skill Development Fee Reimbursement Scheme”, the SPC will reimburse 50% of the fees up to ₹ 50,000/- to the students who have successfully completed an SPC-approved technical skill training program in any of the approved domains from a Goan educational institute.

schemeName: 25% Capital Investment Subsidy Scheme
briefDescription: The Union Territory of Lakshadweep has implemented the scheme “25% Capital Investment Subsidy” to provide financial assistance to local entrepreneurs for promoting Micro and small Enterprises in Lakshadweep.

schemeName: Salary Reimbursement Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme “Salary Reimbursement Scheme” is a scheme by the Dept. of Information Technology, Electronics and Communications, Govt. of Goa, for the Startups of Goa. For start-ups hiring local talent, 50% of the salary of fresher will be reimbursed, subject to a cap of ₹ 10,000 per month per recruit.

schemeName: Construction of Fish Markets
briefDescription: “Construction of Fish Markets” is a scheme by the Dept. of Fisheries, Govt. of Goa. Through this scheme, subsidy is provided to the local bodies such as Municipalities and Village Panchayat in the State of Goa for the construction of fish markets. The applications are accepted only in offline mode.

schemeName: Quality Certification Reimbursement Scheme
briefDescription: The objective of the "Quality Certification Reimbursement Scheme" is to provide Quality Certification Reimbursement to the eligible Information Technology Units in the State of Goa. Reimbursement of the cost of industry-standard quality certification, capped at ₹ 5,00,000 per unit.

schemeName: "Grant To Handicrafts Societies" Component of the "Development of Handicrafts" Scheme
briefDescription: “Grant To Handicrafts Societies” by the Department of Industries and Commerce, UT of Puducherry aims to encourage the creation of Handicrafts Societies to enhance coordination and skill among craftspeople. Grants are provided to registered societies for organizing or participating in exhibitions.

schemeName: "Exhibition" Component of the "Development Of Handicrafts" Scheme
briefDescription: The "Exhibition" scheme by the Department of Industries and Commerce, Government of Puducherry, was introduced to boost the marketability of handicrafts and enhance sales through the organization of exhibitions. These exhibitions are conducted locally and in various states of the country.

schemeName: "Capital Investment Subsidy: Information Technology (IT) / Information Technology Enabled Services (ITES) Industries" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries"
briefDescription: The new IT/ITES industrial unit which started production on or after 6-11-2002 are provided with subsidy on the investments made on plant and machinery @ 20% thereon subject to a maximum of ₹20,00,000/- for the large, medium, small and micro enterprises during the period of operation of the scheme.

schemeName: "Capital Investment Subsidy: 5% Additional Capital Investment Subsidy to Karaikal Region" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries"
briefDescription: The "Capital Investment Subsidy: 5% Additional Capital Investment Subsidy to Karaikal Region" is a Component of the "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries" Scheme by the Department of Industrial Development (Industries and Commerce), UT of Puducherry.

schemeName: "Infrastructure Subsidy" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries"
briefDescription: The "Infrastructure Subsidy" is a Component of the "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries" Scheme by the Industries and Commerce Department, Puducherry. 25% subsidy is provided to the industrial units who have made investments on buildings.

schemeName: "Employment Incentive" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - Various Incentives"
briefDescription: Through the "Employment Incentive" scheme, Wage/Employment subsidy of 20% wage/salary up to a maximum of ₹5,00,000/- per annum, in case of workers who are covered under Provident Fund (PF), will be granted. The applications are accepted offline in prescribed form available on the Official Website.

schemeName: "Innovation in Technology [Product (or) Process]" under “Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - State Awards to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises”
briefDescription: The award "Innovation in Technology [Product (or) Process]" under “Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - State Awards to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises” is conferred upon the industrial units who have patented their technology innovation.

schemeName: Assistance for Tools, Equipment, Shorting/Grading Equipment, PHM Equipment for Scheduled Castes (HRT-4)
briefDescription: Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to farmers belonging to the Scheduled Castes category as well as to farmer groups and cooperative societies for purchasing various tools, equipment, sorting/grading equipment, and Post-Harvest Management (PHM) equipment.

schemeName: Scheme for Supply of TV Sets to Industrial Establishments/Labour Welfare Centres/Clubs/Recreation Rooms
briefDescription: "Scheme for Supply of TV Sets to Industrial Establishments/Labour Welfare Centres/Clubs/Recreation Rooms" by the Dept of Labour and Employment, Goa aims to provide television sets to enable the workers/employees to witness programmes of nation national integration besides broadening their outlook.

schemeName: Financial Support Scheme for Farm Mechanization (FSSM)
briefDescription: "Financial Support Scheme for Farm Mechanization (FSSM)" by the Agriculture Department, Government of West Bengal aims to provide financial support as subsidy to the small and marginal farmers of the State for purchase of power operated farm equipment/ machinery.

schemeName: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: Subsidy for Standard Quality Compliance (SCCS)
briefDescription: “Subsidy for Standard Quality Compliance (SCCS)” incentives under “Banglashree for MSMEs” scheme implemented by the MSMEs Dept., Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement of the expenditure incurred for obtaining certification from approved Institutions/ Research Laboratories.

schemeName: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: State Capital Investment Subsidy (CIS)
briefDescription: “State Capital Investment Subsidy (CIS)” incentives under “Banglashree for MSMEs” scheme implemented by the MSMEs Department, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide Capital Investment Subsidy for its approved project to an eligible micro or small enterprise.

schemeName: West Bengal Handloom and Khadi Weavers Financial Benefit Scheme 2024: Assistance to Viable and Potentially Viable PWCS
briefDescription: “Assistance to Viable and Potentially Viable PWCS" is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Handloom and Khadi Weavers Financial Benefit Scheme 2024”, by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal aims to provide financial assistance to the societies who will fulfill the criteria of viability.

schemeName: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: Subsidy for Water Conservation/ Environment Compliance
briefDescription: “Subsidy for Water Conservation/ Environment Compliance” incentive under the “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement for expenditure incurred towards cost of captive sound pollution control devices.

schemeName: West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme: Reimbursement of Stamp Duty and Registration Fee
briefDescription: “Reimbursement of Stamp Duty and Registration Fee” incentives under “West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME&T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide a reimbursement of stamp duty and registration fee paid by the eligible textile sector enterprises for

schemeName: Grant-in-aid Scheme to Village Education Committees/Urban Education Committees for minor repairs of Government School buildings
briefDescription: "Grant-in-aid Scheme to Village Education Committees/Urban Education Committees for minor repairs of Government School buildings" was introduced by the Directorate of Education, Goa. The scheme provides grant-in-aid to address urgent minor repairs required in Government School buildings.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Assistance of Fixed Capital Investment Subsidy
briefDescription: “Assistance of Fixed Capital Investment Subsidy” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of  DNH & DD, aims to provide subsidy for the investment made in Gross Fixed Capital investment (GFCI).

schemeName: Micro Finance Scheme- Credit Line 2 for Minority Community
briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes &d Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under the scheme, small loans of ₹1,50,000/- per beneficiary are provided to members of Self-Help Groups (SHGs), either directly or through the SHGs.

schemeName: Establishment of Integrated Educational Complexes
briefDescription: The scheme "Establishment of Integrated Educational Complexes" by the Directorate of Education, Government of Goa, aims to address the inadequate infrastructure and congested conditions faced by government-aided educational institutions in urban areas such as Panaji, Margao, and Mapusa within Goa.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Incentive For Local Employment
briefDescription: “Incentive For Local Employment” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide One-time recruitment incentive to the Industrial Units for generating employment for local residents.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Reimbursement Of Free On Board (FOB) Expenses
briefDescription: “Reimbursement Of Free On Board (FOB) Expenses” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims for boosting exports in the Food/ Marine Food Processing Sector.

schemeName: Micro Finance Scheme- Credit Line 1 for Minority Community
briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes and Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under the scheme, small loans of ₹1,00,000/- are provided to members of SHGs, either directly or through the SHGs, to meet the needs of the poorest among the poor.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Blind Ex-Servicemen
briefDescription: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹3,000/‐ per month shall be granted to those Permanent Blind Ex-servicemen who are bonafide resident of Haryana & are not in receipt of any kind of pension/financial assistance either from Haryana Govt. or any other Department of Govt. of India.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemeName: National Livestock Mission: Establishment of State Semen Bank
briefDescription: "Establishment of State Semen Bank (Genetic Improvement of Sheep and Goat breeds)" aims at the genetic improvement of sheep/goat breeds through selective breeding by propagation of superior male germplasm through artificial insemination.

schemeName: Women Self Employment Scheme
briefDescription: The "Women Self Employment Scheme" encourages women to become self-reliant and supports their efforts in establishing small-scale industries or trade ventures, thereby improving their economic status & promoting self-employment opportunities across the state providing them financial assistance.

schemeName: Sikhligar’s Community Development Scheme
briefDescription: The "Sikhligar’s Community Development Scheme" aims to promote economic self-reliance among the Sikhligara community, the Corporation will provide a subsidy and a subsidy of 33% of the vehicle cost for purchasing goods tempos, or vehicles to economically backward of Karnataka state.

schemeName: Kayaka Spoorthi Scheme Karnataka
briefDescription: The "Kayaka Spoorthi Scheme" aims to provide financial assistance to women Self-Help Groups (SHGs) engaged in the leather industry. The goal is to promote self-sufficiency and economic independence by enabling these women to start or expand business activities related to leatherwork.

schemeName: Long Term-Loan to SC Co-op Spinning Mills under Special Component Plan
briefDescription: The scheme "Long Term-Loan to SC Co-op Spinning Mills under Special Component Plan" was introduced by the Department of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Government of Maharashtra. The scheme aims to promote the development of spinning mills owned by scheduled caste members.

schemeName: Swarnim Jayanti Mukhya Mantri Shaheri Vikas Yojana (SJMMSVY)
briefDescription: A flagship initiative by the Gujarat government launched in 2009-10 to enhance city-level infrastructure, focusing on water supply, underground drainage, and renewable energy for sustainable urban development.

schemeName: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance in Implementation of Information and Communication Technology
briefDescription: The "Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs" aims to empower the state's dynamic MSME sector, which significantly contributes to employment, GDP, and exports.

schemeName: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance for Quality Certification
briefDescription: The "Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs" aims to empower the state's dynamic MSME sector, which significantly contributes to employment, GDP, and exports.
