schemeName: Scheme of Assistance for Environment Protection Measures: Scheme for assistance to encouraging Green Practices and Environmental Audit to MSMEs
briefDescription: The "Scheme of Assistance for Environment Protection Measures" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy promotes sustainable industrial growth by supporting industries in adopting eco-friendly practices and ensuring compliance with environmental norms, effective from August 7th, 2020 to August 6th, 2025.

schemeName: Scheme for Assistance for Research & Development Activities: Assistance for Contract/Sponsored Research Work
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Assistance for Research & Development Activities" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy promotes innovation by encouraging R&D among companies and institutions, fostering technological advancements to drive "Atmanirbhar Gujarat."

schemeName: Scheme for Assistance for Research & Development Activities: Assistance to Industrial Association for Establishment of R&D Laboratories
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Assistance for Research & Development Activities" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy promotes innovation by encouraging R&D among companies and institutions, fostering technological advancements to drive "Atmanirbhar Gujarat."

schemeName: Scheme of Assistance for Common Environment Infrastructure: Common Boiler Project by SPV Constituted by Minimum 10 MSMEs
briefDescription: The scheme "Scheme of Assistance for Common Environment Infrastructure" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy aims to provide incentives for environmental compliance to ensure long-term economic and ecological balance.

schemeName: Scheme of Assistance for Common Environment Infrastructure: Financial Assistance for Common Environmental Infrastructure Facilities
briefDescription: The scheme "Scheme of Assistance for Common Environment Infrastructure" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy aims to provide incentives for environmental compliance to ensure long-term economic and ecological balance.

schemeName: Financial Assistance to Industrial Parks: Assistance on Fixed Capital Investment
briefDescription: The scheme "Financial Assistance to Industrial Parks" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy aims to boost industrial growth through financial assistance, modern technologies, and enhanced facilities for industrial parks and clusters.

schemeName: Scheme for Enhancement of Technical Competence and Manpower: Scheme of Financial Assistance for Setting Up Anchor Institute
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Enhancement of Technical Competence and Manpower" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy aims to bridge the industry’s skill gap, boost employment, and align workforce training with evolving technology and business needs.

schemeName: Scheme of Assistance for Environment Protection Measures: Scheme for assistance to Environment Management
briefDescription: The "Scheme of Assistance for Environment Protection Measures" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy promotes sustainable industrial growth by supporting industries in adopting eco-friendly practices and ensuring compliance with environmental norms, effective from August 7th, 2020 to August 6th, 2025.

schemeName: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for Assistance to Mega Industries: Assistance of Interest Subsidy
briefDescription: The "Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for Assistance to Mega Industries" aims to strengthen the overall industrial ecosystem in the State and also enable a larger set of manufacturing companies to emulate the adoption of clean energy and make them future-ready to compete in global markets.

schemeName: Scheme for assistance for Start Ups/ Innovation: Assistance to Enroll and Participate for Acceleration Program
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Assistance for Start Ups/ Innovation" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy, aims to drive economic growth by generating jobs, fostering competition, and introducing next-gen solutions.

schemeName: Scheme for Financial Assistance to Integrated Logistics Facilities: Interest Subsidy
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Financial Assistance to Integrated Logistics Facilities" under the Gujarat Integrated Logistics and Logistics Park Policy, provides financial support to private developers for creating logistics facilities and parks with the necessary infrastructure and services.

schemeName: Capital Contribution Scheme (Goa)
briefDescription: "Capital Contribution Scheme" aims to support local entrepreneurs, promote industrial units, and develop special products based on locally developed technology. Financial support is provided to local entrepreneurs and existing functional units.

schemeName: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance to Special Entrepreneurship Degree Approach Training with 360 Promoters/ with Mentoring Support and Sustenance Allowance for Entrepreneurs
briefDescription: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" aims to support SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthen MSMEs, making them globally competitive.

schemeName: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance for Power Connection Charges
briefDescription: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" aims to support SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthen MSMEs, making them globally competitive.

schemeName: Fish Extension, Research, and Training Scheme
briefDescription: The Fish Extension, Research, and Training Scheme by the Department of Fisheries, Government of India aims to promote sustainable fishing practices and improve fish production. Through this scheme, financial and technical assistance are provided to fish farmers and others in the fisheries sector.

schemeName: Grant-in-Aid Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to the Mahila Mandals
briefDescription: "Grant-in-Aid Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to the Mahila Mandals" aims to provide financial assistance to Mahila Mandals for training and self-employment activities. The scheme benefits registered Mahila Mandals in Goa, encouraging women's socio-economic development.

schemeName: Gujarat Textile Policy: Capital Subsidy
briefDescription: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

schemeName: Gujarat Textile Policy: Capital Subsidy
briefDescription: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

schemeName: Gujarat Textile Policy: Assistance for Technology Acquisition
briefDescription: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

schemeName: Gujarat Textile Policy: Payroll Assistance (Fiscal Incentives to Labour Intensive Unit)
briefDescription: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

schemeName: Gujarat Textile Policy: Power Tariff Subsidy (Fiscal Incentives to Labour Intensive Unit)
briefDescription: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

schemeName: Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME): Rehabilitation of Sick Enterprises
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME)" launched by the Industries and Mines Department aims to position Gujarat as a global business hub, promoting sustainable manufacturing, MSME growth, and export competitiveness.

schemeName: Gujarat Textile Policy: Assistance to SHG for Job Work
briefDescription: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

schemeName: Package for strengthening to sugar co-operatives as may be policy decided by the State Government
briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to support sugar co-operatives by providing financial assistance for modernization, diversification, organic fertilizer production to enhance sugarcane farming and the sugar industry.

schemeName: Scheme to Provide Assistance to Processing Units in State Market Committees
briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to support market committees in Gujarat by providing financial assistance for the establishment of processing units.

schemeName: Incentive Assistance to Scheduled Caste Farmers to Increase the Area, Production and Productivity of Sugarcane Farming
briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to SC farmers to increase sugarcane production and productivity through quality seeds, modern farming practices, and agricultural mechanization.

schemeName: Construction of Dudhghar/ Godown (Scheduled Caste Area)
briefDescription: The scheme "Construction of Dudhghar/ Godown (Scheduled Caste Area)" provides financial assistance for the construction of Dudhghar (milk storage unit) and Godown (cattle feed storage) for Village Milk Producer Co-operative Societies in Scheduled Caste areas of Gujarat.

schemeName: Leather Training Scheme - Rajasthan
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote leather industry, improve production & quality of leather products, develop new designs, & generate self-employment. Under this scheme, training is provided in latest techniques for leather dyeing, Nagara Jooti, leather goods, etc. through District Industry Centers.

schemeName: Ashadeepa Scheme
briefDescription: The scheme was introduced by the Government of Karnataka in the 2017-18 budget to encourage private sector industries and companies to provide employment opportunities to persons belonging to the Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe categories, ensuring social justice.

schemeName: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Equipment in Non-Tribal Areas
briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to enhance fish seed production and promote inland fisheries in non-tribal areas.

schemeName: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries
briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to enhance fish production and provide employment opportunities to Scheduled Caste (SC) individuals engaged in inland fisheries.

schemeName: Fodder Development Scheme For Gram Panchayat, Gaushala And Panjarpol Having Gauchar Land
briefDescription: This scheme provides financial assistance for the development and improvement of gauchar (pasture) land to promote green fodder cultivation and ensure better health and productivity of cattle.

schemeName: Atma Nirbhar Pashu Palan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance rural livelihoods, promote sustainable animal husbandry practices, & contribute to self-reliance in livestock sector. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to unemployed individuals, SHGs, cooperative societies, etc. for livestock rearing & allied activities.

schemeName: Nalanda Award
briefDescription: The "Nalanda Award" implemented by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, recognizes organizations for exceptional work in the field of social welfare, particularly for the socially and educationally disadvantaged sections.

schemeName: Construction of Sports Infrastructure Facilities (Badminton, Table Tennis, Squash, Indoor Cricket, Basketball, Volleyball, Football, Hockey, and Swimming) in Private Sector
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide grants of 25% of the total cost, up to a maximum of ₹50.00 lakh, for the construction of sports infrastructure facilities in the private sector, including Badminton, Table Tennis, Squash, Indoor Cricket, Basketball, Volleyball, Football, Hockey, and Swimming.

schemeName: Quality Certification Assistance Scheme
briefDescription: This scheme provides financial assistance to Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) in Haryana for obtaining quality certifications such as ISO, HACCP, BSI, WHO-GMP, ZED, TS, and Hallmark. It aims to promote quality standards and enhance competitiveness among MSMEs.

schemeName: Incentive Scheme for Establishment of New Super Specialty Hospital in Private Sector
briefDescription: The scheme offers financial incentives (capital subsidy, interest subvention, and electricity duty reimbursement) to private/NGO entities establishing new super specialty hospitals (50+ beds) in Gujarat, targeting underserved areas.

schemeName: COP-37 (General Area) 50% Capital Subsidy Scheme for Project of Taluka & District Co-op. Purchase Sale Union
briefDescription: The scheme aims to financially strengthen cooperative purchase and sale unions through 50% capital subsidy for project development such as procurement, processing, marketing, and storage activities.

schemeName: Scheduled Castes Unsalaried Credit Co-operative Society and Credit and Supply Co-operative Scheme for Providing Managerial Assistance and Computer–Furniture to the Society
briefDescription: The scheme aims to uplift Scheduled Castes by providing managerial salary and computer–furniture assistance to eligible cooperative societies.

schemeName: Scheme for Granting Assistance to Processing Units in APMC (General Area)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote agro-processing and value addition by providing capital investment assistance to private entrepreneurs operating in regulated APMC areas (general zones).

schemeName: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries: Fish Seed Stocking - Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and provide employment to Schedule Caste (SC) people involved in inland fisheries activities.

schemeName: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries: Boat Net Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist boat nets, which are provided to Scheduled Caste (SC) fishermen and fish farmers, to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and providing employment to SC individuals involved in inland fisheries.

schemeName: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries: Scheme For Fish Sale Equipment - Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase fish production and provide employment to Scheduled Caste (SC) individuals engaged in inland fisheries. Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided for purchasing fish sale equipment to SC fish farmers and fishermen.

schemeName: Akhil Bhartiya Kisan Mela and Krishi Udyog Pradarshani
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a platform for farmers, agri-entrepreneurs, and stakeholders to access, learn about, and showcase the latest agricultural innovations, technologies, and practices.

schemeName: Scheme of Financial Assistance to IHMs/FCIs/IITTM/ICI/NCHMCT/PSUs
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide Central Financial Assistance for setting up, expanding, upgrading, and replacing equipment for institutions involved in tourism and hospitality education and capacity building. Benefits include capital grants for construction and equipment.

schemeName: Establishment of Cow Shelters
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide proper shelter and care to unprofitable, abandoned, or roaming cattle by supporting eligible organizations in establishing and maintaining cow shelters with financial assistance from the state government.

schemeName: Youth and Eco Club
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote environmental awareness and sustainable practices among students by organizing programmes and activities such as plastic reduction initiatives, kitchen gardening, etc. along with various competitions to engage and empower students in protecting the environment.

schemeName: Establishment of Cell for SC/ST
briefDescription: The project is being implemented by UCOST in collaboration with Department of Science & Technology, Govt. of India to empower Scheduled Caste & Scheduled Tribe communities across Uttarakhand by addressing their fundamental challenges through scientific & technological interventions.

schemeName: The Wired Internet Scheme for Information and Communication Technology Laboratory in Schools in the State of Goa
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide monthly rental reimbursement to avail internet services to the Information and Communication Technology Laboratory in Government and Government-Aided Schools in the State of Goa. It provides a maximum monthly reimbursement of ₹2,000/- for internet rental.

schemeName: House of Himalayas
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide recognition and market reach to local Himalayan products of Uttarakhand through improved branding, packaging and sales. Under this scheme, local producers and self-help groups are supported to enhance their products’ quality, branding and market access.

schemeName: IT Incubation Centre - Information Technology Development Agency
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship and innovation in the fields of Information Technology, Medical Technology, Electronics, Artificial Intelligence, Biotechnology, and related sectors by providing a supportive ecosystem for startups.

schemeName: Affordable Housing Component in Partnership of Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban) under Uttarakhand Housing Policy Rules, 2024
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide affordable pucca housing with basic amenities to lower-income groups individuals in Uttarakhand through a partnership model under the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban).

schemeName: Construction of NABARD-Funded Minor Irrigation Projects - Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide farmers with free and reliable irrigation facilities by constructing NABARD-funded minor irrigation projects, so that water availability improves and farming becomes easier and more productive.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Urban: Individual House Construction Component - Beneficiary Led Construction (BLC) Uttarakhand
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to eligible urban families for constructing a pucca house on their own land or for improving their existing kutcha or weak houses.

schemeName: Scheme for Construction of Ideal Fish Pond in Hilly Areas
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage individuals and groups to construct fish ponds by providing financial assistance and to promote sustainable fish farming while enhancing livelihood opportunities in the hilly regions of the state.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY-Inland): Backyard Ornamental Fish Rearing Unit - Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the rearing of ornamental fish and accelerate inland fish farming activities in freshwater bodies, also increase inland fish production. The scheme also employs people involved in inland fisheries activities.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY-Inland): Large Biofloc Establishment Culture System - Gujarat
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs, provide employment to people involved in inland fisheries activities, accelerate inland fish farming activities in freshwater bodies, and boost inland fisheries.

schemeName: Bharat Steel Awards
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognise excellence and outstanding contributions in the Indian steel sector. Through this scheme, awards and incentives are provided to eligible steel companies and individuals.

schemeName: Ayush Oushadhi Gunvatta Evam Uttpadan Samvardhan Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance India's manufacturing capabilities and exports of traditional medicines and health promotion products under the initiative of Atmanirbhar Bharat.

schemeName: Ayurswasthya Yojana: Up-gradation of Facilities to Centre of Excellence (CoE)
briefDescription: The scheme-component aims to support the establishment and up-gradation of reputed institutions to Centres of Excellence for strengthening AYUSH education, research, innovation, and advanced healthcare services.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Scheme of Grant-in-Aid to Voluntary and other Organizations Working for Scheduled Castes
briefDescription: The "Scheme aims to enhance the reach of development interventions of the Government and fill the gaps in service-deficient Scheduled Caste-dominant areas in sectors such as education, health, vocational training, etc., through the efforts of voluntary organizations and other organizations.

schemeName: Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME): Assistance for Interest Subsidy (Service Sector)
briefDescription: The "Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME)" launched by the Industries and Mines Department aims to position Gujarat as a global business hub, promoting sustainable manufacturing, MSME growth, and export competitiveness.

schemeName: Education Loan Scheme under NSFDC- Haryana
briefDescription: This scheme offers educational loans of up to ₹10 lakhs for studies within India and up to ₹30 lakhs for studies abroad. These loans are available to eligible students pursuing regular full-time recognized courses in India or abroad.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: National Action for Mechanised Sanitation Ecosystem (NAMASTE) - "Emergency Response Sanitation Unit (ERSU) Formation and Functionalisation"
briefDescription: The scheme aims to establish professional, well-trained, motivated and adequately equipped workforce for maintenance and management of sewers and septic tanks, addressing the critical need to eliminate fatalities resulting from workers entering sewers and septic tanks without proper safety measures.

schemeName: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme- For Incubators
briefDescription: The scheme “Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)” was launched by the DPIIT on 19th April 2021 to provide financial assistance to startups for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials, market-entry, and commercialization.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemeName: Scheme for Reimbursement of Testing and Certification Charges for Start-ups and Telecom MSEs
briefDescription: The scheme aims to reimburse testing and certification costs. Financial support is provided to Start-ups and MSEs to enhance telecom product competitiveness.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemeName: Production Linked Incentive Scheme (PLI) for IT Hardware
briefDescription: The scheme aims to boost domestic manufacturing and attract investment in IT hardware. Through this scheme, financial incentives are provided to eligible manufacturers based on incremental sales.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemeName: Livestock Health and Diseases Control
briefDescription: The Livestock Health and Diseases Control (LH&DC) scheme is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme (CSS) implemented by the Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying (DAHD), Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare, Government of India.

schemeName: Amended Technology Upgradation Fund
briefDescription: The Ministry of Textiles introduced the Amended Technology Upgradation Fund Scheme (ATUFS). This scheme aims to facilitate investment, employment, productivity, quality and import and export substitution in the textile industry.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Personnel, Public Grievances And Pensions
schemeName: National Awards for e-Governance
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize excellence in e-governance. It provides awards and incentives up to ₹10,00,000 to outstanding initiatives.

schemeName: Subhash Chandra Bose Aapda Prabandhan Puraskar
briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize excellent work done by individuals and institutions in the field of disaster management including prevention, mitigation, preparedness, response, and rehabilitation.

schemeName: Assistance for Quality Enhancement
briefDescription: The scheme aims to support micro and small enterprises in obtaining quality and system certifications or IPRs. It offers up to 50% reimbursement of certification costs with a ceiling of ₹3,00,000.

schemeName: Financial Assistance For Promotion Of Guru-Shishya Parampara (Repertory Grant)
briefDescription: This scheme provides financial support to organizations preserving traditional performing arts through the Guru–Shishya tradition and ensures continuity of cultural heritage through training and mentorship.

schemeName: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Support for Group Nurseries
briefDescription: The scheme "Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Support for Group Nurseries" by the Coffee Board, Department of Commerce, Ministry of Commerce and Industry, aims to provide growers with high-quality coffee seedlings to ensure the proper establishment of plantations.

schemeName: Access to Knowledge for Technology Development and Dissemination (A2K+)
briefDescription: Access to Knowledge for Technology Development and Dissemination (A2K+) is a scheme targeted towards developing mechanisms to disseminate science, technology and innovation-related information to industries, research and academic institutions

schemeName: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for Food Processing Industry
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote food manufacturing, branding, and employment. Through this scheme, financial incentives and branding support are provided to food processing entities.

schemeName: Production Linked Incentive Scheme for Millet Based Products
briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase usage of millets and promote value-added millet products. Through this scheme, financial incentives on incremental sales are provided to eligible manufacturers.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Scheme for Assistance for Industrial Infrastructure-DNH&DD
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support for improvement of infrastructure in OIDC/Non-OIDC Estates /Private Estates / Industrial Areas.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: International Cooperation Scheme- Capacity Building of First Time MSE Exporters
briefDescription: The scheme “International Cooperation Scheme” was launched by the MSME, Govt. of India with the aim to capacity build MSMEs for entering export market by providing reimbursement of various costs incurred by first time MSE exporters on export shipments.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: Mission Solar Charkha
briefDescription: The scheme “Mission Solar Charkha” a pilot project was implemented by the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, Government of India. The scheme envisages setting up of Solar Charkha Clusters which would mean a focal village and other surrounding villages in a radius of 8 to 10 Kilometres.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: Design Scheme Under MSME Innovative Scheme
briefDescription: Design scheme will help MSMEs to avail advice on all aspects of design. It helps MSMEs realize and achieve their design-related objectives. This specialist advice will be provided by experienced designers for new product development as well as enhancing existing product portfolio.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Deen Dayal Disabled Rehabilitation Scheme
briefDescription: The umbrella Central Sector Scheme of this Ministry called the "Scheme to Promote Voluntary Action for Persons with Disabilities" was revised w.e.f. 01.04.2003 and was renamed as the "Deendayal Disabled Rehabilitation Scheme (DDRS)"

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemeName: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme
briefDescription: Launched in August 2008, Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP) is a credit-linked subsidy scheme, administered by the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME). PMEGP aims to generate employment opportunities through the establishment of micro-enterprises in

schemeName: Industrial R&D Promotion Programme: Recognition Of In-House R&D Units
briefDescription: DSIR is operating a scheme called "Recognition of In-House R&D Units" with the objective of granting recognition & registration to in-house R&D units established by the corporate industry. The In-house R&D units are expected to be engaged in innovative research & development activities.

schemeName: Institutional Support for Development and Marketing of Tribal Products/Produce
briefDescription: The scheme “Institutional Support for development and Marketing of Tribal Products/Produce” was introduced in 2014-15 by the Ministry of Tribal Affairs, Government of India.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
schemeName: Saraswati Vidya Yojana: Reimbursement of Fees for Diploma/Graduation and Post-Graduation Professional Courses - DNH&DD
briefDescription: “Reimbursement of Fees for Diploma/ Graduation and Post-Graduation Professional Courses'' under “Saraswati Vidya Yojana”, implemented by the Directorate of Education,  Of DNH & DD, aims to provide financial assistance to girl students pursuing higher education in professional courses.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemeName: National Livestock Mission: Genetic Improvement of Pig Breeds - Import of Exotic Pig Germplasm
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance indigenous pig productivity through genetic upgradation. The scheme supports the establishment of pig semen collection and processing labs and the import of exotic pig germplasm.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Skilling and Employability Transformation through Upgraded ITIs (PM‑SETU) : Component I
briefDescription: The scheme aims to upgrade ITIs into industry-led institutions. Through this scheme, infrastructure, training, and employment-oriented benefits are provided to trainees.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Vanchit Ikai Samooh aur Vargon ki Aarthik Sahayata Yojana (VISVAS) for Self-Help Groups
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide the benefit of a lower rate of interest to eligible Self-Help Groups (SHGs) and individual beneficiaries belonging to Scheduled Castes (SCs), Other Backward Classes (OBCs), and Safai Karamcharis (including identified Manual Scavengers, Waste Pickers, and their dependents).

schemeName: Credit Guarantee Scheme for Startups
briefDescription: Under this scheme to improve access to collateral-free debt funding for DPIIT-recognised startups by providing credit guarantees on eligible loan and debt facilities, thereby encouraging institutional lending and supporting startup growth and innovation.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemeName: National Mission on Edible Oils- Oil Palm
briefDescription: The Mission was launched with the aim to enhance the edible oilseeds production and oils availability in the country by harnessing Oil Palm area expansion, increasing CPO production and to reduce import burden on edible oils.

schemeName: Mukhya Mantri Balika Poshak Yojna
briefDescription: The "Mukhya Mantri Balika Poshak Yojna" is a government initiative launched to encourage the enrollment and retention of girl students in schools by providing them with school uniforms.

schemeName: State Goat Entrepreneurship Development Scheme
briefDescription: The "State Goat Entrepreneurship Development Scheme", initiated by the Animal Husbandry Department of Chhattisgarh, aims to promote goat farming as a sustainable livelihood option. Goat rearing has been a traditional occupation, and with increasing demand for milk and meat.

schemeName: Rajya Dairy Udhyamita Vikas Yojna
briefDescription: The "Rajya Dairy Udhyamita Vikas Yojna", under the Animal Husbandry Department of Chhattisgarh, aims to promote dairy entrepreneurship among youth. With the increasing demand for milk and dairy products, the scheme supports high-breed cow/buffalo rearing as a profitable business.

schemeName: Training for Horticulture Skill Development for Self-Employment at Centre of Excellence
briefDescription: The scheme "Training for Horticulture Skill Development for Self-Employment at Centre of Excellence " is aimed at promoting self-employment opportunities across all communities in Gujarat through practical and theoretical learning at the Centre of Excellence.

schemeName: NEW SWARNIMA (Gopalak Nigam)
briefDescription: Self-employment loan scheme for Rabari and Bharwad women in Gujarat, offering up to ₹2 lakh at 5% annual interest to promote economic independence.

schemeName: PMMSY: Establishment of large RAS / Biofloc culture system - Haryana
briefDescription: The scheme provides capital assistance for setting up large-scale Recirculatory Aquaculture Systems (RAS) and Biofloc culture systems to promote high-yield, sustainable fish farming.

schemeName: Working Women Hostel
briefDescription: The scheme "Working Women Hostel" by the Women and Child Development Department, Government of Haryana aims to provide safe and affordable accommodation to working women. Through this scheme, hostel facilities at subsidized rent are provided to employed women.

schemeName: PMMSY: Establishment of small RAS /Biofloc culture system - Haryana
briefDescription: The scheme provides capital assistance for setting up small-scale Recirculatory Aquaculture Systems (RAS) and Biofloc culture systems to promote high-yield, sustainable fish farming.

schemeName: Intensive Fisheries Development Programme - Subsidy on Purchase of Fishing Nets (Scheduled Caste)
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to individuals from Scheduled Caste families engaged in fishing activities for the purchase of fishing nets. Under this scheme, a 60% subsidy or up to ₹24,000, on the purchase of fishing nets worth ₹40,000/- will be provided to eligible beneficiaries.

schemeName: Scheme of Financial Assistance to New Writers of Gujarati Language and Literature for Publishing Original Works of Creative and Fine Literature
briefDescription: The scheme aims to financially support new writers in the Gujarati language who wish to publish original works of creative and literary merit.

schemeName: Sabooj Sathi
briefDescription: The Sabooj Sathi Scheme is a student welfare initiative launched by the government of West Bengal, India, to provide bicycles to students in the state. Under the scheme, bicycles are distributed free of cost to students studying in government and government-aided schools from classes IX to XII.
tags: Sabooj Sathi Scheme West Bengal Government

schemeName: Distribution of Horticulture Kit to Urban and Rural Areas
briefDescription: Through this scheme, all the horticulture growers in rural & urban areas are provided with a horticulture kit worth ₹ 3,000 per kit to urban and rural areas, during Aadipattam/Thaipattam, through the Additional Director of Agriculture (Horticulture).

schemeName: Male Pig Distribution Scheme
briefDescription: The "Male Pig Distribution Scheme", under the Animal Husbandry Department, Government of  Chhattisgarh, provides a grant to beneficiaries from the SC/ST category for purchasing one male pig of an improved breed (Middle White Yorkshire).

schemeName: Paddy Transplantor Machine se Dhan Ropayee par Anudan
briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote mechanized paddy transplantation under the Agriculture Development and Farmer Welfare and Biotechnology Department, Chhattisgarh. It provides ₹3,000 per acre for land preparation, including ploughing and weeding, up to 2 hectares.

schemeName: Capacity Building For Service Providers - Entrepreneurship Programme
briefDescription: The scheme "Entrepreneurship Programme" is a Suo-Moto Sub-Scheme of the Ministry of Tourism under the Umbrella Scheme of "Capacity Building for Service Providers". In this scheme financial assistance is provided to the institutes (given below) to conduct entrepreneurship development programs.

schemeName: Inter-state Border Areas Development Programme
briefDescription: The aims and objectives of the Inter-State Border Areas Development Programme ISBADP are to provide facilities for the socioeconomic development of the people living along the Inter-State boundary with Assam.

schemeName: Kisan Vikas Patra Scheme
briefDescription: ‘Kisan Vikas Patra Scheme’ was relaunched in the year 2014 by the Department of Economic Affairs, Ministry Of Finance, Government of India in view of the popular demand and to revitalize Small Savings. The amount invested in Kisan Vikas Patra (KYP) doubles in 115 months at the present rate.

schemeShortTitle: CHIEF MINISTER SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE IRRIGATION SCHEME
schemeName: Chief Minister Sustainable Agriculture Irrigation Scheme - Magel Tyala Shettale (Individual Farm Pond)
briefDescription: Under this scheme subsidy payable to individual farmer is minimum Rs.14433/- and maximum Rs.75000/- depending on the size of the farm pond.

schemeName: Punjabi Language Scholarship Scheme
briefDescription: This scheme awards scholarships to students based on their merit in the Punjabi subject in the 8th and 10th class examinations conducted by the Haryana Board of School Education, provided they continue studying the Punjabi subject in the 9th and 11th classes.

schemeName: MICRO FINANCE (Gopalak Nigam)
briefDescription: Micro-loan scheme for Rabari and Bharwad caste entrepreneurs in Gujarat. Provides up to ₹1.25 lakh loan at 5% interest with only 5% beneficiary contribution.

schemeName: Foreign Study Loan Scheme (GUEEDC)
briefDescription: Loan scheme offering up to ₹15 lakh at 4% simple interest to unreserved category students for MBBS, PG, or equivalent courses abroad with flexible collateral and repayment conditions.

schemeName: Mukhya Mantri Matritva Sahayata Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme "Mukhya Mantri Matritva Sahayata Yojana" by the Women and Child Development Department, Haryana, aims to provide a cash incentive of ₹5,000/- during maternity to eligible pregnant and lactating women on the birth of a second child (boy).

schemeName: Intensive Fisheries Development Programme - Subsidy on Commercial Four-Wheeler Vehicles
briefDescription: The scheme aims to strengthen the fisheries value chain by providing transportation support to fish farmers. Under this scheme, eligible fish farmers receive a subsidy of 25% of the actual cost on the purchase of a commercial four-wheeler vehicle used for fisheries-related activities.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Refrigerated Vehicles – Haryana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance cold chain infrastructure & ensure hygienic and efficient fish transportation. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to fishers for purchasing refrigerated vehicles to maintain the freshness & quality of fish during post-harvest handling & transportation.

schemeName: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance for Translation of Scholarly Works
briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage cultural exchange and literary development by providing financial assistance for translating high-quality literary and research works between Gujarati and other Indian languages.

nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemeName: Loan based Scheme for Pay and Use Community Toilets
briefDescription: The “Pay and Use” Community Toilets Scheme under Swachhta Udyami Yojana by NSKFDC offers concessional loans to Safai Karamcharis and their dependents for setting up public toilet units, promoting sanitation, livelihood, and dignity.

schemeName: GROUP WORKSHED SCHEME
briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to facilitate the establishment of worksheds for shuttleless looms in an existing or new cluster, which will provide the required scale of economy for business operations.

schemeName: Sanction of Laptops - Andhra Pradesh
briefDescription: The "Sanction of Laptops" scheme aims to distribute laptops to visually challenged, hearing impairments, speech impairments, and orthopedic challenges students pursuing professional courses. The A.P. Differently Abled & Senior Citizens Assistance Corporation proposes to procure 200 laptops.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Kishori Swasthya Yojna
briefDescription: This initiative by the State Government aimed at reducing school dropout rates among adolescent girls by providing free sanitary napkins, promoting hygiene, and supporting their overall health.

schemeName: Arunachal Pradesh Entrepreneurship Challenge
briefDescription: APEC will identify, promote, support, and nurture sustainable and locally relevant business ideas and entrepreneurs. The top 10 entrepreneurs selected for the Incubation & Pre-Incubation programmes facilitated by the IIM Calcutta Innovation Park will be awarded up to ₹5,00,000.

schemeName: Bima Yojana - Direct Benefit to Artisan
briefDescription: Launched on 15th August 2022, the scheme "Bima Yojana - Direct Benefit to Artisan (BYDBTA)" is a Social Welfare Scheme by the Ministry of Textiles, Government of India.

schemeName: Khadya Suraksha Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme "Rashtriya Khadya Suraksha Yojana" aims to ensure that every person in Rajasthan has access to an adequate quantity of food at affordable prices.

schemeName: Sanctioning of Touch Phone to Hearing Challenged – Speech Impaired
briefDescription: The "Sanctioning of Touch Phone to Hearing Challenged – Speech Impaired" aims to provide touch phones to hearing and speech-impaired individuals who know sign language as per the Action Plan 2017-18. The Assistant Directors, Department for the Welfare of Different, distribute the touch phones.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Balika Cycle Yojna
briefDescription: The "Mukhyamantri Balika Cycle Yojna" is a government initiative aimed at reducing the gender gap in secondary school enrollment by providing financial assistance to girls for purchasing bicycles, ensuring improved access to education.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Balika Protsahan Yojana (Intermediate Pass)
briefDescription: The Mukhyamantri Balika (Intermediate Pass) Protsahan Yojana is a scheme by the Bihar government aimed at promoting girl child education, curbing child marriages, reducing fertility rates, and empowering girls to become self-reliant.

schemeName: Mukhyamantri Balika Protsahan Yojana (Matriculation)
briefDescription: The scheme provides a financial incentive to girls who achieve a first division in their matriculation examination.

schemeName: Chhattisgarh Yuva Suchna Kranti Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free laptops and tablets to eligible students in higher education institutions. The scheme intends to facilitate the use of new technologies among the state's youth, thereby fostering their economic and social development, and enhancing their knowledge and careers.

schemeName: National Family Benefit Scheme for BPL Families
briefDescription: The scheme "National Family Benefit Scheme for BPL Families" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Haryana, aims to provide one-time financial assistance to economically vulnerable families after the death of the primary breadwinner.

schemeName: Dr. Syama Prasad Mookerjee Durghtana Sahayta Yojana
briefDescription: The scheme "Dr. Syama Prasad Mookerjee Durghtana Sahayta Yojana" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Haryana , aims to provide financial assistance of ₹1,00,000 in case of accidental death or disability to residents of Haryana who are not enrolled under the PMSBY.

schemeName: PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc culture system - Haryana
briefDescription: The scheme provides capital assistance to fish farmers and entrepreneurs for establishing medium-scale Recirculatory Aquaculture Systems (RAS) and Biofloc systems.

schemeName: National Centre for Communication Security (NCCS) Research Associates Scheme
briefDescription: NCCS engages young scholars as Research Associates  to contribute in development of Telecom Security eco system with in India by providing an opportunity to them to work in areas like Telecom Security Standard development, Lab recognition and Security Certification of telecom products.
